The NCAA Tournament has had no shortage of wild moments so far, but there’s madness way beyond the basketball court: it’s in our full-court press against gerrymandering, too. Because fair play starts with fair maps. [**That’s why we’re unveiling our newest sticker design — the March _Map_ ness sticker. Just because some of our brackets may be busted (we’re looking at you, Oakland Golden Grizzlies) doesn’t mean our congressional and legislative maps should be busted too. If you agree, throw our new March Mapness sticker on your laptop or water bottle to spread the word about our work and let people know we mean business about protecting our democracy.
**While basketball season may come to an end, the _map_ ness will go on far longer than just this March. And with this sticker, you can help end gerrymandering and make our fight for a stronger democracy a slam dunk!**

clean_body: Fair play starts with fair maps. | The NCAA Tournament has had no shortage of wild moments so far, but there’s madness way beyond the basketball court: it’s in our full-court press against gerrymandering, too. Because fair play starts with fair maps. | Just because some of our brackets may be busted (we’re looking at you, Oakland Golden Grizzlies) doesn’t mean our congressional and legislative maps should be busted too. If you agree, throw our new March Mapness sticker on your laptop or water bottle to spread the word about our work and let people know we mean business about protecting our democracy. While basketball season may come to an end, the map ness will go on far longer than just this March. And with this sticker, you can help end gerrymandering and make our fight for a stronger democracy a slam dunk! Thanks for moving the ball forward towards fair maps, friend. – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Hi, Friends. Dr. Bob's staff here. It's Social Worker Month and National Doctors Day.
Our boss is both, and we're grateful for all the lives he's helped in our communities. We're asking you to help us celebrate his service tonight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Let's thank Doc, together.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
If you can contribute and thank Doc for his lifetime of service with a warm 'Happy Doctors Day', your donation tonight will boost his campaign for Congress and help us start the second quarter strong.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
https://linktr.ee/boblorinser [https://linktr.ee/boblorinser]
Friends,
Dr. Bob has always prioritized the healthcare of underserved families. Now, we need a doctor in the House to prioritize the well-being of everyone.
For the past forty years, Dr. Bob has devoted his life to serving others. He has served the military in various capacities, working as a social worker at the VA and providing emergency medical care at KI Sawyer Air Force Base.
Bob served families as the director of Medicaid and Medicare in the district and the medical director of Marquette County. His expertise in healthcare, administration, and patient care will give him a unique voice to advocate for rural communities in Congress.
Healthcare is the #1 issue facing all Americans.
Bob Lorinser is the only practicing family doctor in the Nation running for Congress to pass Medicare for All.
We need a publicly financed non-profit national health insurance program that will fully cover medical costs for all Americans.
We need a doctor in the House.
With your support, Bob hopes to continue his lifetime of service and represent you and our district's unique way of life.
Thank you for your generosity, happy National Doctors Day, and happy Social Workers Month.
-Team Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser for Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
CELEBRATE WITH A DONATION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]

FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

| | Our team continues to grow, friends! In recent weeks, we’ve gained some major endorsements that I’m excited to share with you. Just this month, we’ve won the support of amazing organizations including the Oregon Education Association, SEIU, and Planned Parenthood of Oregon. We’ve also earned endorsements from more elected officials, including Congresswoman Suzanne Bonamici! In fact, all of the members of Congress and former statewide officials who are endorsing in this race have endorsed _us_.
Momentum continues to build for our campaign – but we can’t stop now. Right now, our team is facing our very first quarterly fundraising deadline of the election year. **[We’re aiming to raise another $5,000 from our grassroots team by March 31st, and I’m humbly asking you to make a donation to our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82022024/464209384/327344370?refcode=20240330&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2E3YWU4ZS1mNGVlLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=koogvlkkUeiTykTNJn9esqAiMPesf7B00d-UsWofeVM=)**

We’re hitting our stride at the right time. Ballots will be mailed in just 23 days, and our primary election day is less than two months away. **The endorsements we’ve earned so far are going to be incredibly important, because we know that voters in this primary election will take those into consideration as they make their final decision on who to support. ** Our team has a clear plan on how we’re going to communicate these endorsements and my goals to return trust and accountability to the Secretary of State’s office. clean_body: Momentum continues to build for our campaign – but we can’t stop now. | | | = | | | Our team continues to grow, friends! In recent weeks, we’ve gained some major endorsements that I’m excited to share with you. Just this month, we’ve won the support of amazing organizations including the Oregon Education Association, SEIU, and Planned Parenthood of Oregon. We’ve also earned endorsements from more elected officials, including Congresswoman Suzanne Bonamici! In fact, all of the members of Congress and former statewide officials who are endorsing in this race have endorsed us. Momentum continues to build for our campaign – but we can’t stop now. Right now, our team is facing our very first quarterly fundraising deadline of the election year. = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: = = = = = We’re hitting our stride at the right time. Ballots will be mailed in just 23 days, and our primary election day is less than two months away. The endorsements we’ve earned so far are going to be incredibly important, because we know that voters in this primary election will take those into consideration as they make their final decision on who to support. Our team has a clear plan on how we’re going to communicate these endorsements and my goals to return trust and accountability to the Secretary of State’s office. But it’s going to take a lot of financial resources to do so. = Thank you for being a part of our team! Madeleine

name: Sherrod Brown (personal)

body:
The General Election is here:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82022609/464235127/1800132588?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1007-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjE5MzFiZTAtZmVlZS1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P8x8loAwpmb-oQFDCs_FBOTkmL_WfAPeFCaEdZ6pJLU=)
Friend, it's official: the general election is here!
**I couldn't be more honored to represent the people of Ohio and have the opportunity to keep fighting for the Dignity of Work in the Senate. I want to personally thank every member of this team — including you, friend — for powering our grassroots movement this far.**
All we have accomplished together so far makes it clearer than ever, Ohio voters want someone who will fight for them in the Senate. Better wages and working conditions, reproductive freedom, affordable housing and health care — I promise to keep up these critical fights for all of us.
But our real fight starts now, friend. We now have an official opponent, Bernie Moreno, and he's a deep-pocketed Donald Trump ally that's ready to spend millions of dollars to try to buy this seat. Polls show this race is neck and neck. Republicans are already spending record-breaking sums to defeat me and flip the Senate red, and it's only going to get worse.

clean_body: The General Election is here: | | | = Friend, it's official: the general election is here! I couldn't be more honored to represent the people of Ohio and have the opportunity to keep fighting for the Dignity of Work in the Senate. I want to personally thank every member of this team — including you, friend — for powering our grassroots movement this far. All we have accomplished together so far makes it clearer than ever, Ohio voters want someone who will fight for them in the Senate. Better wages and working conditions, reproductive freedom, affordable housing and health care — I promise to keep up these critical fights for all of us. But our real fight starts now, friend. We now have an official opponent, Bernie Moreno, and he's a deep-pocketed Donald Trump ally that's ready to spend millions of dollars to try to buy this seat. Polls show this race is neck and neck. Republicans are already spending record-breaking sums to defeat me and flip the Senate red, and it's only going to get worse. So I'm personally asking:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = You're the reason we have made it this far — and you're the reason why we'll do it again in November. body:
That one should be easy enough | Peter,

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Is this not common sense?
body:
Our individual freedoms, the nation’s respect for the Constitution, and the legacy of our Founders are all enduring relentless assaults. |
---
| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=4429b899cb424a99908377feb40815ee&_t=_p0m4fSi2cxE70Ahwv51CKJ1N2XMJZa9X0M3sQqGdM8Urh2smQ-Yq1ljauDoDRqMvzgCWyRDMGsqyKKsfeJghutVUtlGUnN8PIPm_p_eZrU%3D)_
---

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4429b899cb424a99908377feb40815ee&_e=dD988bT8Hy_QVBTJnA4mA7vjZwNWWBDIpoXtolaF9Klzkzd1gnXaXAadL5YW3o7ohc8Di30cmzvMKLVHdbEW6_mc1nfsM3hGhNB1hRHVpvrhQpaxRN4i7C14OVRqvvGFPmLjfJ7_22bN3m9BJG8XZfvgV3L1-MeLhNGNmbofgfGfjuQ7Q8PIQkb_qi50McrT1g0ksW_bxZHInr6vSlcLXuG1uOx6xwewdf8ObkNfytyAYislofAAXc3zH03mXvIdy7Mcrh0xVhrD4kwunTmaqD7sn3RWpllBRY54RvL9OIaQ8HdxrAd0-kLSD1EJgw-I2OyPHnxpLIRE0uhjOGuicGZk-uPh0QZLJCmy8Xa5HL9kHrTf-2yjaXffCyYE8oThB4Onu3cTqcOVD_TRsJyQBQ%3D%3D)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I believe that America stands at a crossroads. Our individual freedoms, the nation's respect for the Constitution, and the legacy of our Founders are all enduring relentless assaults. Shifts in our society threaten to dilute our nation's character while biased media and divisive politics amplify it greater than ever.

The people that this impacts the most are not you and I-_It is our future generation._ Our children and grandchildren are being taught that that is their skin that defines them, not the content of their character. They are being taught that our nation's history is something to be ashamed of. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4429b899cb424a99908377feb40815ee&_e=dD988bT8Hy_QVBTJnA4mA7vjZwNWWBDIpoXtolaF9Klzkzd1gnXaXAadL5YW3o7ohc8Di30cmzvMKLVHdbEW6_mc1nfsM3hGhNB1hRHVpvrhQpaxRN4i7C14OVRqvvGFPmLjfJ7_22bN3m9BJG8XZfvgV3L1-MeLhNGNmbofgfGfjuQ7Q8PIQkb_qi50McrT1g0ksW_bxZHInr6vSlcLXuG1uOx6xwewdf8ObkNfytyAYislofAAXc3zH03mXvIdsYOv0rsDPyywRp5DpR0lFkzlLl29sW2KJBEK0Csyxe6RQTUyRaZiag5PRP-LEy17mKWBe9Lm3zCKIvb8OKcAUozixK3R2Ns_6rNNGSMiwCObl2POJNXVg6HvWF1T9OL7WK8cpIl03H25slEpvuUKLw%3D%3D) Candidly, it just doesn't make any sense.

But, I believe we can change this. I believe we can build a future that upholds the values of faith, liberty, community, and life - a future where all Americans are free to pursue their ideas, goals, and faith.

This won't be possible without your involvement. I've created a simple pledge; a way to align us all around a set of shared beliefs. [I want to invite you to take the Common Sense Pledge.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4429b899cb424a99908377feb40815ee&_e=dD988bT8Hy_QVBTJnA4mA7vjZwNWWBDIpoXtolaF9Klzkzd1gnXaXAadL5YW3o7ohc8Di30cmzvMKLVHdbEW6_mc1nfsM3hGhNB1hRHVpvrhQpaxRN4i7C14OVRqvvGFPmLjfJ7_22bN3m9BJG8XZfvgV3L1-MeLhNGNmbofgfGfjuQ7Q8PIQkb_qi50McrT1g0ksW_bxZHInr6vSlcLXuG1uOx6xwewdf8ObkNfytyAYislofAAXc3zH03mXvIdnWDQsg6EqdnBvz0zHQ2GEgBbFtDw019JFdSiw9ScnmxEs9AqO54X-r-LTBAcMFqzfqVT3EZbrVdEVCwpJsMxYP4f2WGcpyVDTWOwjrKjDJXRIMPyutq51x-Iy4-ryJTMnBAuKCN14O0-Ep8sRbezXQ%3D%3D)

We cannot bring about this necessary change without you. By signing this pledge, you are committing to uphold the principles our nation was founded on and teach them to the next generations. **Just one person can make a difference, and it can start with you.**

This is not a passive petition; it's an active pledge to uphold the common sense values that shaped our great nation.

Sign the Common Sense Pledge today using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/common-sense-pledge/](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4429b899cb424a99908377feb40815ee&_e=dD988bT8Hy_QVBTJnA4mA7vjZwNWWBDIpoXtolaF9Klzkzd1gnXaXAadL5YW3o7ohc8Di30cmzvMKLVHdbEW6_mc1nfsM3hGhNB1hRHVpvrhQpaxRN4i7C14OVRqvvGFPmLjfJ7_22bN3m9BJG8XZfvgV3L1-MeLhNGNmbofgfGfjuQ7Q8PIQkb_qi50McrT1g0ksW_bxZHInr6vSlcLXuG1uOx6xwewdf8ObkNfytyAYislofAAXc3zH03mXvIdFyYnJGiklaXcLwu-bFf7vwsK2xBeD3fKW8LveKftk7inCaUL6ba6eqt3oKfIXDqsfLs8gPuB15uvCMYAiq5R6pXFlqyUculDXeKkJNPqYfG13yZksylcecDly_V2aY30UtXhJ_zHsn4kL4zg1Rx7Bg%3D%3D)

Together, we can shape a future that respects our shared history, protects our hard-earned freedoms, and prioritizes common sense. Your involvement is critical - are you ready to take action?

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---
|

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=4429b899cb424a99908377feb40815ee&_t=_p0m4fSi2cxE70Ahwv51CKJ1N2XMJZa9X0M3sQqGdM8Urh2smQ-Yq1ljauDoDRqMvzgCWyRDMGsqyKKsfeJghutVUtlGUnN8PIPm_p_eZrU%3D).

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82022687/464235813/764215663?amount=10&amounts=3,5,7,10&refcode=RRFC_20240330_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNlZWZmNWUtMDJlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JwiLqzDShOjdlHeh6Xye_c82zdtLLL7sbEWFXsyipQg=) Folks, I’m about to hit the very first End of Quarter Deadline of this election year and it would mean so much if you’d split a donation between Dr. Raul Ruiz and me.

**This is my first major deadline of this election year. We must prove our people-powered movement can take on the extreme MAGA Republicans.**

[**To fend off Republican attacks, I need to come out of my first quarter of this year with an undeniable foundation of support. The good news is that I only need 2,000 more supporters to step up in these final 24 hours to prove we have what it takes to win. Can I count on you to split a donation between me and Dr. Raul Ruiz before our critical deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82022688/464235814/764215663?amount=10&amounts=3,5,7,10&refcode=RRFC_20240330_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNlZWZmNWUtMDJlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JwiLqzDShOjdlHeh6Xye_c82zdtLLL7sbEWFXsyipQg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82022689/464235815/764215663?amount=10&amounts=3,5,7,10&refcode=RRFC_20240330_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNlZWZmNWUtMDJlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JwiLqzDShOjdlHeh6Xye_c82zdtLLL7sbEWFXsyipQg=) **FOR: YOU (dpwillis67@gmail.com)**
[**Suggested Support: $10 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82022690/464235816/764215663?amount=10&amounts=3,5,7,10&refcode=RRFC_20240330_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNlZWZmNWUtMDJlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JwiLqzDShOjdlHeh6Xye_c82zdtLLL7sbEWFXsyipQg=) I know it won’t be easy to reclaim the House and bring common sense back to Congress.

**Grassroots Democrats led the charge to defy history and beat back the predicted “red wave” in the last election. I know you can help me take back the House.**

[**The truth is: it’s going to take all of us pitching in what we can to compete with extreme MAGA Republicans. I’m asking: Will you split a donation between me and Dr. Raul Ruiz before my first major deadline of the year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82022691/464235817/764215663?amount=10&amounts=3,5,7,10&refcode=RRFC_20240330_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNlZWZmNWUtMDJlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JwiLqzDShOjdlHeh6Xye_c82zdtLLL7sbEWFXsyipQg=)

This election is about doing right by the American people.

Right now, under the control of extreme MAGA Republicans, we have a Congress that’s more focused on political stunts than problem-solving.

You deserve better, friend.

**House Democrats continue our efforts to deliver for everyday Americans, put People Over Politics and work on the issues that matter most.**

We can’t do it without your help. Now, more than ever, I need to know that my strongest supporters are behind me and will defend our progress.

clean_body: | = = Folks, I’m about to hit the very first End of Quarter Deadline of this election year and it would mean so much if you’d split a donation between Dr. Raul Ruiz and me. This is my first major deadline of this election year. We must prove our people-powered movement can take on the extreme MAGA Republicans. = = FOR: YOU (dpwillis67@gmail.com) = I know it won’t be easy to reclaim the House and bring common sense back to Congress. Grassroots Democrats led the charge to defy history and beat back the predicted “red wave” in the last election. I know you can help me take back the House. = This election is about doing right by the American people. Right now, under the control of extreme MAGA Republicans, we have a Congress that’s more focused on political stunts than problem-solving. You deserve better, friend. House Democrats continue our efforts to deliver for everyday Americans, put People Over Politics and work on the issues that matter most. We can’t do it without your help. Now, more than ever, I need to know that my strongest supporters are behind me and will defend our progress. | Team — Here’s a long email about what happens in just over 24 hours: Our team here at the California Democratic Party are **_required by law_** to submit all of our fundraising numbers from January to March to the Federal Election Commission after 11:59pm tomorrow. Once that data is fully processed, it is publicly available online for **_everyone_** and **_anyone_** to review it. And — because control of the U.S. House is going to be decided here in California — you better believe that top Republican operatives will be hitting **_“REFRESH”_** on that page until our report is live and they can pore over every detail of our grassroots fundraising operation. _If Republicans see vulnerabilities, say, regions where our donations are going down, they will be ready to pounce on the closest tossup districts and mobilize dark money to overwhelm our operations._ **Listen, that’s why we are aiming to raise $6,750 more from generous supporters in 95811.** We don’t want Republicans to see vulnerabilities and short circuit all our work in our critical tossup districts — especially as we work to mobilize sooner than ever to take back the house. **[So what do you say? clean_body: required by law to submit our fundraising numbers | = | Team — Here’s a long email about what happens in just over 24 hours: Our team here at the California Democratic Party are required by law to submit all of our fundraising numbers from January to March to the Federal Election Commission after 11:59pm tomorrow. Once that data is fully processed, it is publicly available online for everyone and anyone to review it. And — because control of the U.S. House is going to be decided here in California — you better believe that top Republican operatives will be hitting “REFRESH” on that page until our report is live and they can pore over every detail of our grassroots fundraising operation. If Republicans see vulnerabilities, say, regions where our donations are going down, they will be ready to pounce on the closest tossup districts and mobilize dark money to overwhelm our operations. Listen, that’s why we are aiming to raise $6,750 more from generous supporters in 95811. We don’t want Republicans to see vulnerabilities and short circuit all our work in our critical tossup districts — especially as we work to mobilize sooner than ever to take back the house. = = = = = = Thank you, \- The whole team at the California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. name: Lucas
subject: Josh Hawley is not a normal guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This is so weird, Peter.
#
Josh Hawley is not a normal guy, Peter.
**He’s obsessed with using his power to control how the rest of us live our lives.**
Last year, he published a whole book about “Manhood,” lecturing men about how they should be made in his own creepy image. Now, he’s crusading against reproductive rights across the spectrum, from abortion to birth control to IVF.
**It’s weird, it’s creepy, and I’ll never be able to understand it.**

clean_body: We pulled the records of our top supporters, and here's what we saw for you: | | | Peter -- we’ll be upfront. Donald Trump has clinched the GOP nomination, and national polling shows this race is going to be extremely close. We need a BIG surge of support ahead of tomorrow's end-of-quarter deadline to keep pace. That’s why we pulled the records of our top supporters, and here's what we saw for you: If you’ve been waiting for the best time to chip in your first $5, that time is NOW: As we move into the general election, we can’t forget who we’re up against: Donald Trump. Trump, who enacted a xenophobic Muslim Ban that he’s promising to reinstate “on Day One” if reelected. Trump, who hand-picked three Supreme Court justices he believed would overturn Roe v. Wade. And when they did, he bragged about it. Trump, who signed a $1.5 trillion tax cut bill for the rich and corporations at the expense of working families. We can defeat him again, but ONLY if we work together. And we’re counting on top supporters like you to chip in today to help us do it. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you, Biden HQ

name: Will Rollins
subject: What we learned from the primary election.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
Peter,
In just a moment, I’ll be asking you to [**_split $3 between Upset the Setup and our campaign to power us to flip CA-41._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82022841/464236261/146446798?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240330_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0M2FhMTY4LTA2ZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_jO_XX-mLAUJ0j3NHV2uMbhWgItUxur9I3kSVP6Z5z8=) But first, I want to share a few important takeaways from the March primary that highlight our momentum headed into the November election.
After combing through the results, we learned that our race in CA-41 saw higher voter turnout than anywhere else in Riverside County. Our district also saw more total Democratic votes than any other red to blue seat in California. That’s a big deal for a statewide, low-turnout election.
The good news doesn’t stop there, Peter. The Cook Political Report reaffirmed their classification of our race as a “toss-up,” and Punchbowl News is calling this the second most important race in the entire country for control of the House.
We’re wasting no time getting ready for the General Election. That means continuing to mobilize Democrats and making sure every undecided voter hears what’s at stake this election. But in a district as large as ours, these efforts can get expensive fast, which is why I’m reaching out for your support today:
[_**We’re quickly approaching our next FEC deadline, but pacing just behind where we should be in order to meet our fundraising goal. Will you split $3 between Upset the Setup and our campaign to help us stay on track?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82022842/464236262/146446798?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240330_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0M2FhMTY4LTA2ZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_jO_XX-mLAUJ0j3NHV2uMbhWgItUxur9I3kSVP6Z5z8=)

body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65306?t=6&akid=13627%2E878179%2EAFDXNq) I’m about to hit the very first End of Quarter Deadline of this election year and it would mean so much if you’d split a donation between Voter Protection Project and me.

**This is my first major deadline of this election year. We must prove our people-powered movement can take on the extreme MAGA Republicans.**

**[**To fend off Republican attacks, I need to come out of my first quarter of this year with an undeniable foundation of support. The good news is that I only need 2,000 more supporters to step up in these final 24 hours to prove we have what it takes to win. Can I count on you to split a donation between me and Voter Protection Project before our critical deadline? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65306?t=7&akid=13627%2E878179%2EAFDXNq)** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65306?t=8&akid=13627%2E878179%2EAFDXNq) **FOR: YOU**
[**Suggested Support: $10 »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65306?t=9&akid=13627%2E878179%2EAFDXNq) I know it won’t be easy to reclaim the House and bring common sense back to Congress.

**Grassroots Democrats led the charge to defy history and beat back the predicted “red wave” in the last election. I know you can help me take back the House.**

[**The truth is: it’s going to take all of us pitching in what we can to compete with extreme MAGA Republicans. I’m asking: Will you split a donation between me and Voter Protection Project before my first major deadline of the year? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65306?t=10&akid=13627%2E878179%2EAFDXNq)

This election is about doing right by the American people.

Right now, under the control of extreme MAGA Republicans, we have a Congress that’s more focused on political stunts than problem-solving.

You deserve better.

**House Democrats continue our efforts to deliver for everyday Americans, put People Over Politics and work on the issues that matter most.**

We can’t do it without your help. Now, more than ever, I need to know that my strongest supporters are behind me and will defend our progress.

That’s why I’m asking for 2,000 more donations before my first big deadline of the year.

[**With your contribution, we can build a strong grassroots foundation for victory. It would mean so much to me if I could count on your $10? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65306?t=11&akid=13627%2E878179%2EAFDXNq) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Hakeem Jeffries and Voter Protection Project will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65307?t=12&akid=13627%2E878179%2EAFDXNq)

subject: the latest out of battleground Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
Peter, I'm reaching out with an urgent update on our battleground race in Ohio:
**I’m officially up against Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate in the race experts say could decide Senate control. Now, polls show us locked in a dead heat – meaning if we lose here, it's all but guaranteed that we lose our Democratic majority.**
Unlike my megamillionaire opponent, I can't write myself a fat check. I'm running a true grassroots campaign that relies on folks like you, Peter.
**That’s why I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $750,000 before the very first quarterly FEC deadline of the election year, and I'm counting on you to help me get there.**[**_So please, Peter, will you split $3 or whatever you can spare, between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82022920/464236518/1802726541?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240330_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxMjBkNDAyLTEzZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mei1QmeYQmBt7K5eUEkZyWtUymgJ2lvRtTJxLa7sqtw=)
Look, I know what it takes to win a tough race because I've done it before. And with everything from higher wages to abortion access on the line, we have absolutely zero room for error.
That's why reaching this goal is so important. Every dollar you give goes directly towards registering voters, running TV ads, and mobilizing every last Ohioan._Simply put, your donation today will make sure we have the resources we need to win._
[_**So please, Peter, I'm personally asking: Will you split $3 or more right now between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help us reach our critical end-of-quarter goal before the FEC deadline so we can win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82022921/464236519/1802726541?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240330_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkxMjBkNDAyLTEzZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mei1QmeYQmBt7K5eUEkZyWtUymgJ2lvRtTJxLa7sqtw=)
Thanks so much for your help,
Sherrod

clean_body: Peter, I'm reaching out with an urgent update on our battleground race in Ohio: I’m officially up against Donald Trump’s handpicked candidate in the race experts say could decide Senate control. Now, polls show us locked in a dead heat – meaning if we lose here, it's all but guaranteed that we lose our Democratic majority. Unlike my megamillionaire opponent, I can't write myself a fat check. I'm running a true grassroots campaign that relies on folks like you, Peter. That’s why I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $750,000 before the very first quarterly FEC deadline of the election year, and I'm counting on you to help me get there.= Look, I know what it takes to win a tough race because I've done it before. And with everything from higher wages to abortion access on the line, we have absolutely zero room for error. That's why reaching this goal is so important. Every dollar you give goes directly towards registering voters, running TV ads, and mobilizing every last Ohioan.Simply put, your donation today will make sure we have the resources we need to win. = Thanks so much for your help, Sherrod | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. The system is set up against us — so we're electing leaders who will upset the system. Please, consider making a =. name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31421%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZgU%2fbmW39Qd7G8EVYK0UzQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31422%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jy5MBu1%2fj%2bXXOteUdaGKIA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world’s elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, “We need a ‘Great Reset’ of capitalism.” If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that’s not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we’ll send the Great Reset seminar lectures --absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c31423%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fx8PsZNgmFEQQUOv8rZ4JQ&sysid=1)

Don’t miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

| |

name: A New Direction
subject: Easter Greetings
body:
to you and your loved ones!
[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xkddie-dihkkhuuli-r/) Friend,As we gather with family and friends to celebrate Easter, we are reminded of the timeless values of hope, renewal, and faith. On behalf of all of us at A New Direction, we want to extend warm Easter greetings to you and your loved ones. In the beautiful landscape of Oregon, Easter brings with it a sense of rejuvenation and optimism. It's a time to reflect on the blessings we have received and to embrace the promise of new beginnings. As we witness nature's awakening around us, let us also renew our commitment to the values that make our communities strong and resilient.This Easter, may we find joy in the company of those we hold dear, and may the spirit of this season inspire us to work together for the betterment of our beloved state. Let us cherish the traditions that bind us and the principles that guide us, knowing that through unity and perseverance, we can overcome any challenge.As we embark on this journey of faith and fellowship, let us also remember those who may be facing hardship or uncertainty. Let us extend a hand of kindness and compassion to those in need, embodying the true spirit of Easter.From all of us at A New Direction, we wish you a blessed and joyous Easter filled with love, laughter, and cherished memories. [](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xkddie-dihkkhuuli-y/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xkddie-dihkkhuuli-j/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xkddie-dihkkhuuli-t/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xkddie-dihkkhuuli-i/) | [Preferences](https://andor.updatemyprofile.com/y-xkddie-172B6299-dihkkhuuli-d) | [Unsubscribe](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-u-xkddie-dihkkhuuli-h/)
---

name: American Update
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698133%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JgTnZ263F5xzEdR%2bXtvArw&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698134%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XysRgi4DxIjNxcuiRBTs7A&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698145%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j%2bBU1aQOy44oXmxZ5YvMRg&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698146%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WY5Q1u8ejl6Ntml4TnfGXA&sysid=1)

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: lunch?
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Imagine being a young person who woke up at three or four in the morning to drive for hours to spend a whole day sitting in class.

And not because anyone made you – or even because you’d get some extra credit or other brownie points with a professor.

**You did it voluntarily because you care so deeply about saving the lives of precious preborn babies . . . that you wanted to learn all you could about how to be as effective as possible!**

_Would you have done that when you were in your teens or early twenties?_

Well, I have a TON of pro-lifers scheduled to attend an intense _Pro-Life Political Leadership Workshop_ in Charles Town, West Virginia in just two short weeks on Saturday, April 13th.

In fact, there will be so many more young people than I originally planned for, that I’m worried I could have to start turning them away unless I can raise some resources fast.

**[Pro-Life Friend, would you please consider chipping in $25, $10, or even $5 to help us buy lunch for all our attendees](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sulirhy-duchtdja-y/)?**

I know lunch may not sound like a big deal.

But as I explained, many people travel hours to attend our schools.

And when you’re cramming so much into a one-day training – _decades worth of strategies and principles_ – having folks head out to grab a bite to eat means they’re going to miss A LOT.

We know ONE person can make a difference. _I’ve seen it time and again_.

So, YES. Serving lunch would be a big deal if you could help us pay for it!

During our _Pro-Life Political Leadership Workshop,_ our student attendees will learn:

**➔** The Real Nature of Politics – why “educating” people alone won’t result in the changes we need;
**➔** The Biggest Lie in Politics – and how the political class uses our convictions against us;
**➔** How _Students for Life Action_ is working _effectively_ in state capitals – getting bill sponsors and roll call votes regardless of current leadership; and
**➔** How to put pressure on legislators.
Pro-Life Friend, training these students now will help us mobilize them to work with the Pro-Life Movement on our journey to see Life protected and abortion ended in America.

If you could help us cover the costs of meals for our attendees at our _Pro-Life Political Leadership Workshop_ , it will continue to allow us to offer this training for free to our students, supporters, and community advocates.

Just having enough sandwiches for our dedicated student leaders makes a world of difference – _and takes one more thing I have to worry about off my plate!_

**[So, please consider a gift of $25, $10, or even just $5 to help pay for lunch for our attendees](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sulirhy-duchtdja-j/).**

**[Or, if you could give more – _like $250, $100, or $50_ – you’ll be helping us continue to host these trainings across the country](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail19.com/t/j-l-sulirhy-duchtdja-i/)!**

Thank you for all you do for Life!

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

body:

| | Dear Fellow Patriot,If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

| | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees......well, as they say, “Those were the days.”But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you.
---

| | **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z068mk2f4eb2q5viqf7evaa3rg4vgt8llv8aunco_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9pj4sph2bs)** As of March 5th, it’s official. I’m going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November.Democrat policies have brought America to its knees.There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California.Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And that’s why I’m running for Senate.**_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.**And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do.But there is no way I can pull it off without you.**[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk8fas4koktjrppcs8qi70a211en4g5httsativ8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9pj4sph2bs)** I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before.They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California...I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_.I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians.When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff...**...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,
---

subject: Some social media companies won’t let us tell you this
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zumpg3inc9oni1hukmmns5l5i2me3m8t5s39nso0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9oj4cdh2bs)

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdkgoijjc2i2djjt3mo58bu48js4c4ft8tpmnsko_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9oj4cdh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm2rg3u3sfos9f817f8kf6i0t16vi8n18sn4q0kg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9pb4cdh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z38fn81fkj05an57ia48m3763voue00tgmtku70g_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9pb4cdh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmu37kpmpcbre10furqpq43l98136dn7eqelv968_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9pb4cdh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. name: Steve Garvey
subject: Strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

| |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlhl4pu5h4slmahcb5pmo1pljk6hdaaugrq1qs90_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9pj0clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees......well, as they say, “Those were the days.”But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7amsv4ega756q7efe82mvmlsecou0a43goqnle0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9pj0clh2bs)
---
| | **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt4knmvv2oq3r4f53892pr3hhnfooorfrd2d105g_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9pj0clh2bs)** As of March 5th, it’s official. I’m going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November.Democrat policies have brought America to its knees.There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California.Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And that’s why I’m running for Senate.**_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.**And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do.But there is no way I can pull it off without you.**[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdnvl5mthv5ohktujuk1b3lvvc7gmr5hlkrkr4fo_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9pj0clh2bs)** I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before.They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California...I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_.I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians.When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff...**...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkoleqmlm5n419r7hdtjn131mmt58009oi6hkn98_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9pj0clh2bs)
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---

name: 1600 Daily
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpat59gc4kqn8cv1env6a13967pe1j4on1r10jb8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9oj5c1h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhk7asr114m8ekrsftb63s1lm2qqq42rpkl5dsr8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9oj5c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmg1mr3snudvpsodmk9k7s18rkk2q4s1rmpul99o_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3jm9oj5c1h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: “...Sentenced to prison”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Our once Free Republic is DEAD...

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr7mjqfpe8a85ls0mmsddbmj4cj0m7jeo102u8a0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34c3ge4o72cjh2bs)
---
**_A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP_**
---
Friend,
---
There's no other way to say this... **You may truly be my only hope.**
---
**_The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON!_**
---
The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic.
---
**_And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list._**
---
During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but __you__ , Friend.
---

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Big government can't win against strong families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698142%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uwf0Q5chSFcZKkfK1qSz0A&sysid=1 "Tuttle Twins")
It seems more and more that the family is under relentless attack in the media

Friend,

It seems more and more that the family is under relentless attack in the media, in politics, in schools, and within the legal system.

**_The institution of the family itself is under siege_.**

Nearly everywhere I look, I can find examples of anti-family messaging.

This is not an accident. It’s deliberate coordination. **The family unit is the foundation of liberty and the first bastion against the overreach of governmental powers.**

Michael Novak summed it up well when he said, _“Between the omnipotent State and the naked individual looms the first line of resistance against totalitarianism: the economically and politically independent family.”_

_The fight for freedom and individuality becomes not just important but imperative_.

**And here’s my plan:**

I created _The Tuttle Twins_ a decade ago. It is a book series that introduces kids of all ages (and many of their parents!) to the ideas of freedom using fun storytelling and beautiful illustrations. Together, the twins learn about freedom, free markets, and constitutional values.

I want to distribute _The Tuttle Twins_ books to **EVERY** school in the nation. That’s my dream. So far, we’ve distributed over 5 MILLION copies.

**[Can you donate $10, $20, $50, or even $100 today to place Tuttle Twins books in schools, libraries, and with families? Each $10 raised helps us distribute a book. Please click here to donate any amount today>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698143%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0WGHxf%2by%2ffxAHmFNfjY4UQ&sysid=1)**

[Donate $20 And Distribute 2 Books](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698255%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7QCWLRNfigoeZSW5WGypRw&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 And Distribute 5 Books](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698256%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GoIJ6TloVwwXHho8XVTmGA&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 And Distribute 10 Books](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698257%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nF5L85IDi%2bOPfo%2fmba4GlA&sysid=1)

[Donate $250 And Distribute 25 Books](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698258%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vEm8S8Qs08SeGDGBaUToyQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 And Distribute 50 Books](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ytkVRzqJr9iitIPuBL5zfw&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 And Distribute 100 Books](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698250%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PmqgjXHE0xuV2IRXcX%2bvkg&sysid=1)

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698142%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uwf0Q5chSFcZKkfK1qSz0A&sysid=1)
Today, with the encroachment of government overreach into nearly every aspect of our lives, strengthening our families against these ideologies is critical.

Parents like myself bear a unique responsibility to safeguard future generations.

We must provide our children with an education that broadens their minds and fortifies their moral integrity, shielding them from authoritarian influences.

_It is within this independent family structure that the seeds of resistance against any form of totalitarian control are sown and nurtured_.

Ronald Reagan once said, _“Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.”_

The way to keep the next generation fighting for liberty is by educating them on free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility through _The Tuttle Twins_.

**I am humbly asking for your immediate support in distributing another 1,700 books this month. Please select an amount below to rush your support.**

[Donate $10 And Distribute 1 Book](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698251%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PLs%2fsSWDueINiqLaCwLi7A&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 And Distribute 10 Books](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698257%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nF5L85IDi%2bOPfo%2fmba4GlA&sysid=1)

[Donate $250 And Distribute 25 Books](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698258%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vEm8S8Qs08SeGDGBaUToyQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 And Distribute 50 Books](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ytkVRzqJr9iitIPuBL5zfw&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 And Distribute 100 Books](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698250%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PmqgjXHE0xuV2IRXcX%2bvkg&sysid=1)

Friend, parents, like myself, are the protectors of future generations.

We hold a special duty to provide our children with an education that both broadens their minds and strengthens their moral integrity, shielding them from the influence of authoritarian beliefs.

**_Today's children will defend liberty against the State's efforts to influence future generations_.**

Your support is vital in enabling us to empower families to take charge of their children's education, instilling in them the wisdom and courage to resist oppressive forces.

[Donate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698252%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jJysx7Os20qbxuSx3WYbng&sysid=1)

[Through your generosity, you're not only helping us publish this impactful work but also supporting our broader mission of family empowerment.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c698253%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r836QHn9vVKMoX06V1VzyA&sysid=1)

Thank you for your unwavering support.

Connor Boyack
President, Libertas Institute
Author, Tuttle Twins

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkL2K5DAQhJ9Gzsa0Wm3ZDhwcDL7k5s5McqGQR22PGPmHtpZl336Z_ck3_Kii-Kj_F3fxMcV1_usX7qYkTg4ni6Pd5-M088ri8yYOAekE5mS0wyJ0oNtAVHCna62b2gJCce9YW4vB2LriqQamBs1ITC3QiPbmsYjdcweM0VCThapECGgDNRW16FvTKAKfWHI5CXPYFr-GFEeW_Ca8b5LL27YUqbvnvB_K_FLYK-yzPErhcdvy4uXBOa7zs6ew99Pkbsr02zSxuBiUOWuNCu0z-MQK4YuPlxGVOQ__hmH43VRgQCO568X1f67u27uQLuyvMaV42FoRzIuP6cMq__C99wAAAP__HehyHQ) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkL2K5DAQhJ9Gzsa0Wm3ZDhwcDL7k5s5McqGQR22PGPmHtpZl336Z_ck3_Kii-Kj_F3fxMcV1_usX7qYkTg4ni6Pd5-M088ri8yYOAekE5mS0wyJ0oNtAVHCna62b2gJCce9YW4vB2LriqQamBs1ITC3QiPbmsYjdcweM0VCThapECGgDNRW16FvTKAKfWHI5CXPYFr-GFEeW_Ca8b5LL27YUqbvnvB_K_FLYK-yzPErhcdvy4uXBOa7zs6ew99Pkbsr02zSxuBiUOWuNCu0z-MQK4YuPlxGVOQ__hmH43VRgQCO568X1f67u27uQLuyvMaV42FoRzIuP6cMq__C99wAAAP__HehyHQ) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyMkL2K5DAQhJ9Gzsa0Wm3ZDhwcDL7k5s5McqGQR22PGPmHtpZl336Z_ck3_Kii-Kj_F3fxMcV1_usX7qYkTg4ni6Pd5-M088ri8yYOAekE5mS0wyJ0oNtAVHCna62b2gJCce9YW4vB2LriqQamBs1ITC3QiPbmsYjdcweM0VCThapECGgDNRW16FvTKAKfWHI5CXPYFr-GFEeW_Ca8b5LL27YUqbvnvB_K_FLYK-yzPErhcdvy4uXBOa7zs6ew99Pkbsr02zSxuBiUOWuNCu0z-MQK4YuPlxGVOQ__hmH43VRgQCO568X1f67u27uQLuyvMaV42FoRzIuP6cMq__C99wAAAP__HehyHQ). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. body:
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ng_lULy2ZNMUCYl4D49f5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRn66pcP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEvxQJZlAEX99SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Rebecca drove 25 hours across our nation to attend the January 6th Rally in 2021. Three years later, she faces three years in federal prison and fines of up to $200,000. Why? [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ng_lULy2ZNMUCYl4D49f5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRn66pcP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEvxQJZlAEX99SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Patriot,

Rebecca Lavrenz is a registered nurse and mother proud of her six grandchildren and one great-grandson.

She is a patriot who loves her country and will fight for it peacefully.

Rebecca drove 25 hours across our nation to attend the January 6th Rally in 2021.

Three years later, she faces three years in federal prison and fines of up to $200,000.

Why? She walked into the Nation's Capital for 10 minutes. She followed a crowd who stepped in without police telling them to stop. She said nothing while in the building and damaged nothing. She prayed to "bring God inside the Capitol" with her presence and prayers.

My name is John Pierce, and I represent Rebecca and over 30 other January 6th defendants **[who need your help](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ng_lULy2ZNMUCYl4D49f5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRn66pcP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEvxQJZlAEX99SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA).**

My organization, the National Constitutional Law Union, has been fighting for these Americans on shoestring budgets for years while facing the unstoppable Goliath, the Department of Justice.

Biden's DOJ is making us fight every step of the way. They refuse to produce discovery and the 302s of the FBI's interviews related to Rebecca's case. A 302 is a form used by the FBI to summarize an interview, and since they don't record interviews to protect themselves, the 302 is a key piece of evidence needed to vindicate my client.

And the DOJ and FBI do this regularly, requiring me to ask a judge to compel them to produce evidence that should have been handed over before trial.

Why do they do this?

To wear me out. The more filings and hearings needed to defend these Americans add to the expense and time. We have limited resources, and as you know, our Department of Justice has no limit to what it's willing to spend to imprison any American who stepped foot on Capital grounds on January 6th.

Rebecca Lavrenz did no harm and is a victim of Biden's zealous mission to send one message to the American people. That message is this: "NEVER stand up to your government!"

But their message is falling on deaf ears, and **[I need your help to send a message right back to them](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ng_lULy2ZNMUCYl4D49f5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRn66pcP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEvxQJZlAEX99SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** by saving this Christian grandmother from federal prison.

**[Will you chip in today to help cover our costs in defending Rebecca and over 30 other patriots?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ng_lULy2ZNMUCYl4D49f5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRn66pcP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEvxQJZlAEX99SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Rebecca's trial is right around the corner, and I need to cover airline travel for myself and my staff along with hotel rooms for weeks--as long as it takes.

**[Any amount you can donate is greatly appreciated.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ng_lULy2ZNMUCYl4D49f5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRn66pcP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEvxQJZlAEX99SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

**[Please donate whatever you can afford and pray for Rebecca and her family as the trial nears.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ng_lULy2ZNMUCYl4D49f5A~~/AARclAA~/RgRn66pcP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1BRlItMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEvxQJZlAEX99SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

** In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union
