subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/74GCDG63SNxCdftOWNbgow~~/AARclAA~/RgRn67hsP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUwMzAxMjRfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjQwMzMxVwNzcGNCCmYERCMJZljIed5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/74GCDG63SNxCdftOWNbgow~~/AARclAA~/RgRn67hsP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUwMzAxMjRfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjQwMzMxVwNzcGNCCmYERCMJZljIed5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/74GCDG63SNxCdftOWNbgow~~/AARclAA~/RgRn67hsP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUwMzAxMjRfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjQwMzMxVwNzcGNCCmYERCMJZljIed5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/74GCDG63SNxCdftOWNbgow~~/AARclAA~/RgRn67hsP0RmaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTImYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBHODUwMzAxMjRfUk1fVUNOXzIwMjQwMzMxVwNzcGNCCmYERCMJZljIed5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2N6G8jW9fQKgG1HFxdSWHg~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2N6G8jW9fQKgG1HFxdSWHg~~/AARclAA~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2N6G8jW9fQKgG1HFxdSWHg~~/AARclAA~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Beat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

| |
---
| | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU2L5CAYhH-NuRn0VdPmkEPPptPMoZdlArNHMfomLeQLNTPsv1_Czt7n-kAV9VC_H-ZhwxzW6addsAkpmZjM4M1kI_U40uSeYRwNMJCUCSq4gcI3CrgedYENv3CuNVSKF8_GK-W09s5dBlGDrC_SWwWAoEZWW9RFaM4eJgRnWtZSl4whWDHoStSCg3VEsmP3NmMZ1hQ8Jrdt-77NIQeXyi1Oxdw8c94TEVcCHYEuoTsilp9hjehLty0ny_iBdLLxA__QcYv0SDThajMS6BQOcmSgK1VBzRwjojvyYtJ2RIdEtC_tnb7d3glUJ17Qh2Mhor09voizy27DtBLR_pNhlXlp76a__7ia9tqDebu9m19X-tr3X5HsiGhf-57-ty9i4_fPMM8hVRci2bTYMJ_ji_y9C_4GAAD__0KSiDU)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot,If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America’s baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees......well, as they say, “Those were the days.”But this email isn’t about baseball. In fact, it’s a email I never thought I’d be writing to you.
---
| [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU2L5CAYhH-NuRn0VdPmkEPPptPMoZdlArNHMfomLeQLNTPsv1_Czt7n-kAV9VC_H-ZhwxzW6addsAkpmZjM4M1kI_U40uSeYRwNMJCUCSq4gcI3CrgedYENv3CuNVSKF8_GK-W09s5dBlGDrC_SWwWAoEZWW9RFaM4eJgRnWtZSl4whWDHoStSCg3VEsmP3NmMZ1hQ8Jrdt-77NIQeXyi1Oxdw8c94TEVcCHYEuoTsilp9hjehLty0ny_iBdLLxA__QcYv0SDThajMS6BQOcmSgK1VBzRwjojvyYtJ2RIdEtC_tnb7d3glUJ17Qh2Mhor09voizy27DtBLR_pNhlXlp76a__7ia9tqDebu9m19X-tr3X5HsiGhf-57-ty9i4_fPMM8hVRci2bTYMJ_ji_y9C_4GAAD__0KSiDU)
---
| | **[Today, I’m asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU2L5CAYhH-NuRn0VdPmkEPPptPMoZdlArNHMfomLeQLNTPsv1_Czt7n-kAV9VC_H-ZhwxzW6addsAkpmZjM4M1kI_U40uSeYRwNMJCUCSq4gcI3CrgedYENv3CuNVSKF8_GK-W09s5dBlGDrC_SWwWAoEZWW9RFaM4eJgRnWtZSl4whWDHoStSCg3VEsmP3NmMZ1hQ8Jrdt-77NIQeXyi1Oxdw8c94TEVcCHYEuoTsilp9hjehLty0ny_iBdLLxA__QcYv0SDThajMS6BQOcmSgK1VBzRwjojvyYtJ2RIdEtC_tnb7d3glUJ17Qh2Mhor09voizy27DtBLR_pNhlXlp76a__7ia9tqDebu9m19X-tr3X5HsiGhf-57-ty9i4_fPMM8hVRci2bTYMJ_ji_y9C_4GAAD__0KSiDU)** As of March 5th, it’s official. I’m going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November.Democrat policies have brought America to its knees.There’s fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California.Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don’t care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I’d go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent.And that’s why I’m running for Senate.**_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970’s Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.**And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do.But there is no way I can pull it off without you.**[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU2L5CAYhH-NuRn0VdPmkEPPptPMoZdlArNHMfomLeQLNTPsv1_Czt7n-kAV9VC_H-ZhwxzW6addsAkpmZjM4M1kI_U40uSeYRwNMJCUCSq4gcI3CrgedYENv3CuNVSKF8_GK-W09s5dBlGDrC_SWwWAoEZWW9RFaM4eJgRnWtZSl4whWDHoStSCg3VEsmP3NmMZ1hQ8Jrdt-77NIQeXyi1Oxdw8c94TEVcCHYEuoTsilp9hjehLty0ny_iBdLLxA__QcYv0SDThajMS6BQOcmSgK1VBzRwjojvyYtJ2RIdEtC_tnb7d3glUJ17Qh2Mhor09voizy27DtBLR_pNhlXlp76a__7ia9tqDebu9m19X-tr3X5HsiGhf-57-ty9i4_fPMM8hVRci2bTYMJ_ji_y9C_4GAAD__0KSiDU)** I’ve lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you –- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I’ve never seen before.They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California...I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_.I’m fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I’m not just taking the field for Californians.When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff...**...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,
---
| | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkU2L5CAYhH-NuRn0VdPmkEPPptPMoZdlArNHMfomLeQLNTPsv1_Czt7n-kAV9VC_H-ZhwxzW6addsAkpmZjM4M1kI_U40uSeYRwNMJCUCSq4gcI3CrgedYENv3CuNVSKF8_GK-W09s5dBlGDrC_SWwWAoEZWW9RFaM4eJgRnWtZSl4whWDHoStSCg3VEsmP3NmMZ1hQ8Jrdt-77NIQeXyi1Oxdw8c94TEVcCHYEuoTsilp9hjehLty0ny_iBdLLxA__QcYv0SDThajMS6BQOcmSgK1VBzRwjojvyYtJ2RIdEtC_tnb7d3glUJ17Qh2Mhor09voizy27DtBLR_pNhlXlp76a__7ia9tqDebu9m19X-tr3X5HsiGhf-57-ty9i4_fPMM8hVRci2bTYMJ_ji_y9C_4GAAD__0KSiDU)

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jbdMLGyr6vrIr6TgeqPyxw~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jbdMLGyr6vrIr6TgeqPyxw~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/jbdMLGyr6vrIr6TgeqPyxw~~/AARclAA~~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation

name: Russell Prescott
subject: Wishing you a Happy Easter!
body:
\- - -|
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iqKPazsmLqHz6dAQkDawO17_6qisTeyX1WL6FEO7X3fifvlw_XmSuAVWU-6blkt0kdgGbn6W0H5-ZC6dJV9oL1oCcU0N5V4RS58UpctgtE32XtW3Z-rSuueJZyi_ATl34BSXMUsTqE4NKe2KywFfcoRexZ7mvNlA&c=RfhpqdIfRdouFKjQKO9M99mUrCd-CQjM8dhKYRKNKH-F0-UFhaHWtA==&ch=qJ_dv0TlgRZwCALTp0AlTS7hCcSj12UzWuDD9QuaTMcuJ4l5zgnfrw==)
---
| Happy Easter, Peter!

As we celebrate this day of resurrection and new beginnings, I extend my warmest wishes to you and your family.
On this day, we are reminded that even in our darkest moments, there is always hope, and through faith, we can find the strength to overcome any challenge.
May this Easter be a time of joy, peace, and blessings for you and your family.
May you find comfort in the promise of new beginnings and the unwavering presence of hope in your life.
God Bless,

---

---
| A note from Russell...
The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington.
Thank you.
-Russell

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2e98f8c5382496cbc937fbc92ee01ae&_e=aoS9wgsJAHCdEzAuTfU06N60jeadSeA9_6BkoThsvPuq4iG4-Nb3xlzuj6NRAfSxfTuF10AlHY7iu2MqQeXVyVAEfX2rYuEA3vEJkdon46hV7oF8vDpu9oF9MVN1izlLMPQOsYB4gaAivPP2hxko2nE7rpjV1Z-u1MiFXIPydRKZTGFM-NRsYFzntjlLyCD98HRbQH977G_qeEvSWVkGrPKtjTrR233WLshO4Ed1WiSiswryXCPvCxLheAbiv5VVvGdGH75P6XpyU6gaKt191mgXeucDHaLIDdP-S4VqEfheMoOUX3GvrwkNX4YL33ZUSyDfYfNZg23tprXPTbKhHrtidLlSwtRmDSWRGf6o_tSDbNRvTGODlfDwtsv4H-CAY7GwS0Uh5J1p6Px1I_mHHA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2e98f8c5382496cbc937fbc92ee01ae&_e=aoS9wgsJAHCdEzAuTfU06N60jeadSeA9_6BkoThsvPuq4iG4-Nb3xlzuj6NRAfSxfTuF10AlHY7iu2MqQeXVyVAEfX2rYuEA3vEJkdon46hV7oF8vDpu9oF9MVN1izlLMPQOsYB4gaAivPP2hxko2nE7rpjV1Z-u1MiFXIPydRKZTGFM-NRsYFzntjlLyCD98HRbQH977G_qeEvSWVkGrPKtjTrR233WLshO4Ed1WiSiswryXCPvCxLheAbiv5VVIJt2A2CHEr-o5P3444KpVOD1y7-CulQII2ZFPgPowMfXyQszFFNLq_v8I5n_LXuBpLe6WvVviNbNyHOqRlXfHiCR9Qjll5lCwJWcJPg9oOZLHFdSz9GAoCn6-QG_c2GhAQuidRJ8Qfn-3R_aZoCdgQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d2e98f8c5382496cbc937fbc92ee01ae&_e=aoS9wgsJAHCdEzAuTfU06N60jeadSeA9_6BkoThsvPuq4iG4-Nb3xlzuj6NRAfSxfTuF10AlHY7iu2MqQeXVyVAEfX2rYuEA3vEJkdon46hV7oF8vDpu9oF9MVN1izlLMPQOsYB4gaAivPP2hxko2nE7rpjV1Z-u1MiFXIPydRKZTGFM-NRsYFzntjlLyCD98HRbQH977G_qeEvSWVkGrPKtjTrR233WLshO4Ed1WiSiswryXCPvCxLheAbiv5VVvvIj-Vg09HkBIMc8M4v1u9MahoYSxeeYDXcvtNktmwzngvl1aAM4cghb6ma9xWsS6yiReGiqksNSds1KTOYeMJiBksgd1UyDxt1O3lMCNS_LOYXAwLlS61-42YEA4HETsUcLjXgK8vjLdkLeg3v1Yg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=d2e98f8c5382496cbc937fbc92ee01ae&_t=jNYSxgURKyVpempn3S4iawpcxoHLVZKLXhuNbc20LsLH2ARX9tfAtaaTsjYG7r7NF4YcWQ2NeZi3bGW7POJafi5JsXFZAFpEb9KA1tx0zkBE0qYIA0mHvaxQHiVkyFX6GchkWmCVB1MjMFFHJsRr1pWPnUIodpeZbiYYANVfLpY%3D)

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fc84b43cb1ae4e2e837c379495133de5&_e=1NbRL5TtcqArPfEFcrnZCwR8dtLpYK6ylQlxatB2lVMbEo_YhMsMNF0_meKgtVhCu-fZ0lM9_2FdIMgvdDjzIR-Zuw1Z19VvEl0jXCjmUGrzUhgA8_7kUch_zRUjq4aGeytNtjO99W6VzDKZ7waxBNFVAHKzmFg8pNE8852mgetBVum7QNFs0ufHQt_7Pt5sNacwww72nEs6onG5xWtqtx77BsfXjnAlJchfd7M6gTVZyp5jPcoqSnfVryhiPwDjXbp7DOm9pvSlQZLDPcBdF58MRmHKsRYBy_DxmHPai063oxWBr1TQHVH-FUj3Zek9OQqqrEiNiC7euiCAS8TQhxyh05i5sLP2MqsQLNXyUAW3SCBZahJ5H2TPUHVFm4e5IhsSbDAoOoioMb6Gwu3oTg%3D%3D)
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fc84b43cb1ae4e2e837c379495133de5&_e=1NbRL5TtcqArPfEFcrnZCwR8dtLpYK6ylQlxatB2lVMbEo_YhMsMNF0_meKgtVhCu-fZ0lM9_2FdIMgvdDjzIR-Zuw1Z19VvEl0jXCjmUGrzUhgA8_7kUch_zRUjq4aGeytNtjO99W6VzDKZ7waxBNFVAHKzmFg8pNE8852mgetBVum7QNFs0ufHQt_7Pt5sNacwww72nEs6onG5xWtqtx77BsfXjnAlJchfd7M6gTVZyp5jPcoqSnfVryhiPwDjK76W10u_n_hw6kcZpNG0UtU7emvcdXBxst1F8fNOLWTM9iIi4FzgxRhIjXbAYONkvh0xfaV9ilT0mHhL72QD5nk4GA9jB_mmAk5D6klcSs6yDeIGfEzU9Dyk9cAXg9e50hTvzS3ttjo1w_NcFeTPPQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Happy Easter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Today, we celebrate God’s gift of eternal life to all who believe. Read more >>
| | | Peter,
I just wanted to send a brief message wishing you a safe and Happy Easter! For me, Easter Sunday is always a special time to attend church, spend time with loved ones, and enjoy a big family meal. Most importantly, Easter is the day we remember Christ’s sacrifice on the cross, His glorious resurrection, and His gift of salvation.
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/ae88ab0f397ffde03947229f28c3afba/5baa3bb8341a2639c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
On this day, I’m reminded of one of my favorite Bible verses, John 3:16: _“For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.”_ Peter, I hope you and your family have a wonderful Easter Sunday! \- Coach Tuberville
---
| | Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc.
---
| | id: 2024-03-07-15:14:59:361t
---

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It's no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=341b8cebe54a408b9a68a11a9a763405&_e=egL96695X7LvyNrVHJCC0jh3jVuThHPDl1yuaAkjdVvRdzNoqwmRpPT-cSRcFGW-c9jRIoqKkfstT5UOf0swOr9Vi28MMaxB5biZGJgSACM92wy3tSU6DXQhuThZnxXfHL_aFp6IMCUBmnXKMsvwTYQfjs1pZlbysbVDotXMrMeVYjX8sRJvgy7hi9IQigc5gqp8x-9JgGK-AI5AAcDjuTSh1OpNEDkAPkhFqYvS9mp5DcRsDhLWEZg3BPvJhxWbmlxkDcu4Rlic0rPaUrdDmvIwIBrJxdJ3cvKgva-rkmkOmJEj7cunBaIlQRUrTUH8P1yXIU8xD_IEZDx1Qz2T_6xLMb4r7KH4MNz-7WLKSZY5rFGrGaM6wYyTrVFPpYgMdXt5xfR4XUjZ-C5FG1TnqKlsHOEQI4xykHtp5TuKNa3IukAacTV6TJP3_nuoHasX)

body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cade05cf98a9418c95262bfbc2f103d2&_e=IJ_tJOG3dMTRvVtWPrnl_hl2HWOwyLaA-XraH-NSyilnpNTjZNcJKhRIruTiDQBZSXwrvKGOXBuZcTJMR4oDeYEHWw1hWotOC-ys7jbB8E6HUq-WnKqWADc8TMOS3wn_MAgbqseXwuXQXUa2H85ergGgO-10NrM7Mwer2nZm59zDthd2f4VsS5oIttLGfEdguZYAbVYmU_0FX8u-z8IdN7ENUUgA2DA7SgFOXqAtHInldwecb9eP93J_8dNskbbiyOTfOhEsP6CWkRD6tRYvDdO1Dg1odb8u7s1c-FJTboT7npdGEiU4UHLIcKftKaow) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cade05cf98a9418c95262bfbc2f103d2&_e=IJ_tJOG3dMTRvVtWPrnl_hl2HWOwyLaA-XraH-NSyilnpNTjZNcJKhRIruTiDQBZSXwrvKGOXBuZcTJMR4oDeYEHWw1hWotOC-ys7jbB8E6HUq-WnKqWADc8TMOS3wn_MAgbqseXwuXQXUa2H85erl-o7zHsaIyVpunelnNPNDdLPZD4yrFLT4CElp7HKLRXi-Ms9kcQXiBKMy0qHf7SLI8GLTHdtM3dzLbD27MQ9XpYowoW1_tXtj4Whcec1lV4olmpK_xGx1mDmb_Dgg0ujC3K4D39PwV21_Lxd7ReLRzpb04EK7l_mFJ2F3KGFk1W) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cade05cf98a9418c95262bfbc2f103d2&_e=IJ_tJOG3dMTRvVtWPrnl_hl2HWOwyLaA-XraH-NSyilnpNTjZNcJKhRIruTiDQBZSXwrvKGOXBuZcTJMR4oDeYEHWw1hWotOC-ys7jbB8E6HUq-WnKqWADc8TMOS3wn_MAgbqseXwuXQXUa2H85ernIlubPHs4T7MVAnP0YIMUnt1fLvliQZDelwCx8U2IE9FBJSYtRfv0EwVkl2u99Gf9jsjAv7LXDDlU33wDl912X2xCyoKl1iNfV99z7LGrb5M3Wij8L8H-_dkhxNJI7bdpYlNKo_kBknAIfrGuOOBq79UB_myKJ6UY3PDmoy1pu1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs... FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. And then BOOM! Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out. Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. name: Janelle Stelson
subject: I can’t look vulnerable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson
body:
Let me tell you a story about why I decided to run for Congress.

| | Let me tell you a story about why I decided to run for Congress. For the past 38 years, I was a TV news anchor, telling the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I reported on the brokenness of our healthcare system and told the stories of families who couldn’t afford their utility bills. I spent 38 years putting a spotlight on injustice every chance I got. Then I saw something that horrified me. **On January 6th, 2021 and the days following, I saw our Congressman Scott Perry inciting unrest, spreading conspiracy theories, and plotting to overturn our votes.** I’m running for Congress because we deserve better. But right now, I am up against the most important deadline of this campaign so far— **the first FEC deadline of 2024.** I set out to raise $25,000 before tonight at midnight but I’m still behind. Will you donate right now with this special link my team has customized just for you? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/js-eoq-mar24?dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82023682/464238037/177767364?dpwillis67@gmail.com&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_033124_2_11_EOQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE3OWNiNmQtNDVlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TQJqNEB1tUo7hYP4fbmATZEU-A86RYV_HJq36rfg-lA=)** It is critical that I meet that goal. Why? Because after midnight on Sunday, dark money groups and big-shot Republican donors will be able to see how much I raised and **if I look vulnerable, they are going to pour even more money into Scott Perry’s campaign.** We cannot let that happen. With only hours left until my deadline, will you make a donation now? Any amount counts: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/js-eoq-mar24?dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82023689/464238041/177767364?dpwillis67@gmail.com&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_033124_2_11_EOQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmE3OWNiNmQtNDVlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TQJqNEB1tUo7hYP4fbmATZEU-A86RYV_HJq36rfg-lA=)** We have a real shot at flipping not just PA-10 but flipping the House blue, but I cannot do it without your help. I’m counting on you. —Janelle

name: David Hogg
subject: 2024 endorsements inside →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Check out the full list of endorsements now.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb8544b78-5254-46a9-8c13-612c9d5182f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| Peter, In November, we elected our first endorsed candidate when Nadarius Clark won his election to the Virginia Assembly. But like we said then, that race was not the finish line. Our work electing the next generation of leaders is just getting started. Today, we’re super excited to reveal our first slate of 2024 endorsed candidates! [**But first, can you split $25 to Blue Amp Action and Leaders We Deserve before the end-of-quarter deadline and help elect bold new leaders in November?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf74d10ed-3d79-44b0-93e0-eee378cb9dbc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08d4586f-83f9-4e70-92f2-f070fe1f8218/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Sarah McBride (U.S. Congress – Delaware, At Large)**
Sarah McBride has been a results-driven, powerhouse lawmaker in the Delaware State Senate. She passed paid family and medical leave, which was the largest expansion of Delaware’s social safety net in decades. If she wins this race in November, she would be the first trans woman elected to the U.S. Congress. **Christine Cockley (OH HD-6 – Columbus)**
Christine Cockley has spent the last several years doing racial justice work in Columbus. Her campaign is focused on health care, gun violence prevention, raising the minimum wage, and other crucial issues for her community. If elected, Christine would be the second Jewish woman elected to the Ohio House.
**Bryce Berry (GA HD-56 – Atlanta)**
Bryce Berry is a middle school Algebra teacher in the Atlanta public school system. He is running for the Georgia legislature to bring positive change to his community. In his campaign, Bryce is fighting for economic development, education, health care, affordable housing, and solutions to rampant gun violence.
**Ashwin Ramaswami (GA SD-48 – Atlanta)**
Ashwin Ramaswami is a second-generation Indian-American immigrant who built his career in software engineering, election security, and policy research. He is taking on Republican incumbent Rep. Shawn Still, one of the fake electors who attempted to award Georgia’s electoral votes to Donald Trump instead of Joe Biden. This is one of the most flippable seats in the Georgia Senate.
**Anna Thomas (PA HD-137 – South Central PA)**
Anna Thomas is a former school board member and education advocate who is running for one of the most flippable seats in the Pennsylvania House this cycle. Anna lost this seat in the last election by only 703 votes. Winning this seat is critical to holding Democrats' two-seat majority in the Pennsylvania House.
**Anja Wookey-Huffman (MT HD-65 – Bozeman)**
Anja Wookey-Huffman is a working class candidate and organizer who would be a vocal force against Montana’s MAGA movement in the statehouse. She’s ready to fight for abortion rights and take on those who stand in the way of more affordable housing who have made life hard for underserved communities and women and have priced out working class Montanans.
Meeting our goals before the end-of-quarter deadline will help us to build a strong foundation of support for our 2024 Leaders We Deserve candidates. **[If you’re as pumped about these badass progressive changemakers as I am, pitch in $25 now to Blue Amp Action and Leaders We Deserve.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1c4d1441-f7ac-4103-af2e-841786cb6ca4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td583529a-167a-4714-89eb-f4a0f1e21563/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| We’ll be in touch soon with more information about our endorsed candidates and we’ll keep you updated about their races from now until November. We’re going to pour everything we can into electing these young leaders all across the country. This is exactly why we founded Leaders We Deserve — because there are young people rising up to run for office and claim their power. But they will need a strong foundation of support to break down barriers and win these pivotal races. [**Supporting these candidates is going to take a lot of resources. That’s why reaching our EOQ goal this week is absolutely vital.** **Peter, please split $25 between Blue Amp Action and Leaders We Deserve to elect the next generation of leaders!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcca902f8-97b9-434d-8046-44bc436f1d8d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you!! David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d6123da53ce4387b9eb33822e8f7f75&_e=cXcbEA_32LoV-Hf5wCn72I74moWqYC9Kc2-34k0TgH4DBamFSlJVdMj7fQA4s8g6QdRibSF9457mXeMdqO8MVztkoApdpe7fSTYWUoTqzJHFWcq3qR1HMTnp5AgX_Nvx9NgCwWo8zUuUWu_8BfhaEaxjxkR1yU8jIQJIgK7tg6P9SrimK54RaXwZrqt-XgtxnHMX4HTH80iZuDb9k0kaHrYy0B7nNuBoSQwwfKXroRvtJ_ut5jNiukl_RGWXIgyWEXuSHI3Y-6v0SPrfuWxC_NLrncjBMBO2fkdRmQ_Z4kN60dJXuXWja7IYTalHfOvMSZjKs5oj2pKKfKllzhaUu7Jmg4MrHY-QVE4xL8ivUvlvDZeO9C6Jbk0-ntUF3JJcp5EwYHE7v5v1W5dgSVGxKA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d6123da53ce4387b9eb33822e8f7f75&_e=cXcbEA_32LoV-Hf5wCn72I74moWqYC9Kc2-34k0TgH4DBamFSlJVdMj7fQA4s8g6QdRibSF9457mXeMdqO8MVztkoApdpe7fSTYWUoTqzJHFWcq3qR1HMTnp5AgX_Nvx9NgCwWo8zUuUWu_8BfhaEaxjxkR1yU8jIQJIgK7tg6P9SrimK54RaXwZrqt-XgtxnHMX4HTH80iZuDb9k0kaHrYy0B7nNuBoSQwwfKXroRvtJ_ut5jNiukl_RGWXIgyWUE_nLoTNiRZPseeMVTwkbonaSl62MQ1GUoc7dZnk9pGYtqH0SMgua9XzpkSY8yKAMrbA9NW67Wc6BMbwGN4g_IbrQ1b6y95jLMTzXQE2nnoIJsjeDWchSxMdkUAzuerzaIjwQyxC345v21uq9prkng%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d6123da53ce4387b9eb33822e8f7f75&_e=cXcbEA_32LoV-Hf5wCn72I74moWqYC9Kc2-34k0TgH4DBamFSlJVdMj7fQA4s8g6QdRibSF9457mXeMdqO8MVztkoApdpe7fSTYWUoTqzJHFWcq3qR1HMTnp5AgX_Nvx9NgCwWo8zUuUWu_8BfhaEaxjxkR1yU8jIQJIgK7tg6P9SrimK54RaXwZrqt-XgtxnHMX4HTH80iZuDb9k0kaHrYy0B7nNuBoSQwwfKXroRvtJ_ut5jNiukl_RGWXIgyWVbF9yfrwo3ddbeg7ZltxurDkHpXpXuwbTL_h0e9ZjraFt9OATY4Cr-vnSc8M9tEahEBCJlvL40_jst2_oPRu46YUlSKIF3iqpIKFFeWEuWGFO41LXYkqJb2nPxPtNsn0Zx_AUwiBOptfzCS49V-qew%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e88e1d2e49b74f6e973b45f2e3c72bbd&_e=F2b5bdgxE-dD309cQG_Z3q-93U001Uaqutfh2exfObsZ1nyTmjCyVsAg_5C-mTPFwUNkl3Pw9FgeuJQDJh7KQxGkEe7AFZMe6uCWrh7Efd5vEyNCYSFdAitc1jh6JM8SglcWwOpJ2_oUcLkGKjICrxBHL-TEm_H7o791F-xXB8UGTs67jrHQkbbeiW6I2U79y0M7_YHVw6pRRjsjmcfxavnmKho3Pde3VQS4QGv59JWUuHn8aKzOrsvY53shteWdcqMqqcwrnuhb-SS4ICsgYOH_H8NmQ1-9OpqOS6OuXkX2qmPvpoe0x1_Wru52u9Nz) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e88e1d2e49b74f6e973b45f2e3c72bbd&_e=F2b5bdgxE-dD309cQG_Z3q-93U001Uaqutfh2exfObsZ1nyTmjCyVsAg_5C-mTPFwUNkl3Pw9FgeuJQDJh7KQxGkEe7AFZMe6uCWrh7Efd5vEyNCYSFdAitc1jh6JM8SglcWwOpJ2_oUcLkGKjICr-JJscJrquyDgV1WTJdbiooNBVCFRq_RRmc3lAReRJ5-M25yExP3WrG8BVcTRsVBeGnZsk94SCmPW5FU_DdujJkAVWvv_CMS1_xZCimNNJ6tEupzHSZI7iiz6nTffz8bjZ7SADuSWHeRFy4ZfU_vpz5TCrmazn2NKrb9z5qD9Huq) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e88e1d2e49b74f6e973b45f2e3c72bbd&_e=F2b5bdgxE-dD309cQG_Z3q-93U001Uaqutfh2exfObsZ1nyTmjCyVsAg_5C-mTPFwUNkl3Pw9FgeuJQDJh7KQxGkEe7AFZMe6uCWrh7Efd5vEyNCYSFdAitc1jh6JM8SglcWwOpJ2_oUcLkGKjICrwMgzp5mz3MuRM19jRPJ3bjcI9Ba3AYKWSPAcIumj2qH7g1HZ-zVeNtMB0gNe4_xSL-0heg2A0ekrjfkG8OPeYI_R8EWNcnHcTYpYV4g_PauerE0VHpVH6iNET-H3IzbDLt-n3_nQGhtRxRyVtJPlptREFfHLZrU8Q_vHHJg2zdD). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e88e1d2e49b74f6e973b45f2e3c72bbd&_e=F2b5bdgxE-dD309cQG_Z3q-93U001Uaqutfh2exfObsZ1nyTmjCyVsAg_5C-mTPFwUNkl3Pw9FgeuJQDJh7KQxGkEe7AFZMe6uCWrh7Efd5vEyNCYSFdAitc1jh6JM8SglcWwOpJ2_oUcLkGKjICr_wzj7kts5zGcZpwmEUpRyqKzu4p7G1VKAYiLzbvew6MHEkAXloueLtq803Qzc95G-Hdq7IqN0QBLek1PKB2poc2euQd3O_kWbSIdCOQxS7o7VMKJu5zQiBKKlTMSoYdIOuCCSgHtv39cBj8IEb4r9deuZhoGkp0QIgiaxL-d85y)

body:

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=45bc15a8cbfc4f119c51a402163efe3f&_e=b_5OUh4VdkbNlIktbYbFpfZmHZDoduWsFaPUwEdLRcyDiQG06tZQEK1_BcFOu55XmXqCI_d0lRt_u3gAm9PiLyxGg2elojkPlCYlG2__2TTNdqoc5KnarlAccBPyJgcM2xG_HeBtE5itEx4mY4VYJkN_ozMsnceWS3CEf1Eiwo56woo4Q8vVKlNxGzmxZNcSIv9x07-I-sGAvygGjbM7Myhwptc6DuLCMi7axq2o9XyJez_EMMHqN_9c2Ll-sVPlnT-njA3BZHLmPIRITLchmPLvq250ENRCfNv-uQOTFCWwSRaYv_NC7DqBIUarjV_ydSG8RTXqALAdz41PA-_zNECRYuMWG-7nSyI7jqz3BU9kHkZGOVCADsAIXTiAbFZpybWVvEaARnOzQXqo0PbmsA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

clean_body: Our once Free Republic is DEAD... | A MEMO PREPARED BY RUDY GIULIANI, FORMER ATTORNEY TO PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Friend, There's no other way to say this... You may truly be my only hope. The Biden Regime is sending a top ally of President Trump to PRISON! The Deep State is hellbent on indicting, arresting, bankrupting, and imprisoning President Trump and his top allies for daring to challenge the corrupt forces that have hijacked our once Free Republic. And as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from impeachment, I am at the top of their list. During these dark times in Biden's America, there is nowhere else to turn but you , Friend. We are not just battling for my own freedom and justice. This is about upholding the rights of every citizen who dares to challenge the status quo. If we lose this fight, we lose our Republic. When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment shortly after Joe Biden seized control of the White House, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy. But no one had any idea how much worse it was going to get... The ruling regime is attempting to turn its leading opponent and his allies into political prisoners to remain in power forever. Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what's happened to the greatest and freest nation in history. But just like President Trump, I 'm not giving up on America. I didn't give up when my home was raided or when I was wrongfully arrested and had my MUGSHOT taken in Fulton County - and there 's no way I'm backing down now. But I humbly admit I cannot win this fight all on my own. I'm counting on generous patriots like YOU to defend me at this pivotal moment. Thank you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jesse=20James=20Mullen?=
subject: Up and at 'em - Spring is here
body:
We didn't have much of a Winter, but Spring is here and we're bearing down for a hard campaign | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/up-and-at-em-spring-is-here?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=4577cd535e&e=805e709ff8)
Hey team, it’s Jesse James,
It's time to wake up; we’re in campaign season.
Now that it’s certain I’m the Democratic Nominee for Secretary of State on Montana’s November ballot, we’re digging in and gearing up for what will be one of the most difficult general election races in the country.
I need your help to spread awareness about this campaign for the most important race nobody knows about. Right now, our Secretary of State is ordering county commissioners not to hire Democrats and she’s sharing letters from Republican leadership in official mailings from her office. The Secretary of State’s website is full of her campaign materials. Now she’s ordering County Clerks to record the party affiliation of election judges even though Montana doesn’t require anyone to register party affiliation.
It’s the end of March, and a [SMALL DONATION](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=36f6beec2a&e=805e709ff8), makes a [BIG DIFFERENCE!](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=701349fff6&e=805e709ff8) Help us reach our monthly goal!
[DONATE](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=bfb9a5a065&e=805e709ff8)

clean_body: We didn't have much of a Winter, but Spring is here and we're bearing down for a hard campaign | | | | | Hey team, it’s Jesse James, It's time to wake up; we’re in campaign season. Now that it’s certain I’m the Democratic Nominee for Secretary of State on Montana’s November ballot, we’re digging in and gearing up for what will be one of the most difficult general election races in the country. I need your help to spread awareness about this campaign for the most important race nobody knows about. Right now, our Secretary of State is ordering county commissioners not to hire Democrats and she’s sharing letters from Republican leadership in official mailings from her office. The Secretary of State’s website is full of her campaign materials. Now she’s ordering County Clerks to record the party affiliation of election judges even though Montana doesn’t require anyone to register party affiliation. It’s the end of March, and a , makes a Help us reach our monthly goal! We are spreading our message beyond the Democratic base. We’re reaching across the aisle and speaking with Independents, Libertarians, and Republicans. In the above picture, I’m speaking with a Republican County Commissioner at a cafe in Sidney. He had great advice to help us earn votes in Richland County. | Will you help us win this race? Please help set up a , or donate any amount you can afford. $5 makes a difference! name: Steve Garvey
subject: Defeat Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.

| |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95fc756254c74e88aa65835a22175644&_e=PRjFW38QEg9C4IljEaUgImzPfA8X-y8hkD1Vftj9tOqc9ZN37yGFdzK6nxzU021xyptFJdhSyp9fXRnRh1_7wqsKHF_f6JvP3qXinsO045AjBm3qQRkRqBMKJzy5fAFEAV2TCNGo1pUCgb9BaqxYtemMkyB4lFcEZ-Km8WA7J8FPtfLf2dcGIlknC077Ca57nw5VSmtWFbprNApdL1GgawzS9OVRqFfCuXO4UXt0xRLNXxmF36E3zVSq-jaaz4MavBDYk6snQXW6Jdq54pGL1DiI4ntbQSzMg2zoc_KZs-1dMTjud8FjCRPZh68lFvcLxehy9Tk8PsE88GcjkGBSVhZWmxjXXIJTzLrhJ7c9azvexuOc-wDtbSdhq-WDW-JqtbwU_x8O9-UqzY61Fuoteg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95fc756254c74e88aa65835a22175644&_e=PRjFW38QEg9C4IljEaUgImzPfA8X-y8hkD1Vftj9tOqc9ZN37yGFdzK6nxzU021xyptFJdhSyp9fXRnRh1_7wqsKHF_f6JvP3qXinsO045AjBm3qQRkRqBMKJzy5fAFEAV2TCNGo1pUCgb9BaqxYtemMkyB4lFcEZ-Km8WA7J8FPtfLf2dcGIlknC077Ca57nw5VSmtWFbprNApdL1GgawzS9OVRqFfCuXO4UXt0xRIzy0EIj0-Ano1kc8XHfYRLSm9LbGqfu_FqqET6tmzdjFq2kzKAUVtfXUvfA6gzcCMObrvJlU-33QqMo5JgZ9m6LDaxNKneSmDc6KKaGztvnkBUWUAp4-CKogo2XMUcSHjmogRoCnF9M06siJUgw1bpLRBU8UzkmMWe6_3IdSsVWw%3D%3D)
---
| | **[Today, I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95fc756254c74e88aa65835a22175644&_e=PRjFW38QEg9C4IljEaUgImzPfA8X-y8hkD1Vftj9tOqc9ZN37yGFdzK6nxzU021xyptFJdhSyp9fXRnRh1_7wqsKHF_f6JvP3qXinsO045AjBm3qQRkRqBMKJzy5fAFEAV2TCNGo1pUCgb9BaqxYtemMkyB4lFcEZ-Km8WA7J8FPtfLf2dcGIlknC077Ca57nw5VSmtWFbprNApdL1GgawzS9OVRqFfCuXO4UXt0xRItM7yx8eijEGh3Edu0BNCJjJml3r2FUIMoasufY87muV1DGj7GnuZKNGI9FgaG74W0Qcw6gBL3kKCq9b7CR8gxaJr0fwiLZsjjYIwBOXF6FmIsokWK9nEBTSrflTybrXYTDDVVL6A2WlNIeu8dRRhHIAxcNa1PgFWqGZaISARPkg%3D%3D)** As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. **_We Republicans_ pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. **[**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign of $35 or more today?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95fc756254c74e88aa65835a22175644&_e=PRjFW38QEg9C4IljEaUgImzPfA8X-y8hkD1Vftj9tOqc9ZN37yGFdzK6nxzU021xyptFJdhSyp9fXRnRh1_7wqsKHF_f6JvP3qXinsO045AjBm3qQRkRqBMKJzy5fAFEAV2TCNGo1pUCgb9BaqxYtemMkyB4lFcEZ-Km8WA7J8FPtfLf2dcGIlknC077Ca57nw5VSmtWFbprNApdL1GgawzS9OVRqFfCuXO4UXt0xRKzdNOj8bI6TQUyc8kptsTUlNkqY0-KCwFq6e4TECeMNGbGD2LtSs8UTkRLNVF6yHNh4pBFUu7ee4znTfSRc2L6HJBI9sZDiAEgMc8bUdHQ3hzVHxPwRo29AuInD0aUwC_upWwLfyW_qCEvSJ7E1UO85n7J5gskiFBsYXfU32EXhQ%3D%3D)** I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a _**Republican win**_. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... **...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs.** Thank you and God Bless,
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=95fc756254c74e88aa65835a22175644&_e=PRjFW38QEg9C4IljEaUgImzPfA8X-y8hkD1Vftj9tOqc9ZN37yGFdzK6nxzU021xyptFJdhSyp9fXRnRh1_7wqsKHF_f6JvP3qXinsO045AjBm3qQRkRqBMKJzy5fAFEAV2TCNGo1pUCgb9BaqxYtemMkyB4lFcEZ-Km8WA7J8FPtfLf2dcGIlknC077Ca57nw5VSmtWFbprNApdL1GgawzS9OVRqFfCuXO4UXt0xRKJslGg7dW8BDXSunYDlD84hOqzEWLnO2gdo9VTJTW2xoPP0rl2J5azZJlbCtNNYlu_hDyFGfOomvQ83rAi1XJ5RdK96nRDfA7RbaBC5i78yC6YiFQaU6vfFARZUuyMWspJ7qiU-Z7ONDzvuNGvCGYkJVOA1Kq6yM9zX3JBpY55BQ%3D%3D)
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

clean_body: If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you. | | | As of March 5th, it's official. I'm going head-to-head with Adam Schiff in November. Democrat policies have brought America to its knees. There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And that's why I'm running for Senate. We Republicans pulled our country out of the 1970's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. And I believe we can do it again by putting classic conservative values at the heart of everything we do. But there is no way I can pull it off without you. I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389 Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 | | | Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dd2dfa14c954419ead54e12aa5e29a85&_e=UtFxCtsYG81vJYac3aLlQEfgQSsM-YSGk2NE11MMpg_dC5ZXv40oIrDrfljul_wxIr_DYPOnM5Se8k2GkcEN0XCNRJwvkSmFg81_4uNkdCbdNV6RCurxcsGPqKHbSCBIfGkipxo6Dgpi0-0H8iQ1U_EH87aS-vOEYQnEM05BLLzTpmfYKiW_Rt66BkeuxpEPxbfX8r2T71zx8yZh9CpD6lTLyJyIj49leBONkMks1PInJFiyU2r6PyFcsMTP5dqPpFQPUycBpWxyiyehXW2eELjo76OcGJdPr2gL-yGxYj4%3D "Tuttle Twins")
It seems more and more that the family is under relentless attack in the media

Friend,

It seems more and more that the family is under relentless attack in the media, in politics, in schools, and within the legal system.

**_The institution of the family itself is under siege_.**

Nearly everywhere I look, I can find examples of anti-family messaging.

This is not an accident. It's deliberate coordination. **The family unit is the foundation of liberty and the first bastion against the overreach of governmental powers.**

Michael Novak summed it up well when he said, _" Between the omnipotent State and the naked individual looms the first line of resistance against totalitarianism: the economically and politically independent family."_

_The fight for freedom and individuality becomes not just important but imperative_.

**And here 's my plan:**

I created _The Tuttle Twins_ a decade ago. It is a book series that introduces kids of all ages (and many of their parents!) to the ideas of freedom using fun storytelling and beautiful illustrations. Together, the twins learn about freedom, free markets, and constitutional values.

I want to distribute _The Tuttle Twins_ books to **EVERY** school in the nation. That's my dream. So far, we've distributed over 5 MILLION copies.

**[Can you donate $10, $20, $50, or even $100 today to place Tuttle Twins books in schools, libraries, and with families? Each $10 raised helps us distribute a book. Today, with the encroachment of government overreach into nearly every aspect of our lives, strengthening our families against these ideologies is critical.

Parents like myself bear a unique responsibility to safeguard future generations.

We must provide our children with an education that broadens their minds and fortifies their moral integrity, shielding them from authoritarian influences.

_It is within this independent family structure that the seeds of resistance against any form of totalitarian control are sown and nurtured_.

Ronald Reagan once said, _" Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."_

The way to keep the next generation fighting for liberty is by educating them on free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility through _The Tuttle Twins_.

clean_body: "Tuttle Twins" It seems more and more that the family is under relentless attack in the media Friend, It seems more and more that the family is under relentless attack in the media, in politics, in schools, and within the legal system. The institution of the family itself is under siege. Nearly everywhere I look, I can find examples of anti-family messaging. This is not an accident. It's deliberate coordination. The family unit is the foundation of liberty and the first bastion against the overreach of governmental powers. Michael Novak summed it up well when he said, " Between the omnipotent State and the naked individual looms the first line of resistance against totalitarianism: the economically and politically independent family." The fight for freedom and individuality becomes not just important but imperative. And here 's my plan: I created The Tuttle Twins a decade ago. It is a book series that introduces kids of all ages (and many of their parents!) to the ideas of freedom using fun storytelling and beautiful illustrations. Together, the twins learn about freedom, free markets, and constitutional values. I want to distribute The Tuttle Twins books to EVERY school in the nation. That's my dream. So far, we've distributed over 5 MILLION copies. Today, with the encroachment of government overreach into nearly every aspect of our lives, strengthening our families against these ideologies is critical. Parents like myself bear a unique responsibility to safeguard future generations. We must provide our children with an education that broadens their minds and fortifies their moral integrity, shielding them from authoritarian influences. It is within this independent family structure that the seeds of resistance against any form of totalitarian control are sown and nurtured. Ronald Reagan once said, " Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." The way to keep the next generation fighting for liberty is by educating them on free markets, individual liberty, limited government, and personal responsibility through The Tuttle Twins. I am humbly asking for your immediate support in distributing another 1,700 books this month. Please select an amount below to rush your support. Friend, parents, like myself, are the protectors of future generations. We hold a special duty to provide our children with an education that both broadens their minds and strengthens their moral integrity, shielding them from the influence of authoritarian beliefs. Today's children will defend liberty against the State's efforts to influence future generations. Your support is vital in enabling us to empower families to take charge of their children's education, instilling in them the wisdom and courage to resist oppressive forces. Thank you for your unwavering support. Connor Boyack President, Libertas Institute Author, Tuttle Twins Paid for by Libertas Institute Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d4d1d03559fd4c9d8de1d6a0a12efb17&_e=IjpgbGAbMt_5D6QW2MQMIe-OQesEPe5yahSjskT5cHQ2T3VEUQZgCU_rDi1JBw-JI0P3YqK2WQ1GnrMYXa-PtiP1zN7h12xes0t1KgAcFwI4P7t-evanHVG3tUZqUtHRcmNb490q0h8aEpgjFZVRutdJ2IRFE3nfWoa6V0CkdnQCBVXdFZ1yoXsJi7KVJTHpbbFlnJndTsonjnFpcXCd6dqIgEbhxiN6hF0QgEJG38eNnhh1bPJSQHq9-th8dFy2TM1KSCwVuC-57OZ4OlB0TbtnJtCOC78M8u-KnFHb0iBFeQYJiUkBjVbhPjjWYj53itBQxLq9fjtS_Kf6cWvE9VxOaspd8Pq36zlFpzyJgQhbA8Jx2BxmrBOGizhNfT3fAN4Gm52KvYNoscJpGnbUjg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

Remember how he told you, while he was still with you in Galilee: ‘The Son of Man must be delivered over to the hands of sinners, be crucified and on the third day be raised again.’ ” – Luke 24:6-7_

| | Fellow Conservative, Before the day gets away from me, I just wanted to reach out and wish you a Happy Easter! Whether you're planning to attend church, organize an Easter egg hunt for your kids, or enjoy a big meal with your loved ones, I hope you have a wonderful Resurrection Sunday.
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9FYXN0ZXItMjAyNF8yMDI0MDMyOCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUVhc3Rlci0yMDI0JnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/V1qFHOKbj4EHy7h46CRUfQ)
---
Today, as we celebrate Christ's resurrection, I'm reminded of Luke 24:6-7: "_He is not here; he has risen! Remember how he told you, while he was still with you in Galilee: 'The Son of Man must be delivered over to the hands of sinners, be crucified and on the third day be raised again."_ Happy Easter to you and your family!
-Ted Cruz

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: A great rebuke to Besty DeVos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
This is going to be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country.

Friends —
I am writing to ask if there is ANYTHING I can say to convince you to make a donation to Democrat Elissa Slotkin's campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan before her FEC deadline ends at midnight tonight?
Let me try?
What if I told you this race is going to be one of the most expensive and competitive in the country and there's no winning the Senate (or the White House) without Michigan?
What if I told you none other than Betsy DeVos and her family have already donated tens of thousands of dollars to her likely opponent — and are just getting started?
And what if I told you Elissa has rejected corporate PAC money and is relying largely on individual donations from people like you to fund her campaign?
This FEC deadline is a big one. When it ends tonight, Elissa is legally required to report how much money she's raised. Missing her goals can make her vulnerable to attack.
So given the stakes of this race and this moment, I am humbly asking:
[**Can I count on you to use this link to contribute $3 (or more if you can) directly to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan? Do it before her FEC fundraising deadline ends at midnight.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-slotkin?refcode=em240331&refcode2=1927_4767699_Lqt4om&akid=1927%2E4767699%2ELqt4om)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Gavin Newsom

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My decision to run for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Trump caused January 6th. But it was people like Kari Lake who fanned the flames, spreading the same lies and election denial conspiracies that inspired the insurrection in the first place.
#

Peter, today is one of the most important days of the campaign.
After our first FEC deadline of the election year hits at midnight, we are legally required to publicly release our fundraising numbers.
And now that Kyrsten Sinema is out of the race, now that this is a head-to-head between me and the “MAGA Queen” Kari Lake, we’ve got a lot to prove.
But let’s put that aside for a minute. I felt like I owe it to you to explain my decision to run for Senate in the first place.
If you’ve got a minute, stick around.
I put my life on the line in the Marines to defend this country. I swore an oath to protect and defend our Constitution and I took that oath seriously. I lost a lot of friends in Iraq, but I never lost faith in this country.
Then, on the floor of the U.S. House on January 6th, I was ready to defend our democracy again. I wasn’t going to let a bunch of insurrectionists stop us, and it wasn’t lost on me who sent them there.
Trump caused January 6th. But it was people like Kari Lake who fanned the flames, spreading the same lies and election denial conspiracies that inspired the insurrection in the first place.
I am running for the U.S. Senate because the future of our democracy depends on defeating people like Trump and Kari Lake.
And our success, ultimately, is going to come down to whether or not we raise the resources we need to win. Whether we raise those resources depends on folks like you, chipping in what you can, when you can.
It’s a lot of pressure, I know. I feel it, too. But consider that donation an act of hope.
Hope that when people come together, good things can happen. That we can do the work that needs to be done, and continue improving this country for the better.
That’s what I believe, and I hope you do, too. So please, I’m humbly asking:
[**Make your first contribution of $3 to my campaign so that we can crush our fundraising goals ahead of this FEC deadline and show everyone that we can win this race. I’m really counting on you today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar24.sAuZhx&refcode=em240331-1-160&t=1&akid=2147%2E734936%2E8xh-Js)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

---

| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-mar24.tgHhQm&refcode=em240331-1-160&t=25&akid=2147%2E734936%2E8xh-Js)**

Thank you, as always, for your support.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

name: Andy Kim
subject: I’m running to fix what’s broken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
Tonight is our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year — and it’s a big one.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82030292/464244486/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTMzZmE4NC01YWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8JUIuBlWf53cRI6toc-azHKIKU9H5jWhjz0zW63FWoA=&emci=9a4b6646-2fed-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=4533fa84-5aef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=26261389)
---

| | **Tonight is our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year — and it's a**** _big_****one.** **Because of you, we’ve gone from being the underdog to the frontrunner in this race, but we need to prove we can stay here.** This end-of-quarter deadline will be a true test of our campaign's grassroots strength because at midnight tonight, the books will close, and soon, our fundraising numbers will become public to everyone. Let’s remember what’s at stake. Right now, a staggering 84 percent of people in New Jersey believe NJ politicians are corrupt. The people of New Jersey deserve a choice for what kind of public servant they have in the Senate. Instead of throwing up my hands and giving up, I am stepping up to show that there is a better way. We deserve leaders who can serve with integrity. Leaders who are workhorses, not show horses. After Menendez's scandal, we need a fresh new start — a chance to lift up a new generation of leadership that can bring a new voice and deep public service experience to the U.S. Senate. Defending democracy isn't just about defeating Donald Trump in November or even defending access to the ballot box – both of which are hugely important. It also involves restoring trust in our elected officials to do the right thing. I'm fighting to restore integrity to our politics because for too long, politicians have put themselves over the people. **It's time to fix that.** While some would have you believe that corruption and greed are an inescapable part of politics — I firmly reject that notion, and so should you. Right now, we need to show that we're bringing a different kind of politics to New Jersey – we can do that now by showing that the grassroots is what drives Democratic politics in our state. **We are building up a powerful movement for change, and we need you.** [**So before our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year, I'm asking you to pitch in whatever is meaningful to you and help our team show our grassroots strength and propel this movement forward.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82030293/464244487/-1197072038?refcode=2024-03-31-eoq&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4533fa84-5aef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTMzZmE4NC01YWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8JUIuBlWf53cRI6toc-azHKIKU9H5jWhjz0zW63FWoA=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82030294/464244488/-1197072038?refcode=2024-03-31-eoq&recurring=&amount=8&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=4533fa84-5aef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTMzZmE4NC01YWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8JUIuBlWf53cRI6toc-azHKIKU9H5jWhjz0zW63FWoA=) Thank you, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
