clean_body: Tonight is our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year — and it’s a big one. | | | | Tonight is our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year — and it's a bigone. Because of you, we’ve gone from being the underdog to the frontrunner in this race, but we need to prove we can stay here. This end-of-quarter deadline will be a true test of our campaign's grassroots strength because at midnight tonight, the books will close, and soon, our fundraising numbers will become public to everyone. Let’s remember what’s at stake. Right now, a staggering 84 percent of people in New Jersey believe NJ politicians are corrupt. The people of New Jersey deserve a choice for what kind of public servant they have in the Senate. Instead of throwing up my hands and giving up, I am stepping up to show that there is a better way. We deserve leaders who can serve with integrity. Leaders who are workhorses, not show horses. After Menendez's scandal, we need a fresh new start — a chance to lift up a new generation of leadership that can bring a new voice and deep public service experience to the U.S. Senate. Defending democracy isn't just about defeating Donald Trump in November or even defending access to the ballot box – both of which are hugely important. It also involves restoring trust in our elected officials to do the right thing. I'm fighting to restore integrity to our politics because for too long, politicians have put themselves over the people. It's time to fix that. While some would have you believe that corruption and greed are an inescapable part of politics — I firmly reject that notion, and so should you. Right now, we need to show that we're bringing a different kind of politics to New Jersey – we can do that now by showing that the grassroots is what drives Democratic politics in our state. We are building up a powerful movement for change, and we need you. = = Thank you, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . ---
Hi friends, it’s Gabby. I promise I won’t email you again before tonight’s FEC deadline, but I couldn’t let this moment pass without reaching out one last time.
[**I’m respectfully asking you to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before this critical FEC deadline passes.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240331-1-30&t=2&akid=7861%2E3935704%2E-kbHOm)
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240331-1-30&t=3&akid=7861%2E3935704%2E-kbHOm)**
When it comes to our movement for gun safety, there’s never a moment where we can slow down. Our nation’s gun violence crisis tears apart communities and families each and every day.
Sometimes we see these stories in our news headlines. But most of the time, we don’t. Each and every day, people lose their lives to preventable tragedies, and families must learn to cope with the loss of a loved one.
Our mission at GIFFORDS is to create a future where we no longer have to live in fear from the threat of gun violence. The only way we can fuel our work is when people like you chip in to messages like these.
[**So please. Will you make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC before our quarterly FEC fundraising deadline comes to an end at midnight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240331-1-30&t=4&akid=7861%2E3935704%2E-kbHOm)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Apologies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1281%2E135344%2EV9GaMv)

Friend --
Like a lot of Michiganders, I am sure family is on the mind as people across the state gather to celebrate Easter Sunday.
So I come to you, apologetically, to ask for your help today. Before midnight.
Would you be able to make a contribution to my Senate campaign before our FEC fundraising deadline ends tonight at midnight? If you have been thinking about donating to our campaign, now would be the perfect time.
[**https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/March-EOQ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240331-1-700&t=2&akid=1281%2E135344%2EV9GaMv)**
I’d really love it if I could earn your support today. Because tonight at the stroke of midnight, this 3-month public reporting period is over. We need as much momentum as possible to show that we are a formidable opponent to the eventual GOP nominee. And with four serious Republican contenders getting into the race over the past few months, this public fundraising report will be looked through with a fine-tooth comb to see how we stack up.
The polls are showing that this Senate race in Michigan is a dead heat with a lot of voters still undecided. That’s who we need to get to. If we fall short of our goal before our FEC deadline ends, it delays us talking to crucial voters early -- especially in places outside of my current congressional district.
I need to introduce myself to the 10 million people in Michigan, and an early introduction could be the difference between winning or losing next year.
[**So please: Can you make your first online contribution to my Senate campaign before the FEC fundraising deadline ends tonight at midnight? I would not ask if it weren’t so important.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240331-1-700&t=3&akid=1281%2E135344%2EV9GaMv)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-mar24.tT69PV&refcode=em240331-1-700&t=23&akid=1281%2E135344%2EV9GaMv)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-mar24.bHdrFB&refcode=em240331-1-700&t=24&akid=1281%2E135344%2EV9GaMv)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-mar24.Zz-2ft&refcode=em240331-1-700&t=25&akid=1281%2E135344%2EV9GaMv)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-mar24.eLk0oo&refcode=em240331-1-700&t=26&akid=1281%2E135344%2EV9GaMv)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-mar24.radpj1&refcode=em240331-1-700&t=27&akid=1281%2E135344%2EV9GaMv)**
---
****
Thanks in advance for chipping in. It all adds up when we work to combine forces.
Elissa

P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20Editors=20at=20Broad=20+=20Liberty?=
subject: B+L Weekly Reads: "Sizable Tax Increase" Next Year in Delco | Podcasts, Lightning Round, + More ⚡🔔
body:
News + editorial to start your week. | | | |
---
| | | Happy Easter, and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c741bab12e&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
### **1.[Delaware County Councilwoman: ‘We’re looking at a sizable tax increase...for next year’](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e276767d0f&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Todd Shepherd_
“Delaware County Councilwoman Christine Reuther said last week the county was already eyeing a “sizable” new tax increase to meet the demands of an ever-expanding budget that now includes inflation-fueled pay raises, running a prison, and managing a health department that’s only two years old.

Reuther’s remarks at Wednesday’s personnel board meeting comes less than four months after council voted to approve a [five percent tax increase](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7cab0e356b&e=b7b3eddce2) on county residents — the first county-wide tax increase since 2014 and the first tax increase since Democrats took over the majority of the council after the 2019 elections.” **Why It Matters.** “After Democrats won control of the county council in the wake of the 2019 elections, enacting many of the reforms they promised such as the creation of a county health department and de-privatizing the prison have put constant pressure on the budget. Some of that budgetary pressure was temporarily papered over by funds received from the federal government to help with the 2020 pandemic. But now, four years later, most of that pandemic money is gone.”

**Quotable.** ““Excessive compensation costs can severely damage a government’s financial position.”

“After the grant funding ends, the County will be left with the entire cost of the program, especially compensation increases. That is the situation we see here in a few of the agenda items,” said Delaware County Controller Joanne Phillips.

[C](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5fef099eb4&e=b7b3eddce2)[ontinue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e2dfe387b6&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Jewish voters should lead the exodus from the Democratic Party](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c257b54953&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Andy Bloom_

“Since the October 7 Hamas attacks, many members of the Democrat Party have abandoned or gone weak-kneed in their support of Israel. The Biden administration says it supports Israel but then wants to direct Israel’s prosecution against Hamas. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer, who worries about election interference in the United States, thinks nothing of calling for regime change in Israel.

Meanwhile, progressives are full-throated in support of Palestinians. They are willing to overlook Hamas’s atrocities and lies. Sympathizers believe the Palestinians in Gaza are victims rather than complicit in Hamas’s barbarism.”

**Why It Matters**. “Leftist organizations, including MoveOn and Amnesty International, have demanded a ceasefire in Gaza. Then, Democrat-supporting unions piled on. They include the United Auto Workers (UAW) and the NEA (National Education Association) – the nation’s largest teachers union. In fact, 200 unions and labor organizations have formed the National Labor Network for Ceasefire (NLNC).

These groups and their demands on Israel and not Hamas are representative of the new Democratic coalition. CNN reported on a Quinnipiac University Poll last November. Far more Democrats under 35 sympathize with the Palestinians (74 percent) versus 16 percent who sympathize more with the Israelis. The trend developed even before Israel began its current fight in Gaza. In March 2023, a Gallup poll found that among Democrats, 49 percent were more sympathetic to Palestinians (49 percent) than Israelis (38 percent).”

**Quotable**. “There’s been a lot said about a “political realignment” recently. Specifically, the polls suggest that record numbers of Blacks and Hispanics could vote for Donald Trump. Further, Joe Biden’s poll numbers with younger voters are sagging.

These groups have traditionally voted in overwhelming numbers for Democrats. Time will tell if they will cast votes for Trump, let alone shift their allegiance to Republicans over multiple elections. If so, it would upset election calculus as pollsters and pundits have known them for the past 50+ years.”

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f42cfbadd6&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Podcasts!**
* **[Kitchen Table Politics: Malcolm Kenyatta](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e63e1d32cd&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. Lightning Round**
* **[Delaware County FOP President criticizes Senator Casey’s appearance with anti-police group, praises Dave McCormick](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=af364f9307&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[State House members will use discharge resolution process to advance Voter ID Amendment](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d6942beae8&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Andrew Yang returns to Pennsylvania with third-party candidates for statewide office](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cfe0ec26af&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: It’s like pulling teeth](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4fbd778362&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Two of Shapiro’s clean energy sources in new power plan unlikely to arrive by 2035 deadline](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=00df300d40&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
| _**What We’re Reading...**_
---
| As the plagiarism scandals continue to roil American colleges, Walter Russell Mead asks: [Is this the beginning of the end for impeccably credentialed but utterly mediocre elites?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7fd4141b68&e=b7b3eddce2) Writing in _Tablet_ this week, Mead examines the history of American academia and wonders whether another major change is coming.************

name: Hill Harper
subject: Broken promises and moving goal posts
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Working Michiganders deserve better.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB)
I know you feel it too, Peter: **Washington isn’t working for working people.**
The cost of housing is soaring year over year. Our health care costs are the highest in the world. Too many hardworking Michiganders are forced to choose between food or rent.
Despite years of policy failures, we pay our taxes and show our loyalty at the ballot box election after election — and what do our “leaders” have to show for it? Which one of our problems have they actually _solved_ , not just kicked down the road?
We all know the answer.
**That’s why I’m running to represent Michigan in the U.S. Senate — not as a politician, but as a union organizer, activist, single father, cancer survivor, and small business owner who understands our challenges _at the ground level._**
**[Peter, I’m relying on grassroots donations to fuel our campaign, so please: Chip in anything you can before tonight’s critical end-of-quarter deadline! Your donation ensures we have the resources we need to hire organizers, talk to voters where they’re at, and counter every attack that might come our way.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1018?t=2&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB)**
**[DONATE »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1018?t=3&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB)**
Like I said, I understand the pressures Michiganders are facing right now because _I’ve lived through them myself._ I’m a single father who drives his son to school every morning and owns a coffee shop in Detroit — believe me when I say our challenges are at the top of my mind:
👉🏾 Michigan ranks 37th in K-12 education
👉🏾 Michigan ranks 46th in state population growth
👉🏾 Michigan faces a housing shortage — worse than the national average — for both owners and renters
👉🏾 In the last three years, more small businesses closed their doors for good in Michigan than in any other state
I understand these challenges aren’t the fault of any one politician — it’s the whole system that’s broken. But that’s exactly why I’m relying on grassroots donations to fuel this campaign: **Without you, we don’t have the financial firepower to take on the establishment, win this race, and _finally_ deliver on our priorities.**
**[So please, Peter, will you rush a donation before midnight to hit our end-of-quarter goal? If _all_ give _some_ , we’ll have what it takes to win.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1018?t=4&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1019?t=5&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB) [DONATE $25 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1020?t=6&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB) [DONATE $50 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1021?t=7&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB) [DONATE $100 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1022?t=8&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB) [DONATE $250 »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1023?t=9&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB) [OTHER AMOUNT »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1018?t=10&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB)
---
From the bottom of my heart, _thank you_ for your support. Now, let’s go make history.
Hill Harper
Democrat for U.S. Senate
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1018?t=11&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB)
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=12&refcode2=1125_62735_jds5AB&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=13&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=1125%2E62735%2Ejds5AB)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Demand News Channels Stop Hiring Election Deniers
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Tell News Channels to Stop Hiring Election Deniers](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae0868cd-92a3-4318-a987-19e7c9173313/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T956cd898-f4e1-40ba-9107-7f97adba8b5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | After tremendous pressure from the public and its own reporters, NBC was forced to [reverse](https://default.salsalabs.org/T794c4dc2-4253-44af-8870-b1ff80fa12a5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) its hiring of former RNC Chair and repeated election denier Ronna (Romney) McDaniel as an on-air contributor. But there are still plenty of other election deniers appearing regularly across the cable news spectrum, and many of them are getting paid to spout their nonsense. [**Add your name, and tell the news channels to stop hiring election deniers.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf15a62a-882d-4e98-89e9-ba3705ef2241/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This isn't about differences in opinion, it's about allowing liars to spout BS that has been disproven time and time again. A news channel airing this is like a math channel featuring "experts" who insist that 2+2=17. It's garbage, and it is an attack on our democracy and our nation, and they need to stop promoting it. [**Add your name, and tell the news channels to stop hiring election deniers.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6b18968-0f20-4285-a1bf-7d43f5a4ca90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teff6e583-03d3-4920-a958-c204daab3d4b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - Forward this to others to help spread the word, and build momentum for this action!)
---
|
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b99ef97-aabe-4ce7-bd61-c5ef467bc9f2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a26c871-751a-4614-a44e-ac3ed6d5536f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3ec607b6-56de-49ec-b715-a2dd2dd5f311/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5c551f4-8234-448a-accf-c41358c9e3ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

House GOP Rep Under Ethics Committee Review

Republican Rep. Troy Nehls of Texas is under review by the House of

body:
He’s at it again...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21138%2E4449941%2EZPpbkN)
---
**The U.S.P.S. is under fire from Trump again:** [ ]() _Republicans are working to SMEAR the Postal Service in a transparent attempt to discredit vote-by-mail options and influence the 2024 Election:_

**So we’re conducting an urgent public opinion poll to combat the GOP’s lies:** | [WE NEED YOUR INPUT, TEAM: Take our Emergency Postal Worker Approval Poll so we can fight back these allegations the MAGA crooks are trying to push and save our postal workers »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240331_EMPOLL_E1_T0_GM-14D-AC_RS&t=7&akid=21138%2E4449941%2EZPpbkN)
---
With Trump appointee Louis DeJoy at the helm of the U.S.P.S., he’s liable to run it into the ground! **We must do ALL we can to protect the Postal Service!**

_Which is why we need 500 Democrats (including you) to take our emergency poll so we can stand by our diligent postal workers:_
**[_DO YOU SUPPORT YOUR LOCAL U.S.P.S. WORKERS? »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240331_EMPOLL_E1_T0_GM-14D-AC_RS&t=8&akid=21138%2E4449941%2EZPpbkN)** | [YES, I DO! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240331_EMPOLL_E1_T0_GM-14D-AC_RS&t=9&akid=21138%2E4449941%2EZPpbkN)
---
[NO, I DO NOT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240331_EMPOLL_E1_T0_GM-14D-AC_RS&t=10&akid=21138%2E4449941%2EZPpbkN)
[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL-Post-Office-Approval_02-15?source=FFR_20240331_EMPOLL_E1_T0_GM-14D-AC_RS&t=11&akid=21138%2E4449941%2EZPpbkN)
**_*WE NEED 500 RESPONSES FROM YOUR STATE FOR AN ACCURATE CONSENSUS*_**
Thank you for your help!

-FFR

name: John's iPhone
subject: hi, real quick q for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
👋👋👋
hi Derek, it’s John Fetterman — with a real quick q 👋
(sorry for any typos typing this on my iphone)
just wanted to send you 1 more message before TONIGHT’S FEC fundraising deadline
we’re in for a huge fight in 2024. the senate + white house are both on the line in PA!!!!
I’m going to be on the front lines, mobilizing dems in every county + zip code... and i need YOUR help to keep it up. 🙏🙏🙏
**[can you join our incredible team of supporters and make your first donation before our deadline at midnight? it will mean so much to me + the entire team at Fetterman HQ.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240331-1?refcode=em20240331-1-8883&refcode2=8883_434096_syn0uC&akid=8883%2E434096%2Esyn0uC)**
Derek, honestly i dont think there’s anything else left to say except: THANK YOU!!!
❤️❤️❤️John
Sent from my iPhone

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Democrats need to pay attention to Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Friend, as Majority Leader, I need all Democrats to know what’s happening in battleground Nevada. So if you missed my last email, here’s a quick rundown:
---
Nevada's last Senate race came down to less than 1% – the closest margin in the country – and 2024 is shaping up to be just as close. Now, experts are saying Sen. Jacky Rosen is the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate, and her extreme opponent recently broke a major fundraising record.
With Nevada likely to determine Senate control, we simply can’t let Jacky fall behind in this race as the GOP spends MILLIONS to buy this seat.
So please, I have to ask you again: **[Will you pitch in $5 or more now to keep Nevada and our Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82032630/464250785/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3633-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjEzZDVmYi01ZmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqMrNUWkd4tcaMM1YgyFw4MUJpOPHArqPLhXQKC3VmU=)**
Thank you,
Chuck Schumer
Senate Majority Leader

From: **Chuck Schumer**
Date: Sat, Mar 30, 2024
Subject: Missing this fundraising goal could make us lose the Senate
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82032634/464250799/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3633-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjEzZDVmYi01ZmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqMrNUWkd4tcaMM1YgyFw4MUJpOPHArqPLhXQKC3VmU=)

I know you're busy, friend, but this can’t wait:

Jacky Rosen is the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate this year, and experts predict that Senate control could all come down to Nevada again. And now, the far-right Republican candidate Mitch McConnell personally recruited to defeat her just set a new fundraising record!

**Listen, I know Jacky.** And if anyone has what it takes to protect this Senate seat, it's her. But with polling showing her tied neck and neck with her GOP opponent, she urgently needs your grassroots support to keep up the fight and win.
**Right now, Jacky is still very far behind her must-reach $100,000 end-of-quarter goal before midnight tomorrow. And at this point in the election year, missing a goal like this could spell disaster for her campaign – and our Democratic Senate majority.**
With the stakes of this race so high, we have no time to lose. That’s why I’m personally reaching out to ask: [**Will you please join me in helping Jacky Rosen reach her first FEC end-of-quarter goal of the year to protect this battleground seat in Nevada and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82032639/464250815/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3633-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjEzZDVmYi01ZmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lqMrNUWkd4tcaMM1YgyFw4MUJpOPHArqPLhXQKC3VmU=)

clean_body: Friend, as Majority Leader, I need all Democrats to know what’s happening in battleground Nevada. So if you missed my last email, here’s a quick rundown: Nevada's last Senate race came down to less than 1% – the closest margin in the country – and 2024 is shaping up to be just as close. Now, experts are saying Sen. Jacky Rosen is the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate, and her extreme opponent recently broke a major fundraising record. With Nevada likely to determine Senate control, we simply can’t let Jacky fall behind in this race as the GOP spends MILLIONS to buy this seat. So please, I have to ask you again: = Thank you, Chuck Schumer Senate Majority Leader \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Chuck Schumer Date: Sat, Mar 30, 2024 Subject: Missing this fundraising goal could make us lose the Senate | | | = I know you're busy, friend, but this can’t wait: Jacky Rosen is the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate this year, and experts predict that Senate control could all come down to Nevada again. And now, the far-right Republican candidate Mitch McConnell personally recruited to defeat her just set a new fundraising record! Listen, I know Jacky. And if anyone has what it takes to protect this Senate seat, it's her. But with polling showing her tied neck and neck with her GOP opponent, she urgently needs your grassroots support to keep up the fight and win. Right now, Jacky is still very far behind her must-reach $100,000 end-of-quarter goal before midnight tomorrow. And at this point in the election year, missing a goal like this could spell disaster for her campaign – and our Democratic Senate majority. With the stakes of this race so high, we have no time to lose. That’s why I’m personally reaching out to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Chuck Schumer Senate Majority Leader | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Debbie
subject: Hoppy Easter! 🐣🐰💐
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
our household Easter traditions tend to involve chocolate-glazed doughnuts 🍩
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82033619/464253668/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1013-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDFkNWMzNjEtNjFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qvnr5tOl8VWCYx3U3ICibQn5OTtPTZf3hpYA2ipHCN8=)
Hoppy Easter! 🐣🐰💐
Easter has always been a special day in our house, and even more so since we adopted our bunny a few years ago. Before our bunny came home, I loved my annual chocolate rabbit. But I wouldn’t want to hurt her feelings by munching on her edible look-alikes, so now our household Easter traditions tend to involve chocolate-glazed doughnuts instead. 🍩
See, my first job was working at a doughnut shop before school. Taking as many hours as I could at minimum wage wasn't easy — but it was enough to help cover rent for my family’s tiny apartment, graduate college, and eventually go on to serve my country in Congress. The doughnut business helped make my American Dream a reality.
But friend, would you believe Rick Scott’s “American Dream” began in the doughnut business, too?
In fact, the profits from the two doughnut shops he bought jump-started his corporate career as a hospital chain CEO. After running one of the biggest Medicare frauds in history, he landed in Florida with a $310 million golden parachute — enough to buy a seat in the U.S. Senate and attack the opportunities that made my American Dream possible.
While the love of money may be the root of all evil, I’m not afraid of Rick Scott or his ill-gotten gains. But to stay competitive in this race, we’ve got to close the final $5,439 gap to my $700k end-of-quarter goal tonight. Doing that will take nothing short of a miracle, so if you are willing: _**[Can you please chip in $5 or whatever you can spare by midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82033620/464253669/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1013-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDFkNWMzNjEtNjFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qvnr5tOl8VWCYx3U3ICibQn5OTtPTZf3hpYA2ipHCN8=)**_

body:

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbdc21671-9a7a-449f-95b2-83aac8679282/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8401c777-953a-46ff-bd04-42dd75c2da37/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, Ohio's primary is over, and now, it's official: We're going up against Donald Trump's handpicked candidate Bernie Moreno in the race experts say could decide Senate control. And it's not just Moreno we're up against. National Republicans are going ALL IN to flip this seat red – they're already spending record amounts to defeat me. We need to fight back ASAP, or we could risk entering the general election at a disadvantage. [So I'm personally asking: Please, will you split $10 or more now between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me defend Ohio's critical seat and keep the Senate blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab5da500-e2bc-4e71-9928-432d8758c60f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sen. Sherrod Brown and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d52341f-b169-4b1e-9880-f5c7e91ea506/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3462970-01e9-49d1-8ac3-8c0ec203164a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Express Donate: $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdaf8acdf-cbeb-43a5-9bd9-86414bc4a7e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **[Or, donate another amount](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec4dd049-de2c-45fe-bd23-7da9ad109233/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
|

| | | | | In case you need a reminder, my opponent and I couldn't be more different: • He wants a national abortion ban, I want to restore Roe v. Wade.
• He protects the wealthiest 1%, I defend American workers.
• He'll do Trump's and McConnell's bidding in the Senate, I'm a champion for democracy. Unfortunately, that's not all. Moreno is also writing his campaign million-dollar checks, and now that he's through the primary, the GOP will be funneling even more money into this race. They're trying to buy this Senate seat because they know they don't have a grassroots movement behind them like we do. [But that also means I'm relying on folks like you to power us to victory, one $19 donation at a time. So please, will you split a $10 donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us defeat our GOP opponent, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T416c92a2-3081-40ca-a8ec-c504b3b5e227/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Your support means the world – especially now. Thank you, Sherrod Brown

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | | | | | [](https://newpaproject.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e6e5141dda36b4ba08999c131&id=c79c0fa303&e=95417d7e87)

Did you see this message, fellow activist?

Republicans are renewing their attacks on voting rights. They are attempting to eliminate drop boxes and advance more restrictive voter ID, all in a clear attempt to silence Black and brown folks, young voters and immigrant communities from having their voices heard on Election Day.

It’s critical that we preserve voting rights and help to ensure that everyone is able to cast their sacred ballots in the upcoming presidential primary election on April 23rd and in every election in the future.

**Here’s the thing:** PA has seen these attacks before. Republicans are targeting our election systems BECAUSE we are a key battleground state that could determine the election this November.

[**Will you rush $25 or more before midnight to ensure we have what we need to defend voting rights? Tonight is our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year, and it’s critical that we close our $1,281 fundraising gap.**](https://newpaproject.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e6e5141dda36b4ba08999c131&id=bf4f308a9c&e=95417d7e87) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$25 »**](https://newpaproject.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e6e5141dda36b4ba08999c131&id=25e3322e23&e=95417d7e87)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------

Fellow activist,

Ahead of a critical election year, Republicans are stepping up their attacks on voting rights.

Shortly after PA Democratic Speaker Joanna McClinton announced her intention to introduce same-day voter registration and early in-person voting on machines, Republicans lashed out. Senator Cris Dush (R) introduced legislation to **_eliminate satellite offices and drop boxes_** , and PA House GOP Leader Bryan Cutler announced his intention to push for a constitutional amendment to **_advance additional voter ID barriers._**

In order to vote in Pennsylvania, voters already need to show a valid ID when voting for the first time. But in a clear attempt to suppress votes, Republicans want to take it a step further.

As our CEO Kadida Kenner stated to _LancasterOnline (LNP)_ , “This is their attempt to stop Black and Brown folks, young voters and immigrant communities from having more convenient access to ballots and having their voices heard on Election Day.”

[**We’ve seen these attacks before. In 2020, Trump ran a smear campaign against PA’s election systems in an attempt to overturn the results. Now, with the 2024 presidential election coming up fast and PA being a key battleground state, we have to be prepared for anything. Help us prepare to defend voting rights in PA by rushing $25 or more today →**](https://newpaproject.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e6e5141dda36b4ba08999c131&id=b1187e0de9&e=95417d7e87) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$25 »**](https://newpaproject.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e6e5141dda36b4ba08999c131&id=75110f5bb5&e=95417d7e87)

Policy team @ NPP
| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | | | Did you see this message, fellow activist? Republicans are renewing their attacks on voting rights. They are attempting to eliminate drop boxes and advance more restrictive voter ID, all in a clear attempt to silence Black and brown folks, young voters and immigrant communities from having their voices heard on Election Day. It’s critical that we preserve voting rights and help to ensure that everyone is able to cast their sacred ballots in the upcoming presidential primary election on April 23rd and in every election in the future. Here’s the thing: PA has seen these attacks before. Republicans are targeting our election systems BECAUSE we are a key battleground state that could determine the election this November. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ** | | | | | | | | Together, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer New Pennsylvania Project \---------- Forwarded message --------- Fellow activist, Ahead of a critical election year, Republicans are stepping up their attacks on voting rights. Shortly after PA Democratic Speaker Joanna McClinton announced her intention to introduce same-day voter registration and early in-person voting on machines, Republicans lashed out. Senator Cris Dush (R) introduced legislation to eliminate satellite offices and drop boxes , and PA House GOP Leader Bryan Cutler announced his intention to push for a constitutional amendment to advance additional voter ID barriers. In order to vote in Pennsylvania, voters already need to show a valid ID when voting for the first time. But in a clear attempt to suppress votes, Republicans want to take it a step further. As our CEO Kadida Kenner stated to LancasterOnline (LNP) , “This is their attempt to stop Black and Brown folks, young voters and immigrant communities from having more convenient access to ballots and having their voices heard on Election Day.” If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Policy team @ NPP | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. I won’t take too much of your time this morning
#
Hey Peter, it’s Emma from Team Lucas Kunce and I won’t take too much of your time this morning.
I know our team has emailed you a lot this week — between our new TV ad and our critical end-of-quarter deadline tonight — and I just wanted you to know how much Lucas and the whole team appreciate you being part of this movement.
Together, we’ve broken records, held Josh Hawley accountable, and now we’re on track to have our best fundraising quarter yet. But with less than 24 hours left to reach our end-of-quarter goal, we need to keep this momentum going.
So if you have just a moment in your busy day, I wanted to take a second to ask: **will you please chip in your first donation before our big FEC deadline tonight?**

name: Bob Casey for Senate
subject: The clock is ticking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2528%2E552475%2E1Khybx)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240331-1?refcode=em20240331-1&refcode2=2528_552475_1Khybx&akid=2528%2E552475%2E1Khybx)
The clock is ticking, Peter.
At midnight tonight, we close the books on our first FEC fundraising deadline of the year. Soon after, we’ll have to publicly report how much money we’ve raised over the last three months, and we’re still $36,000 short of our goal.
**Pennsylvania is the linchpin that could decide the Senate majority, so Republicans will be looking at our fundraising numbers for any signs of weakness.**
David McCormick and right-wing super PACs are _already_ spending BIG to flip PA red, and if they smell blood in the water, they’ll only increase their spending.
Here’s the good news: There’s still time to show the strength of this campaign, but only if we see an increase in grassroots support _right now_.
[**So please, rush $5 or more before midnight tonight to re-elect Bob Casey and keep the Senate blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240331-1?refcode=em20240331-1&refcode2=2528_552475_1Khybx&akid=2528%2E552475%2E1Khybx)
Together, we can stop McCormick and his billionaire backers from buying this crucial Senate seat.
— Team Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2528%2E552475%2E1Khybx)

* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2528%2E552475%2E1Khybx)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

body:

# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1060%2E791427%2E_K2WEr)

👋☀️ To all of Ilhan Omar's supporters — please don't click away or scroll past this important email. Not yet.
We'll get straight to the point: **[Can you make your first $3 before TONIGHT's midnight FEC fundraising deadline?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar24.3mFzHz&refcode=em240331-1-t2&t=2&akid=1060%2E791427%2E_K2WEr)**

Here's why we ask:
As you know, Ilhan doesn't fund her campaigns the same way a lot of her colleagues in Congress do.
She doesn't have a dark money super PAC in her corner, she doesn't take maxout checks from the fossil fuel industry or Wall Street lobbyists, and she doesn't trade political favors for billionaire cash. Never has. Never will.
**That's because Ilhan knows she can count on _us_ — a grassroots movement of lots and lots of real people chipping in what they can, when they can.**

Our average contribution this cycle is about $25. And when we ask supporters like you to chip in for the first time, we usually ask for just $3.
All that matters is that _you_ are choosing to be a part of this movement — a part of something larger and more powerful than any one of us individually.

**We mean it when we say that for a campaign like Ilhan's, there are no small contributions. Every vote, every volunteer shift, and every single dollar counts. So please:**

# Democrat Marilyn Lands wins Alabama special election after IVF, abortion rights campaigning
_March 26, 2024_ If there was ANY question that abortion and reproductive freedom are the top issues for voters – well this special election in Alabama made it clear. The Democrat, Marilyn Lands, lost this seat by just 7 points in 2022. This time, she won by a whopping 26 points. We say it a lot, but that’s because abortion and reproductive freedom are going to be THE top issues in this race, too: Ashley is the ONLY pro-choice candidate running for PA-01. Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick? He voted to block women in the military from accessing abortion care. Mark Houck? He said, "that rape and incest is not a good excuse" for an abortion. Voters will pick Ashley if they know the candidates' stance on abortion and reproductive freedom. But we need the funds to get that message to them. _**[Can you pitch in before our end-of-quarter, FEC deadline at midnight tonight? Peter,
Our movement has always focused on building long-term trust with voters and boosting Democratic turnout, especially in hard-to-reach communities.
We reach out to folks most campaigns don’t think about reaching out to, and we don’t leave people behind. And with this year shaping up to be the most critical election of our lifetimes, our work is more important than ever.
**The Trump campaign has circled Minnesota as one of their “key battlegrounds.” They think that if they spend enough on attack ads and overwhelm us with division and hate, they can flip us red. **
We know that no matter what they throw at us, there’s no substitute for people-power and grassroots organizing. But all of this means meeting all of our fundraising goals.
**Right now, we’re still trailing our first end-of-quarter goal of the election year by about $8,000, and online contributions have drastically slowed since Friday. If we don’t pick up the pace now, we won’t be able to reach our goal.**
Here’s the good news: Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset and increased on January 1. That means you can donate up to $75 to our campaign (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State.

clean_body: Peter, Our movement has always focused on building long-term trust with voters and boosting Democratic turnout, especially in hard-to-reach communities. We reach out to folks most campaigns don’t think about reaching out to, and we don’t leave people behind. | = Peter, Our movement has always focused on building long-term trust with voters and boosting Democratic turnout, especially in hard-to-reach communities. We reach out to folks most campaigns don’t think about reaching out to, and we don’t leave people behind. And with this year shaping up to be the most critical election of our lifetimes, our work is more important than ever. The Trump campaign has circled Minnesota as one of their “key battlegrounds.” They think that if they spend enough on attack ads and overwhelm us with division and hate, they can flip us red. We know that no matter what they throw at us, there’s no substitute for people-power and grassroots organizing. But all of this means meeting all of our fundraising goals. Right now, we’re still trailing our first end-of-quarter goal of the election year by about $8,000, and online contributions have drastically slowed since Friday. If we don’t pick up the pace now, we won’t be able to reach our goal. Here’s the good news: Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset and increased on January 1. name: Glenn Grothman
subject: On this Easter morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Glenn Grothman for Congress
body:
| | |
---
Happy Easter, friend! Whatever your celebration looks like this year, I hope you take the time to celebrate the resurrection of Jesus Christ and reflect on the true meaning of Easter. His sacrifice allows eternal life to become a possibility for all who believe in Him as their Savior. “ _Now if we died with Christ, we believe that we will also live with him. For we know that since Christ was raised from the dead, he cannot die again; death no longer has mastery over him. The death he died, he died to sin once for all; but the life he lives, he lives to God. In the same way, count yourselves dead to sin but alive to God in Christ Jesus._ ”
**Romans‬ ‭6:8-11‬ ‭NIV** This time of year is a great reminder that no matter what we've been through, no matter the challenge, to trust in Him. _**He is the light and life of the world. **_ Happy Easter, **Glenn Grothman**
---
| | _FOLLOW GLENN ON SOCIAL MEDIA!_
---

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Happy Easter
body:
| | | Happy Easter, Peter! Whether you're painting eggs, getting a visit from the Easter bunny, or participating in other family traditions today, I hope you'll join me in reflecting on the reason for the celebration – our Savior, Jesus Christ.
---
---
| | This Easter season, let's all be more Christ-like and caring. By being more like Him, we can help heal this nation. Happy Easter, **Scott Fitzgerald**
---

name: Fred Guttenberg
subject: On February 14, 2018, a lone gunman with an AR-15 shot and killed my daughter Jaime and 16 others in a mass shooting in Parkland, Florida. Ever since that day, I’ve been fighting for change.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]Adam Schiff for Senate

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]Fred Guttenberg

Derek, my name
is Fred Guttenberg.

On February 14, 2018, my beautiful 14-year-old daughter, Jaime, was in
school at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida, when
a lone gunman with an AR-15 murdered her and 16 others. That’s the day my
life changed forever. No matter how much time goes by, she is on my mind
every second of every minute of every day.

I had never spoken out about gun violence before Jaime was murdered. I
would never have guessed that gun violence could affect me and my family.
But no one is safe from gun violence — and it hurts me to describe our
country like that. So now, the work to end this violence — to spare other
families this pain — has become my life’s purpose and mission.

I confronted Senator Marco Rubio for his cowardice before a packed
audience in a live CNN town hall a week after my Jaime was murdered. He
had announced his re-election campaign two years prior by pledging to do
something after the Pulse nightclub massacre in Orlando. He did nothing —
worse than nothing — he’s blocked efforts to stop gun violence time and
time again.

I tried to shake Judge Brett Kavanaugh’s hand during his Supreme Court
confirmation hearings before the Senate Judiciary Committee. He couldn’t
even muster the will to look at me. He had previously made his position as
an antagonist to reducing gun violence clear, and he is now on the Supreme
Court.

I have seen inside the belly of the beast — the right-wing, NRA-led effort
to proliferate more gun sales. I have stared the evil of inaction in the
face. And I am convinced that we need to elect Adam Schiff to the Senate
to finally take action to stop gun violence.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]If you agree, then I am personally asking you to pitch in
$3 to
Adam’s campaign before you read any further.
Derek, in
honor of ending gun violence, help Adam Schiff win his race and protect
the Senate. Together, we can re-elect President Biden with the Democratic
majorities in Congress to STOP IT.

President Biden has called legislation like Adam’s Equal Access to Justice
for Victims of Gun Violence Act the “one thing on my list — the Lord came
down and said, ‘Joe, you get one of these’ — give me that one.”

Adam’s legislation would repeal the legal immunity shield that the gun
industry enjoys — an immunity shield from civil suits that no other
billion-dollar industry has — that the NRA carved out in a law called the
Protection of Lawful Commerce in Arms Act (PLCAA) during the George Bush
administration to protect their sales.

Families like ours in Parkland deserve our day in court to be able to hold
the gun manufacturers who recklessly sold dangerous weapons to unfit
buyers accountable — we need Adam in the Senate taking the fight to the
NRA’s apologists and make this a reality.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]The ONLY way this legislation passes is if we elect Adam to the Senate,
with House and Senate Democratic majorities, and President Biden in the
White House. We can accomplish that with your
$3 of
support today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=mar2024_abs_em.4fd6uj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=mar2024_abs_em.4fd6uj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1008&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=mar2024_abs_em.4fd6uj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1009&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=mar2024_abs_em.4fd6uj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1010&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=mar2024_abs_em.4fd6uj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1011&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=mar2024_abs_em.YceVvx&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

If we can flip just four seats in the House and re-elect our Democratic
senators and President Biden, we WILL get gun safety legislation to
President Biden’s desk. It’s possible. With your donation, we will make
our effort to end gun violence as we know it a reality.

For families like mine, your support for a gun safety advocate like Adam
helps me honor my Jaime’s life and memory. That means more than I could
ever express.

Thank you,

Fred Guttenberg
Gun Violence Survivor
Jaime and Jesse’s Dad

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=mar2024_abs_em.sSRnXF&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=6102%2E5257348%2EqtgFcO ]Privacy Policy

name: The Lorinsers
subject: Happy Easter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Happy Easter
Regardless of our political backgrounds and beliefs, today we can all come together in Northern Michigan and the UP — and across the globe — to celebrate the spirit of unity, renewal, and hope.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Tulip.jpg]
^ Photo: Dennis Swanson, Ironwood
Dear friends,
As my family comes together to celebrate this Easter, I want to express our deep gratitude to all of you for supporting my congressional campaign.
Your generosity and belief in my vision for Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula have not gone unnoticed. I'm very grateful.
Every contribution, every hour volunteering, every conversation you have with a friend, every share, like, endorsement, and every letter of encouragement - none of it is lost on me.
Today, we are united across communities that value compassion, kindness and progress. Together , we will move our district forward.
For all who observe, I hope you have a meaningful holiday filled with blessings and joy.
Thank you all for your unwavering support.
Happy Easter.
Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Fight like hell
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Arizona is ground zero for the MAGA-right and all their conspiracies and election denial. Arizona is the frontline.
#

Team: I’m writing to ask you for $5.
That’s right: just $5.
$5 because we’re preparing for some of the closest elections in the country in Arizona.
$5 because defeating Kari Lake in Arizona could very well determine whether or not we hold the Senate. Picking up some seats in Arizona could determine whether or not we take back the House. And defeating Trump in Arizona is almost certain to decide who wins the White House.
$5 because Kari Lake lost by just 17,000 votes in her campaign for Governor in 2022. Trump lost by just 10,000 votes here in 2020.
Don’t make the mistake of thinking that Arizona is a blue state just because we won the last few elections here. We had to fight like hell to do it, and we will again.
Arizona is ground zero for the MAGA-right and all their conspiracies and election denial. Arizona is the frontline.
I’m going to be working all year long to make sure pro-democracy candidates win in Arizona and defeat Kari Lake and the other MAGA Republicans.
I need your help to do it.
[**Can you make a contribution of $5, or whatever you can afford, to help power our campaign as we prepare for this important fight in Arizona?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-march24.o6ZlsA&refcode=em240331-1-30&t=1&akid=5736%2E6688874%2E-yH-I4)

That’s right: just $5. $5 because we’re preparing for some of the closest elections in the country in Arizona. $5 because defeating Kari Lake in Arizona could very well determine whether or not we hold the Senate. Picking up some seats in Arizona could determine whether or not we take back the House. And defeating Trump in Arizona is almost certain to decide who wins the White House. $5 because Kari Lake lost by just 17,000 votes in her campaign for Governor in 2022. Trump lost by just 10,000 votes here in 2020. Don’t make the mistake of thinking that Arizona is a blue state just because we won the last few elections here. We had to fight like hell to do it, and we will again. Arizona is ground zero for the MAGA-right and all their conspiracies and election denial. Arizona is the frontline. disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
We’re just hours away from our very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of this pivotal election year. | |
---
Hi Derek, it's Sam Cornale, Executive Director of the DNC. We’re just hours away from our very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of this pivotal election year. I wanted to reach out to you personally about how important it is that we reach our quarterly fundraising goal, and [in a minute I’m going to ask if you can donate to the DNC before midnight to help.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtpcoSSqwP1HWngStqNLVmqB27i9Za8Ec0YXS3ut1VU7JKSsDfh9KK7az9Xf6Kil3NCHgfAxLufPgSfF5JCPtnJKV-HB9fQ9u_D43Oi40kQmtk3SaI3UazKpEc4Wo9bAh_DuysFUshkBiWPRbmkIR3V_9SgAKLiMhIRcvpZbmZu5AdAiPrRcyX2PXSCWXx9EiSAdhtO2NDIU4RGgDtUdzdAzPtba3BtdcDXvB57OO9S6cVuuJHAcJMqgW9ms716YkAwyk4zxtYrr7DmITbDd2o1ZssLUOp91Lqam5O90XNx42gwcOdJPJiuV_-AeHj8qXkGUXZB2WtAtnQD-Rp2OCvJUdwgAjyOqMQvxjb1K9F1JtULhajFmpTwFqBg460EGu--HHZAFuXmE6IRmLcDHC2Nw/454/Tn2m31lLR6ad_Xa81wmx5Q/h0/h001.2Aspr7nRl6-Jy2snigFP8YGS_HMBLFF6WqiiDsW32DM) But first, let’s catch up a little: We are still winning everything. Over the last few months, we’ve continued to see that Democrats are winning on an agenda to protect basic freedoms against the GOP’s anti-choice playbook. **In Alabama** , Democrat Marilyn Lands flipped Alabama’s HD-10 by a massive double-digit margin -- an _incredible_ overperformance in a district that voted for Donald Trump in 2020. This race was the first major special election in the state since the Alabama Supreme Court’s recent decision blocking access to IVF -- and a flashing red warning sign for MAGA Republicans of just how unpopular their agenda truly is. **In New York** , Democrat Tom Suozzi flipped NY-03 after his Republican opponent failed to answer why she stood behind the MAGA agenda that wants to ban abortion. **In Florida** , Democrat Tom Keen flipped a Republican-held state House seat -- with the overwhelming support of independent voters -- by running on protecting reproductive rights. And of course, in the November 2023 elections in **Ohio, Virginia, and Kentucky,** voters turned out in force in support of Democratic candidates and ballot initiatives focused on protecting fundamental freedoms in their states. **Here’s the bottom line: While MAGA Republicans across the country are running on enacting cruel, out-of-touch abortion bans, Democrats are running on _protecting_ reproductive freedoms -- and _winning_ , in red, purple, and blue states alike. And these wins were fueled by the grassroots support of people like you.** **[But we have to keep the momentum going as we look to November, Derek, and that starts with finishing the first quarter of the year on the strongest possible note. Can you pitch in for the first time in this election cycle to support our work to elect Democrats nationwide?](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtpcoSSqwP1HWngStqNLVmqB27i9Za8Ec0YXS3ut1VU7JKSsDfh9KK7az9Xf6Kil3NCHgfAxLufPgSfF5JCPtnJKV-HB9fQ9u_D43Oi40kQmuY1Nb5D8M-QP6-QJ6XRoT1C8vBe32Hp6aQe90DAuxH7bhSCtjoQiNVjPE3hZ2PnFgrZy8FPkbZpPftMVTiuImcaS-Mb2T1O4euKBGNF8270xgM5F1-X46qXAmHxh_Uu0Q3gOqTSbvOX88I6_bb7KawcgBAxYiIg4SKfCdkhD33l1PY2O6qFpJV8-L9vbom8jc0vQSZoAJoiMQmyyBZ_HjJZOSBI-gqbHNgQ1Z_maxBkrQvDc8I6CuG3aJGtmhKvwNDMayicUIRknFVuRuaKsBfB1e99qgAtI1qkm-LJBjmsg/454/Tn2m31lLR6ad_Xa81wmx5Q/h1/h001.HzVcT8x9WZLFbVwf6WZZ4DD3d8lWwzmvZ-uNvsl13Rs)**

clean_body: We’re just hours away from our very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of this pivotal election year. | | Hi Derek, it's Sam Cornale, Executive Director of the DNC. We’re just hours away from our very first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of this pivotal election year. I wanted to reach out to you personally about how important it is that we reach our quarterly fundraising goal, and But first, let’s catch up a little: We are still winning everything. Over the last few months, we’ve continued to see that Democrats are winning on an agenda to protect basic freedoms against the GOP’s anti-choice playbook. In Alabama , Democrat Marilyn Lands flipped Alabama’s HD-10 by a massive double-digit margin -- an incredible overperformance in a district that voted for Donald Trump in 2020. This race was the first major special election in the state since the Alabama Supreme Court’s recent decision blocking access to IVF -- and a flashing red warning sign for MAGA Republicans of just how unpopular their agenda truly is. In New York , Democrat Tom Suozzi flipped NY-03 after his Republican opponent failed to answer why she stood behind the MAGA agenda that wants to ban abortion. In Florida , Democrat Tom Keen flipped a Republican-held state House seat -- with the overwhelming support of independent voters -- by running on protecting reproductive rights. And of course, in the November 2023 elections in Ohio, Virginia, and Kentucky, voters turned out in force in support of Democratic candidates and ballot initiatives focused on protecting fundamental freedoms in their states. Here’s the bottom line: While MAGA Republicans across the country are running on enacting cruel, out-of-touch abortion bans, Democrats are running on protecting reproductive freedoms -- and winning , in red, purple, and blue states alike. And these wins were fueled by the grassroots support of people like you. | | ---|--- | | Your support makes a real difference. Our work here at the DNC is fueled by donations from this grassroots team, and we can’t do this without you. I’m so grateful to have you in this fight with us, and thankful for all that you’re doing. Sam Sam Cornale Executive Director Democratic National Committee | | | | ---|---|--- Text JOIN to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . | | Peter, On behalf of myself, my family, and the entire Williams Team, I wanted to wish you and your family a Happy Easter. May this Easter season bring you joy, peace, and renewal. Easter is a time of reflection and celebration, reminding us of the importance of hope and new beginnings. Whether you're spending the day with family and friends, or in quiet contemplation, I hope it's filled with moments of happiness and gratitude. As we welcome the arrival of spring and the promise of new life, may your heart be light and your spirits lifted. Here's to a season filled with blessings and abundant joy. Wishing you a wonderful Easter filled with love, laughter, and all the joys of the season! Thank you,
---
| | [ ](http://links.rogerwilliamsforcongress.com/els/v2/AYzVB~9Y_3Qa/dUMxSWtxOFhzYUx1TWJ0clhtSU9NZnhFZTM2NW1kdi91bDdrbXhsMHR6VFY5NXdQWWhUNWU3RHlUVGs1MWFDa2pSMzVoMCt4dElYMjdZZGF4cVgzcnFuODNMcDdWR2wvb0NmcmczYlRyZm89S0/)

---
---
|
* * *
---
| |
---
| | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter, On behalf of myself, my family, and the entire Williams Team, I wanted to wish you and your family a Happy Easter. May this Easter season bring you joy, peace, and renewal. Easter is a time of reflection and celebration, reminding us of the importance of hope and new beginnings. Whether you're spending the day with family and friends, or in quiet contemplation, I hope it's filled with moments of happiness and gratitude. As we welcome the arrival of spring and the promise of new life, may your heart be light and your spirits lifted. Here's to a season filled with blessings and abundant joy. Wishing you a wonderful Easter filled with love, laughter, and all the joys of the season! Thank you, | | | | Roger WilliamsTX-25 | | | | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | | | | ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. That’s why I’m asking for 2,000 more donations before my first big deadline of the year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. = = = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. If you'd like to support Defeat Republicans, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for us to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can If you’d like to unsubscribe from all our emails, click here: Defeat Republicans 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE Unit 15180 Washington, DC 20003

body:
Sen. Steve Roberts, D-St. Louis updates constituents on legislative actions this week in Jefferson City. | | | |
---
| | |
# Capitol Report
March 31, 2024
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=e36506d71f&e=a088917f89)
---
Sen. Steve Roberts, D-St. Louis updates constituents on legislative actions this week in Jefferson City.
|
---
| **Contact Senator Roberts** 201 W. Capitol Ave., Rm 329
Jefferson City, MO 65101
(573) 751-4415
Steve.Roberts@senate.mo.gov
---
| | | | | | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=3557e414fe&e=a088917f89)

| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=26f1951d44&e=a088917f89)

| | [](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=e540111c9d&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| **Happy Easter!** From my family to yours, have a safe and happy Easter.

Steve Roberts
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|

|

---
|

| **2024 SENATE BILLS**
[**SB 790**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b04edfc516&e=a088917f89) \- Creates the offense of unlawful possession of a firearm by a minor

[**SB 791**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=0aa2af0740&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to homelessness

[**SB 792**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=380bd9629f&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes the Revitalizing Missouri Downtowns and Main Streets Act

[**SB 883**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=4be9f847e6&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to compensation for wrongful convictions

[**SB 884**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b36349df8c&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to facilities of historic significance

[**SB 885**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=347639c649&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to school board elections in urban and metropolitan school districts

[**SB 965**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=291950a943&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a sales tax for special educational services

[**SB 966**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=0450bc5821&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a property tax for special educational services

[**SB 967**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=76324c7103&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the calculation of weighted average daily attendance used to calculate state aid for school districts

[**SB 1039**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5960d15bdf&e=a088917f89) \- Creates the Missouri Geospatial Advisory Council

[**SB 1040**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=ea75dc1a53&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to legal representation for certain court proceedings involving children

[**SB 1041**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=8fe6d1485e&e=a088917f89)\- Modifies provisions relating to benevolent tax credits

[**SB 1096**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=bb4fb69c76&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution

[**SB 1097**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=aa14f0b9ff&e=a088917f89) \- Creates certificates of exemplary conduct and good moral character issued by circuit courts

[**SB 1098**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=ace5039152&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to inmate phone call fees

[**SB 1147**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=8953254774&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility

[**SB 1148**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=697db8be10&e=a088917f89) \- Repeals provisions relating to the caseload of public defenders

[**SB 1149**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=ab3f964a06&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to delinquent property taxes

[**SB 1191**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2749a75073&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons

[**SB 1192**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=58f6899551&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to grants for nonprofit organizations at risk for terrorist attacks

[**SB 1193**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=ceb909b152&e=a088917f89) \- Enacts new law relating to wage range inquiries by employees and prospective employees

[**SB 1215**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b4176fb9ef&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines

[**SB 1263**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=91166b827c&e=a088917f89)\- Modifies eligibility for appropriations from the Waterways and Ports Trust Fund

|

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=d1798cfdf5&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
---
|
---
| **SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES** Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5819c9f774&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=a6bd00c81f&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.
---
|
---
| ** COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST** The[ United Way](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=edcb800301&e=a088917f89) has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call _866-211-9966_. [Beyond Housing](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=93a65e0d38&e=a088917f89):
[STL Response](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=df5b994cf5&e=a088917f89):
[Legal Services of Eastern Missouri:](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=58a807cda8&e=a088917f89)

| **MEDICAL RESOURCES** The Department of Health COVID-19 hotline is open from 8 a.m. - 10 p.m.
Call 314-657-1499 with questions or concerns. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at [877-435-8411](tel:%20\(877\)%20435-8411).

| [ ](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=7d846ddd1c&e=a088917f89)
