---
| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=2cfb25f12d&e=a088917f89).

Check the Status of your Missouri State Tax refund

trees, graffiti, potholes or other such items, please report them to the
Citizens' Service Bureau. You can call 314-622-4800 or report online at [**this link.**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=e9a1a760fc&e=a088917f89)

name: John Pierce
subject: J6: Help Save this Grandmother from 3 years in prison!
body:
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZdFk5ETQFmsGTlSboZe_sw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7AxyP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEKHcJZoGxLmpSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Rebecca drove 25 hours across our nation to attend the January 6th Rally in 2021. Three years later, she faces three years in federal prison and fines of up to $200,000. Why? [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZdFk5ETQFmsGTlSboZe_sw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7AxyP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEKHcJZoGxLmpSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Patriot,

Rebecca Lavrenz is a registered nurse and mother proud of her six grandchildren and one great-grandson.

She is a patriot who loves her country and will fight for it peacefully.

Rebecca drove 25 hours across our nation to attend the January 6th Rally in 2021.

Three years later, she faces three years in federal prison and fines of up to $200,000.

Why? She walked into the Nation's Capital for 10 minutes. She followed a crowd who stepped in without police telling them to stop. She said nothing while in the building and damaged nothing. She prayed to "bring God inside the Capitol" with her presence and prayers.

My name is John Pierce, and I represent Rebecca and over 30 other January 6th defendants **[who need your help](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZdFk5ETQFmsGTlSboZe_sw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7AxyP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEKHcJZoGxLmpSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA).**

My organization, the National Constitutional Law Union, has been fighting for these Americans on shoestring budgets for years while facing the unstoppable Goliath, the Department of Justice.

Biden's DOJ is making us fight every step of the way. They refuse to produce discovery and the 302s of the FBI's interviews related to Rebecca's case. A 302 is a form used by the FBI to summarize an interview, and since they don't record interviews to protect themselves, the 302 is a key piece of evidence needed to vindicate my client.

And the DOJ and FBI do this regularly, requiring me to ask a judge to compel them to produce evidence that should have been handed over before trial.

Why do they do this?

To wear me out. The more filings and hearings needed to defend these Americans add to the expense and time. We have limited resources, and as you know, our Department of Justice has no limit to what it's willing to spend to imprison any American who stepped foot on Capital grounds on January 6th.

Rebecca Lavrenz did no harm and is a victim of Biden's zealous mission to send one message to the American people. That message is this: "NEVER stand up to your government!"

But their message is falling on deaf ears, and **[I need your help to send a message right back to them](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZdFk5ETQFmsGTlSboZe_sw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7AxyP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEKHcJZoGxLmpSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** by saving this Christian grandmother from federal prison.

**[Will you chip in today to help cover our costs in defending Rebecca and over 30 other patriots?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZdFk5ETQFmsGTlSboZe_sw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7AxyP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEKHcJZoGxLmpSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Rebecca's trial is right around the corner, and I need to cover airline travel for myself and my staff along with hotel rooms for weeks--as long as it takes.

**[Any amount you can donate is greatly appreciated.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZdFk5ETQFmsGTlSboZe_sw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7AxyP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEKHcJZoGxLmpSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

**[Please donate whatever you can afford and pray for Rebecca and her family as the trial nears.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZdFk5ETQFmsGTlSboZe_sw~~/AARclAA~/RgRn7AxyP0SiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uYXRpb25hbC1jb25zdGl0dXRpb25hbC1sYXctdW5pb24vcmViZWNjYS1qNi1tYi1wb3BhP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9cmViZWNjYS1qNiZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPXBvcGEmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW1iJnV0bV90Yz1VQ04tMjAyNDAzMzEmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYEKHcJZoGxLmpSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

** In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce

name: Diane Sare
subject: Easter, A Time for Reflection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240331_easter_message&n=1)
---
Friend, On March 29, 2002, Lyndon LaRouche delivered a powerful message, "[Easter, A Time for Reflection](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=Df5Qo3PE-FYC4VCN1s2qouMKj5sEPE12jY6XbyrfBJ8OQ0wFn7kfOSkkpkG6OBxhMN6e0D_r3i8HHLJUrp4D9Q&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240331_easter_message&n=2)." _"On the Isle of Capri, the Octavian who was later enthroned as the Emperor Augustus, sealed a pact with the priests of Mithra. Through aid of that pact, he overturned the reign of Mark Antony and Cleopatra, and established the evil which was the Roman Empire. During his reign, Jesus Christ was born. It became the pleasure of Augustus' adopted successor, the Emperor Tiberius, also at Capri, to receive the news of his agent's, Pontius Pilate's judicial murder of Christ._ _"Augustus and Tiberius have had many imitators in modern times...."_ And so they have. President Biden, who claims to be a Christian of the Catholic persuasion, chose Maundy Thursday to hold an obscene fundraiser at Radio City Music Hall, where millionaires, blind to the suffering of the world, paid up to $500,000 per seat, which I am happy to have [at least briefly disrupted.](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=0ay3FGsaOH9VGmCP2xetHscTeZA8zTZ70Wed7P9IhqEn3tbQsLh7vsQnZAFSR-zgITb_bII0_YmupIlH5oUI0A&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240331_easter_message&n=3) But Biden is not the only imitator of the bloody Roman emperors. We have Macron, King Charles, Netanyahu, Zelinsky, and a gaggle of self-righteous billionaires in the City of London and Wall Street who believe that they can impose their perverse agenda on the rest of humanity, but they will not prevail, any more than Tiberius or Nero, or Netanyahu's hero Genghis Khan did, if we act now. LaRouche continues, "_My message to you is this; to achieve a sublime result, you must let yourself be inspired by a sublime thought, and combine that thought, as Jeanne d'Arc did, with the will to risk whatever that sublime intention demands of you._ _"On this occasion, you should focus your attention upon the great work of Johann Sebastian Bach, in his**Passion of St. John** , and, most notably, the [**Passion of St. Matthew**.](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=cWgbLvmFQ2PvtnKwJ1wKJMz_9zTaYMkP60jMSN9iScWUsKTPpVjybYayEPCTb_io&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240331_easter_message&n=4) These musical services for Easter-time were intended for the participation of the congregation and musicians, to enable them better to relive the sublime experience of Christ's own passion. This treatment by Bach is outstanding for the power with which it conveys the clearest and most loving message any Christian could be capable of delivering to any people, of any profession, in these terrible times, in any part of the world today..."_ _[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=cWgbLvmFQ2PvtnKwJ1wKJMz_9zTaYMkP60jMSN9iScWUsKTPpVjybYayEPCTb_io&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240331_easter_message&n=5)Rembrandt-- Christ and St Mary at the Tomb, 1638_ And so, I wish all of you a joyous Easter, and a beautiful day of reflection, whatever your faith may be, that we each find the strength within to act for the good. \--Diane **Please plan to participate in our ballot-access mobilization meeting on Monday, April 1 with the RSVP below. The meeting will be at 8:30 pm EDT. ** | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/20240401_petitioners_zoom?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240331_easter_message&n=6 "RSVP for April 1 Zoom Meeting") [RSVP for April 1 Zoom Meeting](https://www.sareforsenate.com/20240401_petitioners_zoom?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240331_easter_message&n=6)

The ‘folks out east’ who tried to bribe me and who run this country from the shadows with their dark money machine have found a new target. ME.

**First:** The Clinton-Soros machine endorsed my opponent.

**Then:** They funded a lawsuit against me for using my First Amendment right as a citizen and a concerned mom.

**Now:** I’m asking for your help to meet a MIDNIGHT fundraising deadline so we can FIGHT BACK and get to work on the one thing that matters in 2024. SAVING THIS NATION.

subject: Happy Easter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
My friend, I hope this message finds you and your loved ones filled with joy and happiness as we celebrate Easter Sunday.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=672aabaa51d94fa0bb36faa764c92c16&_e=I9ThHzU-gmLw3pytk1vl4FdXjjqTIflCAJj5hln_CBou_0hHXX7YXCqmtUeape3TbnHs7n5iaVlD2a7bK-x_W24x-v1D3yRB28nM9SCsiIITsg7wWXOyK_1TNhpONlh_48o0EWJeJ1WCTCz5_hrZtJzA4rzSj_785Ls3pmViQIl53v--28ScL-0ErilkWslKAEeyxz_6aImJC7pRwLcVON2PR4sPopIkeE7Hevqn8BLRocJZanWiIJLI_tn348RkEPphwvk1B7deBET8AeoGTwjNy_-NL4P7veBs9xFqFcTbp5bDyhnOGPxfd0QRhxXd1IAI4v8OSLA87298vLhopr6c8PWrDrZN1Awrse10OVG-SHbtOSx9CDlt_3kgNO0V8ooexqqAfpRngj0tDZY9kEh2OEshmqh8n36X8Szo-UE%3D) My friend, I hope this message finds you and your loved ones filled with joy and happiness as we celebrate Easter Sunday. On behalf of myself, my family, and the entire team, I want to extend our warmest wishes to you and your loved ones. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82044315/464285703/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240331_f_eoq5_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YzE1Yzg3YS02ZmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T3OwMABdj2bHYTuGPl1x1Z8NXuI5TCGlBjCU_mzOgRw=&emci=5015c87a-6fef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=5c15c87a-6fef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=1037277)

| | Midnight tonight is our end-of-quarter deadline. It’s a big moment to ensure we have the resources needed to keep up the fight against anti-voter forces who want to make it harder for Black, brown, and young people to cast their ballots. And it’s our first deadline since Georgia GOP lawmakers passed a bill, just this past Thursday, intended to legislate mass disenfranchisement and voter suppression. [**With the election less than eight months away, and early voting starting even sooner, your gift of $20 can ensure Fair Fight has the resources we need to sustain our pro-democracy, pro-voter programs all the way through November and beyond. Your support matters. Your donation matters. It's our only chance to fund a winning campaign. $25 to help us fight back against the attack ads from MAGA extremists who will do everything they can to return to the White House. $25 because democracy doesn't happen by accident. We have to defend it, fight for it, strengthen it, renew it. $25 because we are still in a battle for the soul of the nation, and I can't do this without you. The primary election is three weeks away, and we are working to ensure a massive turnout of voters to turn Pennsylvania from purple to blue. 🟣→🔵 To achieve this goal, we need your support. There are only a few hours left until our first end-of-quarter deadline of the year. We’re kicking our efforts into overdrive to get more PA Democrats elected up and down the ballot, but we can’t do it without your support. [We need all hands on deck, Peter. name: Matt Cartwright
subject: Happy Easter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
May your day be filled with joy, love, and many blessings.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82045721/464290089/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmVlN2FlMy03MGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xi58HGT2RQl3JuouJ9Ezic1D5Hqtt7NwgLLgPeyfRqw=&emci=59ebb94e-02ee-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=c6ee7ae3-70ef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a very Happy Easter!

Today is undoubtedly a significant day for campaigns like ours, with the end-of-quarter deadline looming tonight. However, amidst the hustle and bustle, I believe that time spent with family, friends, and loved ones is always the most precious.

As you gather with your loved ones to celebrate this special day, please know that I am immensely grateful for your unwavering support and dedication to our cause. Your belief in our vision for a brighter future means the world to me, and I am consistently inspired by your commitment to our shared values.

Thank you for all that you do. May your Easter be filled with joy, love, and many blessings.

clean_body: May your day be filled with joy, love, and many blessings. | Peter, I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a very Happy Easter! Today is undoubtedly a significant day for campaigns like ours, with the end-of-quarter deadline looming tonight. However, amidst the hustle and bustle, I believe that time spent with family, friends, and loved ones is always the most precious. As you gather with your loved ones to celebrate this special day, please know that I am immensely grateful for your unwavering support and dedication to our cause. Your belief in our vision for a brighter future means the world to me, and I am consistently inspired by your commitment to our shared values. Thank you for all that you do. May your Easter be filled with joy, love, and many blessings. – Matt | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Twitter" | Paid for by Cartwright for Congress | Cartwright For Congress PO Box 414 Scranton, PA 18501 United States Click here to from the Cartwright for Congress.

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Tonight’s deadline is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
**The Long Run PAC End-of-Quarter Donations Tracker:**
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mar24.wCUGOx&refcode=em240328-1-tt&t=1&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mar24.wCUGOx&refcode=em240328-1-tt&t=2&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)
Hey there, it’s Mandela.
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to contribute to The Long Run and our movement to help us elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November.
But first, I need to explain why your donation today is so critical.
**Tonight at midnight, we face our critical March end-of-quarter deadline. We have had deadlines in the past, but honestly, this deadline is different.**
Why? Because this deadline is the very first of the election year.
After this deadline, we will be making final decisions on which races to continue supporting until November. And as we get further into the election year, we need a tremendous amount of resources to continue supporting Democrats that will help keep the Senate and flip the House blue.
So far, this team has supported many trailblazing candidates, including Colin Allred in Texas, Ruben Gallego in Arizona, Sarah Klee Hood in New York, and Angela Alsobrooks in Maryland. But with the stakes of this election being so high, these campaigns will need much more funding and support than ever before if they are going to win.
**Our work is critical to the success of many campaigns and we cannot leave any stone unturned.**
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to The Long Run today before our end-of-quarter deadline at midnight tonight? I am asking you because I know you care about the future of our country and the work we are doing.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mar24.wCUGOx&refcode=em240328-1-tt&t=3&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-mar24.y10yZW&amount=3&refcode=em240328-1-tt&t=22&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-mar24.Kgnm76&refcode=em240328-1-tt&t=23&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-mar24.D0abzu&refcode=em240328-1-tt&t=24&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-mar24.aJG6g3&refcode=em240328-1-tt&t=25&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-mar24.v85B1E&refcode=em240328-1-tt&t=26&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mar24.wCUGOx&refcode=em240328-1-tt&t=27&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)
Your support today will be critical to the success of our movement and many other campaigns in the coming months, so I hope you will join me today.
With gratitude,
Mandela Barnes
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mar24.wCUGOx&refcode=em240328-1-tt&t=28&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=5262_196590_igblEz&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=32&akid=5262%2E196590%2EigblEz)

name: Matthew Diemer
subject: I need your help
body:
| |
---
Peter, I know you’re getting a lot of insane emails about deadlines. So I’ll try to keep this quick and level with you: Tonight is our end of quarter deadline. It’s a massive day for our campaign. We're running in a tight race in a swing district. So far, our Make Congress Work Again message has been wildly successful, and Ohioans of all political stripes are joining our movement. The only thing holding us back is our fundraising. My opponent Max Miller was born into the wealthy Cleveland aristocracy, and he's used his rich and MAGA connections to raise a ton of money. [Will you help us keep pace?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqueYr7edJk8d-KbippARHFYbeUBqdHsEhBmwLdZbCMCFPeiY6O0VG44G4-0AbgSbMKGz1FBPQql6nd0ps0KKG-g7cmUCa27OaVonOWs33qXlS_JtOCE1i8oUoLHTDeJfrntP2Jw5VvyMHJe2ZyN4cTPq0suISJravU-FwuL7WP7ief0c48wsZZspjTjkzGUZAtUxJ9jXSWVwuiJXofkTqnEyE7x2maKQJgOaiHr-n_bPpZT5vmrDZx-jkVHg2z1uEq6dAdMicW2s1YEHEFZxTWs02yzjQ_VrerOTIAp7RTpXg/454/lZ7dkzoQStqiDFap42Q7Jw/h0/h001.Iji1JqwCgox2k0VAjuV4GZ5fN1WnoGObtiipyIRVyPw) Max Miller is a far-right Trump devotee who was subpoenaed by the January 6th committee. We have a very strong chance of defeating him this November. We need more money fuel our campaign to victory. I don’t enjoy asking for money. [Will you donate to help us meet our goals?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqueYr7edJk8d-KbippARHFYbeUBqdHsEhBmwLdZbCMCFCAWfI2xafpKPz8s_NZbRzuoPFWc0nsiawlTegUcVDkF_tP9NHOwV1RVxaFuozznQLX9IxoXxukfB0dpWN4AjrCOVSYqR2NorzMQho5AeHm7u9CpYGnBmbtOyPHca4gl3ptDbSK-Jqb0dDxG7Snk2dtpU98RZ2Kd5XQ1vIHn4iq2K7qRLJoeG0yLhDjZUCljliAnj36x7rGr3NTkLC--5WAWNPGPVgDdqK-NNIiwkHyF7Wo7aqsReIQ-WbqdE1GjKQ/454/lZ7dkzoQStqiDFap42Q7Jw/h1/h001.5iuuWd_GulwTiP7qhfaXvIt6JMFAIhQeEW9DBlRPQU0)

[ **DONATE** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqueYr7edJk8d-KbippARHFYbeUBqdHsEhBmwLdZbCMCFAbpRKNN1j-8rNf_MYRNTJQPqQ2oXeHbu2PDk2u_mvGyExQQ32krbdrQU0VeQgLgREhFX8vQNRGkyCZqyg591u98wvvUmuz77ePXge0484Vw0kdrxYXWld-mD6cYcqBR7kcsgEjXlZ_IUHmAv0x0QDq1Oio2NKqO2OgKDF0TimrZuMeP6sGb73yZN5JWPzykVF9QTBE5DhQmL7hn_kfiSpjGmmS7JssQl3yDLpRGhI8KJ2_kn0hpHhzvVDX565tJGQ/454/lZ7dkzoQStqiDFap42Q7Jw/h2/h001.X5pJucRkbZGBE8xuaG-m7QXLOsaHb2xqgbJQrAvQypg)

name: Don Huffines
subject: He is risen, indeed!
body:
Rejoice—the LORD has risen! Give up all your anxieties to Him, and trust in Jesus to live in joy and peace.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-etyiyz-yuddtktydi-z/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-etyiyz-yuddtktydi-r/) FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: Noah Betz; 281-928-2089
[noah@bluestonecreatives.com](mailto:noah@bluestonecreatives.com) Patriot,Rejoice--the LORD has risen! Give up all your anxieties to Him, and trust in Jesus to live in joy and peace. The Lamb fulfilled the prophecies, defeated Satan, and gave us a chance to receive salvation.I love Easter--the Holiest day in the Christian faith. "He is not here; for He is risen, as He said. Come, see the place where the Lord lay." Matthew 28:6 **Hallelujah!** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-etyiyz-yuddtktydi-y/)
# Easter is the best time to really experience the love Jesus has for us. This song beautifully tells the story of the Passion; it's a tearjerker.
**The Biden Admin Hates You** Biden is senile and controlled by demon-loving advisors who are socialists living to destroy God and replace Him with government-sponsored religions... to destroy humanity.It's so sad -- the leaders of the largest Christian nation in the world don't realize that Satan has taken over their minds. May God bless you, your family, and the great state of Texas. Our greatest days are coming. body:
Over the years, VoteVets has built a big community. Every person on this team plays a part. And we know our top supporters aren’t just the folks who write the biggest checks.
#
Derek -
Over the years, VoteVets has built a big community. Every person on this team plays a part. And we know our top supporters aren’t just the folks who write the biggest checks.
It’s people like you, Derek. The ones who were there when everything was on the line.
Let us explain how we know you’re one of our top supporters.

We know you’re one of our top supporters because you are reading this email, right now. Your support has helped us run some of the most important, most impactful campaigns in politics.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t be competitive.
It helps us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It got the PACT Act across the finish line. It defeated Trump, took back the Senate, and held the line in the House. It forced Tommy Tuberville to back down. Right now, it’s helping us support Ukraine. And if we keep it up, it will help us win in November.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have skin in the game and contribute to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump openly leading us to authoritarianism, Putin on the march, and the future of our democracy on the line, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and defeating these liars and hypocrites in the most important election cycle in modern American history — the one we’re in right now.
[**If helping VoteVets run some of the most effective election ads of the cycle, ads that win races seems worth $5 to you, we’re humbly asking you to make that donation before our deadline at midnight. We need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar24.wfDmiq&refcode=em240331-1-30&t=1&akid=25011%2E3013755%2EVfuzHZ)

name: Sarah McBride
subject: We’re facing a big deadline tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Hey, it’s Sarah. |
---

Hey, it’s Sarah. First, I want to wish all those celebrating today a Happy Easter Sunday. I am spending this special holiday with my loved ones here at home, but I wanted to take a quick moment to reach out one more time this month. **Our campaign is facing our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of this election year at midnight. And it’s a big one!** After this deadline, everything we’ve raised so far in 2024 will be made publicly available. If we post a strong number, it will send a powerful and clear message to voters, the media, and those betting against us about the strength of our movement. **[If you’re in the place to do so, please consider making a donation of any amount to our campaign right now by clicking here. We only have a few hours left!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82047164/464294099/277518316?refcode=em20240331&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWUxOGMxZi03M2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IO4g0dCTnXbc9TzRex1UcjkZgd7Mb2AJTuenEziv6OA=)** | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82047165/464294101/-458855916?refcode=em20240331&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWUxOGMxZi03M2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IO4g0dCTnXbc9TzRex1UcjkZgd7Mb2AJTuenEziv6OA=)
---
Thank you for your continued support, and Happy Easter!
Sarah McBride

I am spending this special holiday with my loved ones here at home, but I wanted to take a quick moment to reach out one more time this month. Our campaign is facing our first FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of this election year at midnight. And it’s a big one! After this deadline, everything we’ve raised so far in 2024 will be made publicly available. If we post a strong number, it will send a powerful and clear message to voters, the media, and those betting against us about the strength of our movement. = | = Thank you for your continued support, and Happy Easter! name: Jon Tester
subject: Planting season is just around the corner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
Hey Peter, it’s Jon Tester.
As hard as it is for me to believe, planting season is just around the corner. That’s the thing about time, it always moves faster than we think it will.
I know it’s easy to look at the calendar and say “Election Day is far away. I’ve got time”—but I can tell you, every day matters and every action counts more than you know. Right now, I’m Mitch McConnell’s #1 target, and his super PACs have already committed $50 million to beat me... with more sure to follow.
**The truth is without your support helping us fight back against their attacks _today,_ we could lose this toss-up race in November.**
Outside groups will spend a truckload of money trying on this race, Peter, making this the most expensive election in Montana’s history.**Right now, we’re being outspent online, and that’s bad news**. So it’s absolutely critical we hit our first quarterly fundraising goal of 2024.
Everyday I wake up and fight for hardworking folks like you, to make health care more affordable, to lower costs for families, because it’s a fight worth fighting. But right now I need your help, and we’re running out of time.
[_**So please, will you split a couple of bucks between my campaign and Upset the Setup before the end-of-quarter deadline tonight? Right now is the best time to make a difference.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82047503/464294793/875059988?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240331_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4OTFlOTYyLTczZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eMvoxl7A6P3sW7O5yLQrstcYeys_BkS97reMUuEnfVw=)

clean_body: Hey Peter, it’s Jon Tester. As hard as it is for me to believe, planting season is just around the corner. That’s the thing about time, it always moves faster than we think it will. I know it’s easy to look at the calendar and say “Election Day is far away. I’ve got time”—but I can tell you, every day matters and every action counts more than you know. Right now, I’m Mitch McConnell’s #1 target, and his super PACs have already committed $50 million to beat me... with more sure to follow. The truth is without your support helping us fight back against their attacks today, we could lose this toss-up race in November. Outside groups will spend a truckload of money trying on this race, Peter, making this the most expensive election in Montana’s history.Right now, we’re being outspent online, and that’s bad news. So it’s absolutely critical we hit our first quarterly fundraising goal of 2024. Everyday I wake up and fight for hardworking folks like you, to make health care more affordable, to lower costs for families, because it’s a fight worth fighting. But right now I need your help, and we’re running out of time. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thanks. name: REPUBLICAN ROUNDUP [TOP PAC]
subject: Appalling Abbott, Dirty Dan, and more…
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, toppac
body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=QPK9CcHh4GVjTzOFkP3pWlv3WJwLY4XnzLkw2rmBegus9EnwMPme24tnGVJwXatXytLEKby9LGa4mpUS0lEmMQch%2FZGpACzym2xdpiUeooZL4SIweD%2FUiw1CjWX4rKm%2Bi5pCsEjFzFqNo%2Bb2MTdxx%2BTulslrNrgrP7pAcrqEYrEAGEZL2vVPeiQFeumurI%2B3YnuIpILZ1hnPTb0tN0fa8fR3w5QNWiQyr0QBDTLV5J5%2Fw7NqSHTRP0kqIrW11WSeEcZWSZhK1VRjqbur4xDoENOi33C7fiN%2By4MrDBHd1a8t16umZXeMDD1DuXTFvlzDn7wc5Hn%2BqGZptjTfKYFl936QZ3R%2Bygbfy3FK%2Byi8AbVsXHgq2L40eCuBczBGYhHSzWkIpUBOhfESpcoOBsH6DpOvFBRFqKkhGD8InYvNFFA%3D]

# [#]
Hey Peter, it’s the team here at TOP PAC. With our FIRST FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the election year less than 12 hours away, we wanted to remind you about all the Big Bads we’re dealing with in the Texas GOP this year. Help TOP PAC engage and mobilize Black and Latino voters with a donation toward our $10K end-of-quarter goal today, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24] and read on for our full Republican Roundup→

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24]Governor Greg Abbott
Of all the Republicans in Texas, Appalling Abbott might just be the worst. From publicly saying he would allow people to shoot immigrants if it weren’t illegal, to accepting the largest single political donation in Texas history ($6 million!) from a school-voucher-supporting GOP megadonor, one thing’s for sure: Greg has got to go. Donate now to help us fight back against Appalling Abbott! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24]Lt. Governor Dan Patrick
Notorious for his extreme anti-LGBTQ+ and anti-immigrant rhetoric, Dan Patrick’s long history of pushing conspiracy theories on national television almost rivals that of Donald Trump. On top of that, last year, he accepted a $3 million contribution from Defend Texas Liberty, a PAC tied to white supremacist Nick Fuentes. Rush a donation now to help us get rid of Dirty Dan! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24]Republican Party of Texas Chair Matt Rinaldi
Speaking of Defend Texas Liberty, Matt Rinaldi has been vehemently defending the group (and its ties to blatant white supremacy) for months — all while working as an attorney for one of the PAC’s billionaire donors. We can’t allow someone like Rinaldi to hold a position of political leadership in our state. Will you donate now to help us push back against his extremist agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24]Attorney General Ken Paxton
Ken Paxton recently stood trial for impeachment in the Texas Senate for abusing the powers of his office. He also made a name for himself as the man who viciously targeted Dallas mom Kate Cox and personally took away her right to receive a life-saving abortion in Texas for a nonviable pregnancy. When Ken isn’t attacking our reproductive rights, he travels the country [https://www.washingtonpost.com/nation/2024/02/02/paxton-texas-attorney-general-transgender/] seeking medical records of children who have been forced to leave Texas to receive gender-affirming treatment due to the statewide ban on transgender care for minors. Help us put an end to Paxton’s disgusting witch-hunts with a donation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24]

Together, we can chip away at the GOP’s hold on our state, elect candidates up and down the ballot who will truly represent our Black and Latino communities and build a Texas that works for ALL — no matter our age, race, gender, or ZIP code. All we’re asking from you is a donation of any amount before our public-facing deadline TONIGHT at midnight: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

body:
We’re falling behind.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82047790/464295664/-849459103?refcode=ea.171bf38a-73ef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.171bf38a-73ef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzFiZjM4YS03M2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qLufto-9PM8xmm-4zbX_xYltuDbXktYMFaeLZVCGss0=&emci=78baa743-eded-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=171bf38a-73ef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483)

body:
Since October, our campaign has received donations from 30,000 new donors. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWFomElzycROwVNHJLBV2THZKGUHCUUgPWBrMn8OzADN7ofjvujw_andQtIIwJs9fS2ScP3GqrIZOs6dUBZrwErg5KFxW8c6udrMhzIhQeNY99FIF86Nn_5ZTFrnlW6ZZNpY0jQkjmFlb3S6gfuHcaRJ3pa8O8NvKFrl5kDX01Uv5sDRFvN88QIRjWQJ_-Yg8jukFj38OH82DgE_jnrAoDiw/454/mV_n-dBiScO3drBOv8XrZA/h0/h001.xVn-Obf3_s-WSj7mLjezxE3x8C-ew-HAKmRpmy6Kit8)

Friend, Rashida Tlaib doesn’t accept corporate contributions, relying instead on the support of thousands of grassroots supporters from across Michigan and the country. **Over the last 5 months as our government has facilitated a genocide, 30,000 new supporters have donated to support Rashida’s voice in our movement to save lives with a permanent ceasefire and equal human rights for the Palestinian people.** **As the only Palestinian American member of Congress, Rashida’s bold leadership is essential.** It helped pave the way for the 79 members of Congress to come out in support of a ceasefire, and more are starting to take stands against U.S. military aid to Israel. But, many Congressmembers remain intimidated by threats from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC, which has pledged to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat Rashida and other pro-ceasefire candidates running for election or re-election this year. Just this week, AIPAC paid for members of Congress to fly to Israel and meet with the genocidal Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. We must continue to grow our pro-ceasefire movement in the face of AIPAC’s $100 million campaign. **Tonight at midnight we will close the books on a critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and we need to continue to show the power of our grassroots anti-war movement.** [**Rush an end-of-quarter contribution today to show Rashida that you have her back and show the media and our opponents that our ceasefire movement is strong and growing.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqub4d4PRgLjInf7rke4sDCZ4WeG69RyJc2N6cItNEPu4l2pXCwfbgvM0bHhRWKXyY9XxdTrxyRgj0CmO3FQyWMDB0yyhsuMZyaYoS0jUtHKzySZ6XFh9qFvnFTKZmQEvyUyw5dsyGQ9RUKYA9kkbUWCCV3caVEwX443nBj53TmwoQn_JIVbceQxd6lRh_enYbOmqTBKE-zZB9GA2mwgTf5yQjHz-hbC_FNJWzLnuvzkGMhIBE2efpAbNJGFfb3m0fdaJYxv_lDOLKA6zGwOZAb2ta9UPuOy5Pgx9dY0cnpi7hIInKrVnYCTDjrSvWP2gaJfjMdwih8X4bocG1_6GuFwcrKutlJfegsdNaEuE6WTXdcjPc97j-V4avlfzpY9SGg/454/mV_n-dBiScO3drBOv8XrZA/h1/h001.cpZg2_16SphIBuFrpHF6oDmFjoxa_AABjPdwzOYRWhQ) | [RUSH A DONATION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqub4d4PRgLjInf7rke4sDCZ4WeG69RyJc2N6cItNEPu4sNAB3pNGLHKOPvETt9e7eWdZBGZ1CEClSInBpXCS8VbvFneIIDndVhQ7MUGTKt8iLfW-pruk9mrwelVSEQG267mdKEsPk_CTk4zNzKtxq29XPyrE8ElGqiurYK1yfbudiqKzQPH9pfMH54s4yeJFOWum0mOLiuIAU1GxzyS1n67htRYGy7LKsYp3wwZCqTNl8KrPY_YZNfGxgvnFJdjkZhjMF2VqoXsrJvoSJrgRnGv3JQre2xKY9Y1w-GPpNL25CeF5kjMVl8yvQwC_vBHns07KnfhCZmwTrPkS1RUkHy-l2hFpJ_K5c9h3WqpMFuA9eNPPDAdYKoUsT1R2PsUdHE/454/mV_n-dBiScO3drBOv8XrZA/h2/h001.12yp6abHgY7SmLQxU5Qh9lcvwZ5xjx0Dk-0mHSodg-I)

AIPAC has already been running racist ads, attacking Rashida and misrepresenting her views.
Rashida believes in the humanity of all people. The cries of Palestinian and Israeli children sound no different to her. That’s why she is demanding an immediate, lasting ceasefire to save lives and ensure basic human rights for Palestinians who have been living under an apartheid system of government and an inhumane blockade. That’s how we build safety for all people, to treat all life as sacred.
Our movement for human rights is growing, as more people are outraged by our government’s complicity and want the horrors to stop. A majority of Americans (and 75% of Democrats) disapprove of Israeli military action in Gaza. These public opinion shifts matter, and they get the attention of leaders in our federal government with the power to change policy.

clean_body: Since October, our campaign has received donations from 30,000 new donors. | | | Friend, Rashida Tlaib doesn’t accept corporate contributions, relying instead on the support of thousands of grassroots supporters from across Michigan and the country. Over the last 5 months as our government has facilitated a genocide, 30,000 new supporters have donated to support Rashida’s voice in our movement to save lives with a permanent ceasefire and equal human rights for the Palestinian people. As the only Palestinian American member of Congress, Rashida’s bold leadership is essential. It helped pave the way for the 79 members of Congress to come out in support of a ceasefire, and more are starting to take stands against U.S. military aid to Israel. But, many Congressmembers remain intimidated by threats from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC, which has pledged to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat Rashida and other pro-ceasefire candidates running for election or re-election this year. Just this week, AIPAC paid for members of Congress to fly to Israel and meet with the genocidal Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. We must continue to grow our pro-ceasefire movement in the face of AIPAC’s $100 million campaign. Tonight at midnight we will close the books on a critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and we need to continue to show the power of our grassroots anti-war movement. | AIPAC has already been running racist ads, attacking Rashida and misrepresenting her views. Rashida believes in the humanity of all people. The cries of Palestinian and Israeli children sound no different to her. That’s why she is demanding an immediate, lasting ceasefire to save lives and ensure basic human rights for Palestinians who have been living under an apartheid system of government and an inhumane blockade. That’s how we build safety for all people, to treat all life as sacred. Our movement for human rights is growing, as more people are outraged by our government’s complicity and want the horrors to stop. A majority of Americans (and 75% of Democrats) disapprove of Israeli military action in Gaza. These public opinion shifts matter, and they get the attention of leaders in our federal government with the power to change policy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for having Rashida’s back and for helping to grow our movement for life-affirming change. -Team Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82054387/464304863/-686654137?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20240331_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjMwNmU0YmItNzdlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Wf_nNaDjy8XBbSAAvpKTYcqUXUuqJvWsV2UpFataW7g=) Folks,

Have I ever told you how I got into public service?

**I grew up the son of hardworking farmworkers.** My family lived in a small trailer in rural California where my brother and I shared a bed that in the daytime converted into a kitchen table.

When I was a teenager, I walked in the desert heat to different businesses asking them to invest in our community by investing in me and my dreams of a college education. I made them a promise that I would come back to the Coachella Valley to serve our community as a physician in return for their trust in me.

I not only returned to serve as an emergency physician, but eventually was elected to serve my community in Congress. For more than a decade, I’ve fought every day for my family, friends, and neighbors who dream the same dream my parents had for me.

**Those memories have come flooding back lately.** Because I’ve spent entirely too much time listening to the MAGA circus go round after round, attacking each other, blaming Democrats, and doing everything they can _EXCEPT_ serving the American people.

**And that’s part and parcel for the extreme MAGA caucus.** Instead of doing the hard work of reaching across the aisle to build consensus, they grind our government to a halt to play partisan games.

Instead of building progress and promise for the next generation of Americans, they desperately scratch and claw their way to their own power, everyone else be damned. **They’re not public servants – they only serve themselves, and I’m sick of it.**

**They need to get their house in order. They need to end the chaos. They need to do their jobs. But I’m not waiting around for them, team, I’m taking action.**

[**I’m taking a lesson from my teenage self here – together we can defeat the MAGA chaos caucus and win back control of the House. But I can’t do it alone. So I’m counting on you here, friend. Can you pitch in $10 (or anything you can afford) toward our 1,000 donation goal today and help us take back our House Majority and end the MAGA chaos? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82054388/464304864/-686654137?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=RRFC_20240331_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjMwNmU0YmItNzdlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Wf_nNaDjy8XBbSAAvpKTYcqUXUuqJvWsV2UpFataW7g=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82054398/464304872/-686654137?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RRFC_20240331_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjMwNmU0YmItNzdlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Wf_nNaDjy8XBbSAAvpKTYcqUXUuqJvWsV2UpFataW7g=)

TONIGHT is our first FEC fundraising deadline of the year. We set a goal to hit $25K and we're not exactly where we need to be — but we've _almost_ hit the mark. We have **less than four weeks** to give it all we've got before the primary election, and every single thing we do between now and April 23 is going to be CRITICAL to the outcome of the election.

With just 12 HOURS left until tonight's end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, we're just asking for $12. We've crunched the numbers, so believe us when we tell you that if _every single person reading this email donates just $12_ , we'll already have more than met our goal.

body:
When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in community.

| Hi, it’s Ritchie. It’s been a while since I introduced myself to you, Peter.

[If you’ve been on Team Ritchie from day 1, you can click here to skip my story and support our grassroots movement »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82054585/464305154/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240331_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTA2ZTRiYi03N2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_ecRg6HmsHGve5RXj-5yRH8aAFPOFS7EA0K52CXd-k=)

**_Here’s a little bit about me:_**

📍 I was born and raised in the Bronx.

🏠 Growing up with a single mom, public housing was a lifeline for my family — so I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for affordable housing and building social safety nets to eliminate poverty.

🏳️🌈 I’m the first openly LGBTQ+ Afro-Latino man in Congress. My lived experience as a gay Black man motivates me to fight _every day_ until we are fully equal in the eyes of the law.

👊🏽 I’m a tireless advocate for Social Security and Medicare. I believe proper health care cannot be limited to physical health, and I’ll continue to advocate tirelessly for access to mental health care.

**_And here’s why my story matters for you:_**

When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in _community._

From fighting for affordable housing to community initiatives to Medicare and more, I know this grassroots movement is capable of _changing the game_ for the Bronx.

**I’ve got your back, Peter, and I’m hoping you’ve got mine:[Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can afford, to help me continue fighting for you? We’re aiming for 12 more donations from PA by midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82054587/464305155/-866719404?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20240331_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTA2ZTRiYi03N2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_ecRg6HmsHGve5RXj-5yRH8aAFPOFS7EA0K52CXd-k=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82054594/464305163/-866719404?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20240331_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTA2ZTRiYi03N2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F_ecRg6HmsHGve5RXj-5yRH8aAFPOFS7EA0K52CXd-k=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in community. | Hi, it’s Ritchie. It’s been a while since I introduced myself to you, Peter. = Here’s a little bit about me: 📍 I was born and raised in the Bronx. 🏠 Growing up with a single mom, public housing was a lifeline for my family — so I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for affordable housing and building social safety nets to eliminate poverty. 🏳️🌈 I’m the first openly LGBTQ+ Afro-Latino man in Congress. My lived experience as a gay Black man motivates me to fight every day until we are fully equal in the eyes of the law. 👊🏽 I’m a tireless advocate for Social Security and Medicare. I believe proper health care cannot be limited to physical health, and I’ll continue to advocate tirelessly for access to mental health care. And here’s why my story matters for you: When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in community. From fighting for affordable housing to community initiatives to Medicare and more, I know this grassroots movement is capable of changing the game for the Bronx. I’ve got your back, Peter, and I’m hoping you’ve got mine:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Your donation fuels this people-powered coalition — and I can’t thank you enough for your support. Together, — Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: A last ditch request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1282%2E135344%2EOxfQo0)

Friend --
I’m invading your inbox this afternoon with a last-ditch request: Can you please make a contribution to my Senate campaign before our FEC fundraising deadline ends tonight at midnight? If you have been thinking about donating to our campaign, now would be the time.
[**https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/March_EOQ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240331-2-700&t=2&akid=1282%2E135344%2EOxfQo0)**
If you’ve been meaning to make your first donation to my Senate campaign, I’d love it if you could make today the day.
Because tonight at the stroke of midnight, this public reporting period is over. We need as much momentum as possible to show that we are a formidable opponent to the eventual GOP nominee. And with the Republican field shifting so much recently, this public fundraising report will be looked through with a fine tooth comb to see how we stack up.
The polls are showing that this Senate race in Michigan is a dead heat with a lot of voters still undecided. That’s who we need to get to. If we fall short of our goal before our FEC deadline ends, it delays us talking to crucial voters early -- especially in places outside of my current congressional district. I need to introduce myself to the 10 million people in Michigan, and an early introduction could be the difference between winning or losing next year.
[**So please: Can you make your first online contribution to my Senate campaign before the FEC fundraising deadline ends tonight at midnight? I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240331-2-700&t=3&akid=1282%2E135344%2EOxfQo0)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-mar24.radpj1&amount=3&refcode=em240331-2-700&t=22&akid=1282%2E135344%2EOxfQo0)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-mar24.tT69PV&refcode=em240331-2-700&t=23&akid=1282%2E135344%2EOxfQo0)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-mar24.bHdrFB&refcode=em240331-2-700&t=24&akid=1282%2E135344%2EOxfQo0)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-mar24.Zz-2ft&refcode=em240331-2-700&t=25&akid=1282%2E135344%2EOxfQo0)**

****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-mar24.eLk0oo&refcode=em240331-2-700&t=26&akid=1282%2E135344%2EOxfQo0)**

---
****
Thank you,
Elissa Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=1282%2E135344%2EOxfQo0).

The polls are showing that this Senate race in Michigan is a dead heat with a lot of voters still undecided. That’s who we need to get to. If we fall short of our goal before our FEC deadline ends, it delays us talking to crucial voters early -- especially in places outside of my current congressional district. I need to introduce myself to the 10 million people in Michigan, and an early introduction could be the difference between winning or losing next year. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Elissa Slotkin PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

subject: I am humbly asking for your support ahead of my critical FEC deadline at midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82055210/464306467/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDliNjA2ZS03OGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cl1-H1Rgxztc1kOqzF1tKxBhNmJZZj6hIr3G6BxQhq0=)
Team —
Over the past week, my team reached out regarding our critical FEC deadline tonight. At midnight, that deadline comes to a close, and I am humbly asking one more time for your support.
**[Can you please rush a $3 contribution to my reelection campaign before midnight tonight? I cannot continue fighting for accountability and meaningful change in Congress without your steadfast support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82055211/464306468/60992963?refcode2=e49b606e-78ef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&refcode=em240331-1-f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDliNjA2ZS03OGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cl1-H1Rgxztc1kOqzF1tKxBhNmJZZj6hIr3G6BxQhq0=)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82055212/464306469/60992963?refcode2=e49b606e-78ef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&refcode=em240331-1-f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDliNjA2ZS03OGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cl1-H1Rgxztc1kOqzF1tKxBhNmJZZj6hIr3G6BxQhq0=)**
I am going to level with you. This quarter hasn't been easy. I have been spending a lot of time negotiating with Republicans in an attempt to avert government shutdowns, criticizing Republicans' sham impeachment hearings in the House oversight committee, and working on bills that will benefit Americans. To sum it all up, I have been working hard to fight for the people that elected me.
But that also means I can’t spend as much time focusing on my reelection campaign and fundraising. And my MAGA competitor has been using that to his advantage.
This campaign was built from the ground up by grassroots supporters, like you, chipping in a few bucks at a time when they can. My MAGA competitor can't say the same. He’s already loaned himself hundreds of thousands of dollars to self-fund his campaign.
The only way I can compete with that kind of money is if I have your support every step of the way.
**Tonight, we have an opportunity to prove that I have a coalition behind me ready to fight for California, the accountability of lawmakers, and a better country. And if we put up the strongest numbers we can on our FEC report, we will prove the depth of grassroots support we have for our movement.**
So as we approach our FEC deadline at midnight, I am asking:
**[Can you contribute $3 or anything you can afford to my reelection campaign ahead of my critical FEC deadline at midnight? I would not ask if it weren't important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82055213/464306470/60992963?refcode2=e49b606e-78ef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&refcode=em240331-1-f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDliNjA2ZS03OGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cl1-H1Rgxztc1kOqzF1tKxBhNmJZZj6hIr3G6BxQhq0=)**
I am grateful for the support this team has given me so far and I will continue to fight for Americans, our democracy, and the accountability of lawmakers as long as I serve in Congress.
Thank you,
Robert

subject: Smackdown: The Sun v. The Times
body:
If you're tired of the New York Times acting like the most important newspaper in America, it's time to join the Sun and our fast growing movement to save American journalism.
Are you tired of the New York Times?

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9aa70426e64e4f6a89ae43dfa247339c&_e=bK_G8dZCLrEOmrYFj0ISEyNzMTpeSde24W3XhttSOtAowL1aTE5X8Io-k_oHwWuxb7fyt5Z1XNQz-XcJpspjGUVTRtA5BLISwNj6y5Jek4d3GTyEsaik8jWmLAn8TIS7bvYr03ddS4A-PtrV9xuArwaQhaNwOyBRxip7wf2Zoyt_Ow9APnfcGdGrs3IK5tSzUd9gHyTVPdz1eIJFheKenCepInjdMkdaYeiiNK87TSitSTRWkv5USNn_MvdzDiCw9q7NzV0Xta38BbLgxWsOL_JEJduxB5dTK-QkD0DUtlG5tYhrAWy1vZgqHNB3075cXGzl8Z9nPsZ-ha9AxeiWImTzR1Dg7shFaQcmqMTXMTtrmeUE6trR3h4Vr68XtHV7)

| | Dear Peter,For far too long the New York Times has dominated American journalism. It calls itself the "paper of record" and claims it publishes "all the news that's fit to print."But Americans know that the Times doesn't have their best interests at heart. The good news is that the Times' historic rival is back in business and quickly reclaiming market share. The New York Sun is a paper that fights for the American people and promises to "shine for all." Most of all, the Sun loves America and is fully committed to upholding the Constitution.[JOIN THE NEW YORK SUN](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9aa70426e64e4f6a89ae43dfa247339c&_e=bK_G8dZCLrEOmrYFj0ISEyNzMTpeSde24W3XhttSOtAowL1aTE5X8Io-k_oHwWuxb7fyt5Z1XNQz-XcJpspjGUVTRtA5BLISwNj6y5Jek4d3GTyEsaik8jWmLAn8TIS7bvYr03ddS4A-PtrV9xuArwaQhaNwOyBRxip7wf2Zoyt_Ow9APnfcGdGrs3IK5tSzUd9gHyTVPdz1eIJFheKenIEX8mpyKvW_kw1qlUuN-0-_rciytLf7RPVzJRyiC16Dp7wU0Folqiu0QQmHoEaUDnFJ-jtbgg3IolZz-xMFQM4GKV4p8F6b12qEftpIUE4naljfnekgOUQo3YvKbeTOmErJ3WxRaj4R1ItkYW1b9smaC_YbgF4ofYM-LQMeGuoJ)We also have exclusive columnists, election coverage, world class editorials, arts and culture, investigations, sports and an acclaimed crossword puzzle daily. So if you're tired of the New York Times acting like the most important newspaper in America, it's time to join the Sun and our fast growing movement to save American journalism. For just 1c a day you can make a statement about which paper speaks for you. Please join us today.

Peter, From my family to yours, I wanted to take a moment and wish you a very "hoppy" Easter! Whether you celebrate Easter, Passover, Ramadan, or a different holiday, I hope you're able to spend time with people you love and know that my family is sending you warm wishes. At our house, the Easter Egg Hunt is a highlight, with the girls running all over the yard looking for candy-filled eggs. In a way it’s a bit like running for Congress: a race where you’re constantly being pulled in 3 different directions, and working as hard and fast as possible to meet goals and gain votes! Ha! Either way: I'm grateful to have you on this team, and I can't wait to continue building momentum this Spring. Tuebor, Callie | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Peter, From my family to yours, I wanted to take a moment and wish you a very "hoppy" Easter! Whether you celebrate Easter, Passover, Ramadan, or a different holiday, I hope you're able to spend time with people you love and know that my family is sending you warm wishes. At our house, the Easter Egg Hunt is a highlight, with the girls running all over the yard looking for candy-filled eggs. In a way it’s a bit like running for Congress: a race where you’re constantly being pulled in 3 different directions, and working as hard and fast as possible to meet goals and gain votes! Ha! Either way: I'm grateful to have you on this team, and I can't wait to continue building momentum this Spring. Tuebor, Callie | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: BREAKING: McConnell’s super PAC makes massive Ohio ad buy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend , I’m reaching out personally because I don’t have anywhere else to turn.
A GOP super PAC aligned with McConnell just made their single largest investment in any state ever to defeat me and flip the Senate red.
With Senate control on the line here, we simply cannot afford to be outspent or outraised so early in the game. I know we can fight back and win, but I’m counting on folks like you to split just $10, maybe $20 – as much as you can afford – between my campaign and Serve America to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue.
Here’s the best link to rush your support: secure.actblue.com/donate/sherrod-serve-deadline [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]
Thank you,
Sherrod

clean_body: Friend , I’m reaching out personally because I don’t have anywhere else to turn. A GOP super PAC aligned with McConnell just made their single largest investment in any state ever to defeat me and flip the Senate red. With Senate control on the line here, we simply cannot afford to be outspent or outraised so early in the game. I know we can fight back and win, but I’m counting on folks like you to split just $10, maybe $20 – as much as you can afford – between my campaign and Serve America to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue. Here’s the best link to rush your support: secure.actblue.com/donate/sherrod-serve-deadline [] Thank you, Sherrod [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . name: Elizabeth Warren HQ
subject: Last chance to get your “Keep Abortion Legal” pin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1993%2E4032634%2EMJ9Zj0)
---
Hi, we're reaching out to let you know that today is your last chance to receive our free, limited-edition, “Keep Abortion Legal” pin we’re sending to supporters. [**If you chip in $25 or more before midnight tonight, you'll get your pin — and you'll help strengthen our movement that’s relentlessly fighting to protect abortion rights and keep MAGA extremists from passing a national ban after the 2024 election.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1962?t=8&akid=1993%2E4032634%2EMJ9Zj0) | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1962?t=9&akid=1993%2E4032634%2EMJ9Zj0)
---

Your support ensures our campaign can:
* Fight like hell to keep Trump out of the White House.
* Work to re-elect President Biden, flip the House, and expand the Senate with more pro-choice Democrats so we have the votes we need to codify abortion rights into federal law.
* Continue supporting organizing initiatives at the state level to pass abortion protections — like the ones that won in Kansas, Michigan, and Ohio.
* Fight back against the baseless attempts to ban medication abortion and birth control.

And every time you wear your pin, you'll remind everyone what you’re fighting for in the 2024 elections.
[**So before tonight's midnight deadline, pitch in $25 or more today to receive your “Keep Abortion Legal” pin, and let’s keep fight and win to keep abortion legal.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1962?t=10&akid=1993%2E4032634%2EMJ9Zj0)
Thanks for all you do,
Team Warren

Our first quarterly fundraising deadline of the year expires in a few hours, and your support has never been more important.
We’re in election year now, and as Vice-Chair of the Senate Democrats’ campaign arm, I’m focused on strengthening our Democratic majority.
The money we raise each month covers the cost of organizing our communities year-round, educating voters on the threats Republicans pose to our freedoms and democracy, and backing up Senate Dems’ work in Washington with grassroots activism.
**I can tell you that the right-wing mega donors who abuse our campaign finance system to drown out the voices of folks like you would love nothing more than for us to fall short this quarter. But I don’t want to give them the satisfaction.**
So, I’m asking:
**[Can I count on you to contribute $3 or whatever you can ahead of tonight’s deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82058710/464311717/210540761?amount=3&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzQ2ZjkxNi03YmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xUBFjdeBsRBYmVO1ZBFIfcqRBjl6tgF6BDUe4k1C1A=)**
As always, I’m deeply grateful for everything you do. Supporters like you are the primary reason I’m serving the people of Minnesota at such a critical moment in our nation’s history.
— Tina

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Happy Easter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
In this season of renewal, families and communities celebrate Easter Sunday in San Francisco, across America and around the globe. In that spirit, I am writing to thank you for your friendship and support to make a positive difference in the world.

---
| | |
---
Dear Friends,
In this season of renewal, families and communities celebrate Easter Sunday in San Francisco, across America and around the globe. In that spirit, I am writing to thank you for your friendship and support to make a positive difference in the world.
Because of you, we all have the strength and determination to work together to overcome our nation's challenges. We must prove through the night that our flag is still there — with liberty and justice for all.
With sympathy to the people of Baltimore, we pray for God's blessings on them and to your family in this Holy Season and that God continues to bless America.
---
Prayerfully,
NANCY

Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District. She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans. We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important. Nancy Pelosi is counting on you. **I know that Debbie will be an incredible advocate for our communities. How? Because she’s got the track record to prove it.**
She’s worked at nonprofits all across Florida, fighting to expand health care, protect our environment, and pass vital gun safety legislation. Then, she took these fights to Washington, serving as the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress.
I worked alongside Debbie in the House, and I saw firsthand her tenacity, work ethic, and genuine commitment to the people she serves. She knows how to win tough races, get results, and be a true advocate for families.
**Debbie is exactly what our leaders _should_ be. And Rick Scott is the exact opposite.**
Rick Scott is a megamillionaire who made his fortune as the CEO of a company convicted of the largest Medicare fraud scheme at that time. In Washington, he’s pushed an extremist, out-of-touch agenda that will only serve radicals and millionaires like himself.
Florida deserves so much more than that. Thankfully, Debbie’s campaign is giving us a huge opportunity to finally retire Rick Scott. **Polls show that this race is neck and neck, and Scott is ranked as one of the most vulnerable Senators on the ballot. But Debbie’s counting on your help to win:[ Please, will you donate $5 or more to help Debbie save our Senate majority and flip Florida blue? body:
this is the toughest race of Sherrod Brown’s career
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82060266/464314834/1655082683?refcode=odp_em_240331_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgxMzgwYi03ZGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cn12Ru1K00dOzK_sJd2VO271PExQynT71oti9fVK8SM=) Team, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82060267/464314835/1655082683?refcode=odp_em_240331_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgxMzgwYi03ZGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cn12Ru1K00dOzK_sJd2VO271PExQynT71oti9fVK8SM=)
_\- NYT, 3/22/24_ “Defy gravity.” “The race of his life.” “The toughest of his career.” These are just a few of the ways the _New York Times_ described Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in their latest piece. And frankly, they’re not wrong. This is going to be a hard-fought battle all the way to the finish line. ****[That’s why I’m asking: Will you pitch in $5 towards our $15,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal so we can help Sherrod win this race and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82060268/464314836/1655082683?refcode=odp_em_240331_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgxMzgwYi03ZGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cn12Ru1K00dOzK_sJd2VO271PExQynT71oti9fVK8SM=)**** Ohio Republicans know they can’t just waltz their way to the election in November and win this seat. Governor Mike DeWine recently attended a campaign event for Bernie Moreno and said:_“This is not going to be an easy race, folks... I’ve run against this man.”_ That’s why they’re pulling out all the stops. Whether they’re asking Moreno to dig deeper into his personal war chest of cash to write himself million-dollar checks or enlisting national Republicans to spend record-breaking sums in Ohio to buy this seat, they’re giving this race everything they’ve got. **And we have to do the same.** Because this isn’t just about Ohio. It’s about control of the Senate and the future of our entire country. ****[We can’t afford to end this quarter on the back foot. If you can, pitch in $5 ahead of our deadline at midnight so we can give Sherrod Brown the resources he needs to win this seat that could decide control of the Senate>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82060269/464314837/1655082683?refcode=odp_em_240331_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgxMzgwYi03ZGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cn12Ru1K00dOzK_sJd2VO271PExQynT71oti9fVK8SM=)**** Thank you, Liz Walters | ******Control of the House and Senate runs right through Ohio this year. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to hold on to the Senate and flip the House? → ****** | ************[********](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82060270/464314838/1655082683?refcode=odp_em_240331_1&amount=5;email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgxMzgwYi03ZGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cn12Ru1K00dOzK_sJd2VO271PExQynT71oti9fVK8SM=)****[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82060271/464314839/1655082683?refcode=odp_em_240331_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjgxMzgwYi03ZGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cn12Ru1K00dOzK_sJd2VO271PExQynT71oti9fVK8SM=) ****************

Crazy

| [ ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=14e5d84e78e34498b922a50004caaca1&_e=b4HZqSP23vSGd3v_3so-BoyQjSizxjwBIQG45fzzwfLfv1KHHIvxOd1SvTrQnww_uKWTUmFtP5xRtjuUQMVEM8VcD5jevuztPLLZxosztVSELbiJdiILScPUzX8DIoq-Ro0QR0-rexQS_ZF8PtGS4JRxVc6InLRsm5S34e9mTxuOpjgsQTik0AsHB-qKeP5CrihfBPIJ77PXXB2iwoA55QLsHiWt3HWqwZqeiHPmf8V30GaLmmyKxT6CFiC1xRWzLUG9dRjH5pNI6N6RgypHPZEBhn1b5qv4PnSiJOP-aZSqeCoOJZts2ZsVdtykOJC6hftMNd7_n76CcZ1owqxq5IOyL00SWAJcDa-KKbWXAE3ZDZXcq_HF2L597N-orUXrZ6ThctggVrZ5Rpqvc_BD_fGZxfk9qVKdpwh-QyHVQBc%3D)
---
Friend,

If you were to ask me just a few years ago if I ever thought I'd be sitting at my desk writing an email for my Senate campaign, I'd say you were crazy.

I never could have imagined I'd end up where I am today. God's plan can be a mystery sometimes, but I'm thankful for everyone's support and am so proud of everything we've accomplished. This fight is bigger than any one person, and our movement isn't just about saving Arizona; it's about saving this entire county.

Anyway, this email isn't about our journey. It's about fundraising. **I need your help.**

We're less than eight months away from the November election -- although I wish this weren't the way things worked -- we need $$$ if we're going to win this fight.

The Fake News will attack me for free.

The Left will spend millions to stop me.

I can't take these attacks sitting down, but I need support if I'm going to fight back. Grassroots supporters have always been the lifeblood of my campaign -- and I want to ask you one question.

[**Can you contribute $5, $10, $25, or ANYTHING to help me become the next U.S. Senator from the great state of Arizona?**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=14e5d84e78e34498b922a50004caaca1&_e=b4HZqSP23vSGd3v_3so-BoyQjSizxjwBIQG45fzzwfLfv1KHHIvxOd1SvTrQnww_uKWTUmFtP5xRtjuUQMVEM8VcD5jevuztPLLZxosztVSELbiJdiILScPUzX8DIoq-Ro0QR0-rexQS_ZF8PtGS4JRxVc6InLRsm5S34e9mTxuOpjgsQTik0AsHB-qKeP5CrihfBPIJ77PXXB2iwoA55QLsHiWt3HWqwZqeiHPmf8V30GaLmmyKxT6CFiC1xRWzLUG9dRjH5pNI6N6RgypHPRDTn1C8rUAHim1HtPrwM0UCqLRcOxKLbVq9EzdV3BKf7XZzBbGqtre_QfFXRl0VQ7LJ2oAOBfKn8mg8Ngx07XDY18yHZdFL_vYtKbF5KDotE45PG1p-nMHPr23aAFZi57jUnDZh60BC8BDwKh35OLM%3D)
