| | We see what's happening around us: climate change ravaging communities, folks struggling to make ends meet, and reproductive rights being stripped away. And I know you're scared and frustrated and tired. **We are too, but there is too much at stake to stay out of the fight.** Because of folks like you, we played a huge part in pushing Virginia, Ohio, and Pennsylvania toward a more progressive future last year. By targeting flippable districts, organizing voters, and funding county Democratic groups, we're knocking out long-time Republican incumbents.**And it's time to do it again.** [**Tonight is the big end-of-quarter deadline. clean_body: | | | | We see what's happening around us: climate change ravaging communities, folks struggling to make ends meet, and reproductive rights being stripped away. And I know you're scared and frustrated and tired. We are too, but there is too much at stake to stay out of the fight. Because of folks like you, we played a huge part in pushing Virginia, Ohio, and Pennsylvania toward a more progressive future last year. By targeting flippable districts, organizing voters, and funding county Democratic groups, we're knocking out long-time Republican incumbents.And it's time to do it again. = = The stakes for the 2024 election could not be higher because this year, we decide how to move forward on some of our country's most pressing issues. We can't ignore the effects of climate change. We can't turn a blind eye to wealth inequality. And we can't let our friends and neighbors continue to lose their fundamental reproductive rights. = In solidarity, Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

name: Chris Murphy
subject: hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chris Murphy
body:
I’m reaching out personally because I need to ask you to make a contribution before tonight’s FEC deadline.

Hi there,
Right off the bat, I just want to say thank you for being part of this team. I don’t take your support for granted. Just the fact that you opened this email means a lot to me.
I’m reaching out personally because I need to ask you to make a contribution before tonight’s FEC deadline. I know the gun lobby is trying to stage a comeback this year, and I want to make clear that we’re ready for whatever they throw at us.
That’s why I’m focused on the number of donations to my re-election right now. The number of people chipping in to power our work is just as important to me as the amount we raise.
It helps me prove that this isn’t another typical DC campaign loaded up with PAC and corporate money (FYI I don’t take PAC money). Your donation sends a message loud and clear that we have an army of people who have my back in the fights ahead of us.
The first deadline of 2024 is a critical moment for us, and I’m honestly not sure we’ll hit our goal unless we have a big response today. I know you probably did not wake up and think “today’s the day I make my first contribution to Chris”...but if you can afford to give, I really need it.
I’m tracking donations at this link: [**https://ChrisMurphy.com/contribute-2024**](https://act.chrismurphy.com/go/380?c0=csm-em-mar24.QYO0pp&refcode=em240331-1-gm&t=1&akid=1988%2E1711221%2Ez0qcIv)
I hope I’ve earned your support for my reelection because I need you with me to win another term and do my part to hold our Senate majority.
Every best wish,
Chris Murphy
p.s. I’m grateful that you put your faith in me to do this job and lead our movement to end gun violence. I want you to know that none of it is possible without you, and if you’re looking for a way to help us keep up our progress, [**then please consider using this link to make a donation today.**](https://act.chrismurphy.com/go/380?c0=csm-em-mar24.QYO0pp&refcode=em240331-1-gm&t=2&akid=1988%2E1711221%2Ez0qcIv)

Paid for by Friends of Chris Murphy
Friends of Chris Murphy
PO Box 230987
Hartford, CT 06123
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact info, [click here](https://act.chrismurphy.com/signup/update-contact-info/?t=3&akid=1988%2E1711221%2Ez0qcIv). If you would like to only receive the most important updates from us, please [let us know here.](https://act.chrismurphy.com/signup/fewer_emails/?refcode=em-footer&t=4&akid=1988%2E1711221%2Ez0qcIv) We try to send only the most crucial info and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.chrismurphy.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=1988%2E1711221%2Ez0qcIv). If you would like to support Senator Murphy's fight for our shared values, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/csm-web?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=1988_1711221_z0qcIv&akid=1988%2E1711221%2Ez0qcIv) today.

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Quick update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Tammy’s counting on your support just hours before the deadline.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2313%2E35263%2EpIJVuo)
Good morning, Peter! We won’t take up more of your time than we need to with this quick campaign update: Tonight marks the end of the first fundraising quarter of 2024. After tonight’s deadline, we’ll have to submit our fundraising report to the FEC where it will become publicly available — for our opponent and his right-wing allies to scour. If we can’t close the gap in our budget, it could very well invite a flood of even more Republican spending and attack ads in what is already one of the most competitive races in the country. So with the deadline just hours away, Tammy’s counting on your support. **[Will you chip in before tonight’s end-of-quarter deadline to help Tammy defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat from the out-of-state megamillionaire trying to buy it?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-mar24.lt590f&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2313%2E35263%2EpIJVuo)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-mar24.gV3I8k&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240331_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2313%2E35263%2EpIJVuo)

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Hammered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| One $7 donation.

That is what we are asking you to make before Elissa Slotkin's official FEC fundraising deadline ends. We'll explain below, but if you know the importance of these deadlines and can make that $7 donation to Elissa and Voter Protection Project right now, please use this link:

[_secure.actblue.com/March-Deadline »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65250?t=6&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu)

Otherwise, here's the deal:

If you ever have the misfortune of finding yourself in the most radical parts of the internet, you will see our campaign getting absolutely hammered with attacks from potential opponents.

They are as over-the-top as you would imagine, and we can absolutely expect they will become louder and louder as we get closer to the election.

We have to be prepared. Because it wouldn't be the first time a negative campaign successfully helped a Republican win statewide in Michigan.

If we're going to have a chance to keep the Senate -- and if Elissa is going to win -- we need your help before our FEC deadline ends this week. And right now, we're just a bit shy of where we need to be.

One $7 donation. That's what we're asking for before this deadline ends. Can you make it?

[_Would you be willing to contribute $7 to Elissa Slotkin's campaign and Voter Protection Project before our official FEC fundraising deadline ends? This is going to be such a close and expensive race and we're almost out of time before this deadline._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65250?t=7&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Elissa Slotkin and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65251?t=8&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65252?t=9&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65253?t=10&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65254?t=11&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65255?t=12&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu)
Thank you, sincerely, for all you do for our campaign. It is because of your support that we’ve come this far.

Elissa Slotkin for Senate
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=13622%2E878179%2EIjKciu)

name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: Cowards
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I’m writing to you because Kari Lake was recently endorsed by Josh Hawley, the Senator from Missouri.
#

Peter, this is retired Capitol Police Staff Sergeant and U.S. Army Veteran Aquilino Gonell.
I’m writing to you because Kari Lake was recently endorsed by Josh Hawley, the Senator from Missouri.
Yes, this Josh Hawley:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar24.sAuZhx&refcode=em240329-1-NDR&t=1&akid=2157%2E734936%2E_VfrjU)
The same guy who riled up Trump’s mob before they stormed the Capitol, and the same guy who ran for his life while my fellow officers and I risked our lives to protect everyone, including Hawley.
We stood our ground and fought for our lives against the mob. They sided against the Constitution yet they claimed to support the rule of law and the police.
This is the type of person Kari Lake wants in her corner.
As for me, I’m proud to be in Ruben’s corner.
While we fought the insurrectionists that day, Ruben supported his colleagues on the House floor. He was ready to fight, too.
He’s going to fight every day to defeat Kari Lake and make sure there is no home for insurrectionists in the Senate.
That’s more than enough for me. If you’re with Ruben and can’t wait to put an end to Kari Lake’s political ambitions, please:
[**Make a generous donation to Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona. He’s a friend, a leader, a fighter, and exactly the kind of person we need in the Senate.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar24.sAuZhx&refcode=em240329-1-NDR&t=2&akid=2157%2E734936%2E_VfrjU)

name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: What a week, a month, a year!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
With a moment to reflect on this day of renewal, I am thinking back on all that has happened in recent months. And I am looking ahead to the remainder of this year with a sense of optimism and hope. We have great challenges ahead of us in 2024. And we have great opportunities to move our communities and country forward — with purpose and with people who will bring us together.
Electing our leaders is such an important part of charting our path forward. I am grateful to everyone who is engaging in the effort to elect people who will lead us as we deserve to be, on this campaign and on campaigns around the country.
As today also marks the end of the first quarter of the year, I want to thank everyone who has contributed to this campaign this quarter in particular. We fought a hard primary race this month, and we needed the contributions of time and money that so many gave so generously. Now that the month is over, we are looking ahead. And we will keep working every day until November (and after that, too) to make sure we elect people who will lead us forward as we deserve — with hope, with faith in our fellow citizens, and with love of our country and our Constitution.
Together, we can do anything,
LizzieSignature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]
P.S. My team would be disappointed with me if I didn’t note that the quarter actually ends at midnight Eastern Time, so there is still time to contribute if you haven’t had a moment to do so yet. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe240331?refcode=lpfe240331] Many thanks for your consideration.

name: Bob Casey
subject: What happens in PA will determine the fate of our Nation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2529%2E552475%2Ec26pIh)
Peter, I’m in the toughest re-election fight of my career.
**What happens here in Pennsylvania will determine the fate of our Nation.** If we lose this race, Democrats will almost certainly lose both the Senate and the White House — impacting everything from women’s rights to the promise of Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security.
That’s why my mega-millionaire opponent and the Wall Street billionaires who support him are already working overtime and spending big to flip Pennsylvania and defeat us. The stakes couldn’t be higher, and the only way we’ll be able to compete is with your help.
[**There are just hours until our FEC deadline, so please, will you pitch in a donation of any amount so we can reach our $150,000 goal?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240331-2?refcode=em20240331-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2529_552475_c26pIh&akid=2529%2E552475%2Ec26pIh)

name: Ami
subject: This Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Happy Holiday Weekend!

While you’re spending time with your loved ones this weekend, I want to personally reach out and thank you, Peter.

Your support does not go unnoticed, and I am excited to see what the rest of this year brings. I know that with your support, we will be able to win this November.

Today is Easter Sunday. It’s also Cesar Chavez Day, and I want to highlight the civil and labor rights activist who has paved the way for modern-day labor movements today. His work fighting for migrant farm workers’ rights brought about the 1975 California Agricultural Labor Relations Act.

His legacy still lives on today through his granddaughter, campaign manager for President Biden. Their work has transformed so many lives, especially those from marginalized communities.

So much of what he fought for hangs in the balance this election year, including labor rights for hard working Americans. That’s why we need to keep our momentum up, so we can invest in our communities and win for all Americans.

Be well,
Ami **[Contribute Before Our FEC Deadline Tonight](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82062941/464319710/1637788006?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_AB_20240331_FR_2.8_12MO_candidate_NA_NA_EOQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWVlNzBhYy04MGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8rVK7HcCMfJ-VfZXZO-Cz1ONeOkSsKCaft94qHChg84=)**

name: Patty Murray (personal)
subject: a last-minute favor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Hey there, Peter – this'll be quick
| | |
---
Hey there, Peter – this'll be quick:
I'm doing all I can to save our majority – but with Democrats defending two-thirds of the seats up for grabs, Senate control will come down to resources. And right now, we’re **still $7,209 short of our can't-miss $50,000 goal.**
**If we're still short by midnight, we just won't have the resources necessary to keep our majority safe – and the GOP will know it.**
**BUT,** if every single supporter gives $5 or more right away, we'll make up the deficit and be back on track to save our Democratic majority – **so**** Peter, _can I count on you to be one of them?_**
**If so, here's your personal link to make a donation:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm-email-2024-q1/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82063134/464320300/-1442338188?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk251-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzViNmRkMC04MGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vbWpmmBcyw-iXChX5FdQxF2fGnghdj7Q2y_TZMR5Kko=)**
Nothing I do is possible without your support – thank you.

Enjoy the rest of your weekend,

Patty

name: Your 5X-Match Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: 3 quick things...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DLCC PAC
body:
This is one of the last emails we’ll send about our end-of-quarter deadline. But before we ask you for a five times matched donation, here’s what you must know. | | |

body:
We’ll keep this short.

| We hate to bother you on a Sunday (especially after bombarding you with so many fundraising emails over the week), so we'll keep this short and sweet. We don’t send emails just because we feel like it. A huge percentage of the money we bring in every month to support our climate champions comes from emails just like this one — from people just like you. And this month we’re very close to reaching our ambitious end-of-quarter fundraising goal, but we’re not quite there _yet._ Your support will help us continue to roll out more endorsements this year, rally more voters to elect our climate champions, and build a movement so powerful that not even the richest fossil fuel lobbyists in the world can stop us. All of that takes resources and plenty of funding. **And here’s some encouraging news: Every donation made through the end of the day will be matched by an anonymous donor, up to $15,000. This means your contribution today can have double the impact.** **[So please, can you contribute today? clean_body: We’ll keep this short. | | We hate to bother you on a Sunday (especially after bombarding you with so many fundraising emails over the week), so we'll keep this short and sweet. We don’t send emails just because we feel like it. A huge percentage of the money we bring in every month to support our climate champions comes from emails just like this one — from people just like you. And this month we’re very close to reaching our ambitious end-of-quarter fundraising goal, but we’re not quite there yet. Your support will help us continue to roll out more endorsements this year, rally more voters to elect our climate champions, and build a movement so powerful that not even the richest fossil fuel lobbyists in the world can stop us. All of that takes resources and plenty of funding. And here’s some encouraging news: Every donation made through the end of the day will be matched by an anonymous donor, up to $15,000. This means your contribution today can have double the impact. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, The Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Sharice's iPhone
subject: read before midnight (personal message from sharice)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey, I wish I didn’t have to reach out again like this, but here’s where we are... At midnight tonight, we face our biggest fundraising deadline so far this year. Then all our numbers go public, for the media and for our opponents to scrutinize for any sign of weakness. I don’t want to give them any to seize on. When I won my first election to Congress in 2018, we shocked a lot of people. Some pundits didn’t think _anyone_ could flip a seat in Kansas — especially not an LGBTQ+, Native American, former MMA fighter who was raised by a single mom. It’s fair to say what we did, no one had ever done before. I’m proud we won that race, and I’m proud of everything we’ve accomplished together since: reducing the cost of insulin for Kansans on Medicare, helping to bring good-paying, clean-energy jobs here to KS-03, expanding rural broadband access, passing bipartisan legislation protecting same-sex marriage rights, enacting the most significant gun safety law in a generation, delivering funding to upgrade critical infrastructure all across Kansas, and so much more. None of it would be possible without the incredible grassroots team that’s had my back every step of the way. I am grateful for you and for every single person who’s helped me get where I am, and it’s something I will NEVER take for granted. But the work is also very much unfinished. There’s a lot still on our to-do list: protecting abortion rights, securing our democracy, and reducing costs for hardworking families who are struggling today. Investing in communities who feel forgotten and overlooked. The stakes of this next election are really, really high. Here in KS-03, our efforts could determine which party wins control of Congress, and you can bet it’s going to come right down to the wire. So we need the resources to fight for every vote. If you’re with me, I’d be so grateful if you could donate before tonight’s big deadline. We’re still a few hundred dollars short of our fundraising goal — not the end of the world, but not great either. If everyone reading this email pitched in just a few dollars before midnight, whether it’s $5 or $50, we’d blow through our goal and put our campaign in a better spot. Here’s a secure link to give, if you’re able: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/davids-email-mar24?refcode=email_033124_EOQ**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82064213/464322241/1393271644?refcode=email_033124_EOQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTZiMTA2MC04MmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yq5hgQlpvQZrJhTHZD7T33M_Tq6QXQt_7FBTCHc_iYc=) And again, thank you for all your support in this fight. I really appreciate having you on my side. Sincerely, Sharice Sent from my iPhone

---

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The next four months
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
Since launching our voter registration program four months ago, we’ve trained thousands of volunteers, led organizing drives across the state, and held hundreds of voter registration events across Texas.
[**I hope you’ll pitch in what you can today to help us meet our end-of-quarter fundraising goal and sustain this work in the months ahead.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240331.sjnIGG&refcode=ema20240331-239536&t=1&akid=239536%2E444211%2E31NA16)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240331.sjnIGG&refcode=ema20240331-239536&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=239536%2E444211%2E31NA16)**
Over the next quarter, we’ll mail voter registration forms directly to Texans’ doorsteps and follow up with those future voters to ensure they turn them in. We’ll register voters at colleges, farmers’ markets, and some of the biggest concerts taking place in the state. And we’ll travel to every part of Texas to recruit and train more volunteers to get all of this work done.
To ensure these new voters actually cast a ballot, our volunteers are establishing one-on-one relationships with every voter they register. They’ll help these Texans navigate our state’s tough voting laws and give them the nudge they may need to stay tuned in, engage their friends and family, and turn out to vote when the polls open.
This work will require a significant investment in mail costs, technology, volunteer recruitment, and training. [**Can you help us keep this work going by making a contribution today?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240331.sjnIGG&refcode=ema20240331-239536&t=21&akid=239536%2E444211%2E31NA16)
Looking forward to continuing this work with you.
Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=239536%2E444211%2E31NA16).
clean_body: Since launching our voter registration program four months ago, we’ve trained thousands of volunteers, led organizing drives across the state, and held hundreds of voter registration events across Texas. Over the next quarter, we’ll mail voter registration forms directly to Texans’ doorsteps and follow up with those future voters to ensure they turn them in. We’ll register voters at colleges, farmers’ markets, and some of the biggest concerts taking place in the state. And we’ll travel to every part of Texas to recruit and train more volunteers to get all of this work done. To ensure these new voters actually cast a ballot, our volunteers are establishing one-on-one relationships with every voter they register. They’ll help these Texans navigate our state’s tough voting laws and give them the nudge they may need to stay tuned in, engage their friends and family, and turn out to vote when the polls open. This work will require a significant investment in mail costs, technology, volunteer recruitment, and training. Looking forward to continuing this work with you. Beto Paid for by Powered by People, , not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

| | | Let me tell you why your support is so important. The race to defeat Ted Cruz doesn't just concern Texans – it concerns the future of our democracy. Our country can't handle six more years of Ted Cruz, his attacks on reproductive freedoms, his dismantling of our fundamental voting rights, and his endless self-centered antics. He's proven time and time again that his only loyalty is to himself, not the people he's supposed to represent. It's time to send him packing. Not only because Texans deserve so much better – but because if Colin wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to retain control of the Senate, which is our last line of defense against the far right. Colin can win this – Cruz won by just 2.6% of the vote in 2018. Election experts know it, and recent polling numbers show them TIED. But he'll need a massive movement of grassroots supporters behind him to help him reach voters, pull ahead, and win. [That starts today with you, Peter. Colin needs to raise $65,000 by midnight tonight so that he can stay on track to reach enough voters and win in November. That's why I'm personally asking: Will you donate $10 right now to power Colin and Blue Amp Action's campaign to victory and defeat Ted Cruz? With your help, we can finally give Texans the leadership they deserve and protect the future of our democracy.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b4e1ef8-4623-4b27-be0b-72146a84166b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te4e3946b-70c0-4020-ae53-99229d735012/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Hi Peter.
We know many are enjoying the holiday weekend today with family and loved ones. We don’t want to take to much of your time, so here’s our humble request.
Our democracy is at a crossroads. Right-wing authoritarianism is on the rise, and dangerous misinformation is dividing our nation. COURIER, with its critical local reporting, is fighting back in 10 key states where the 2024 election will be decided. We make our reporting freely available to anyone who needs it and publish our work in the online spaces where election lies and conspiracy theories spread.

subject: Progressives want to change the way we elect our president
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=ede144fd15a44de7a2be925fae19d9c0&_t=6XDt8RFus1o-ySGlmb1DhjmxvR_3-NWNJHepuw209Ugz_cj8xFTIQWq5jLKt_m9E7AfIcSEaZMq8nK9l4tOgcQWOER4jYlMWsVwutQGNqFg%3D)_
---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ede144fd15a44de7a2be925fae19d9c0&_e=4H-2kLG__VpeeQj3SU7tH0hn9wFJ6EIRfUID0I6qVFWC8Q8G2fv10sEoj_WkCJ3zqKn6muppA8PPU47AVvFGsOxAtXcOhZsrTXkfESIVXvMRDvhdjabWwV8kldyL7XabS2t9mkzE6tC6W4iP_p9YJCQUPmBTVK9WaZObDdRrQtW-54vdsHHoiKPLydWS318j9eyfzuATUb_3MsTNKdwHZJakrXTOvaZh0YrtEU1GBmJ2Pt-YC56ve82WeFjOrlrZVUx97ohgQYtUbVzw_VyGwQNY-7xk-6SDdXeE4j7OHul7bBDkqhsBpSdZ0XXFzpMdC8aFGFilvhenuUcK1yhcko7HoGlkqM7VjANnr0j3J79ydHw1FobmSPCt5jxX41yHkzF8Zm-EryRZ2RvH3rfGszG2qOagcLaWCXjxAAXVXuQ%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ede144fd15a44de7a2be925fae19d9c0&_e=4H-2kLG__VpeeQj3SU7tH0hn9wFJ6EIRfUID0I6qVFWC8Q8G2fv10sEoj_WkCJ3zqKn6muppA8PPU47AVvFGsOxAtXcOhZsrTXkfESIVXvMRDvhdjabWwV8kldyL7XabS2t9mkzE6tC6W4iP_p9YJCQUPmBTVK9WaZObDdRrQtW-54vdsHHoiKPLydWS318j9eyfzuATUb_3MsTNKdwHZJakrXTOvaZh0YrtEU1GBmJ2Pt-YC56ve82WeFjOrlrZhxf9SmnpZwjJx-4F0H_a3zfdWI4uj3kN9-CBEGY6_7ER7seGL0Ci2DstPovUSo_MRy-KRQP8t9UpFI9o9lt8QpihYOoLZeJSF_r5xlsu-hvbk2FJJomIY3v9PzVowH-2EQdaxqgCu4O7IAdoiA_bSUfZelTtjI_nGYOP-0fJa-E%3D) That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ede144fd15a44de7a2be925fae19d9c0&_e=4H-2kLG__VpeeQj3SU7tH0hn9wFJ6EIRfUID0I6qVFWC8Q8G2fv10sEoj_WkCJ3zqKn6muppA8PPU47AVvFGsOxAtXcOhZsrTXkfESIVXvMRDvhdjabWwV8kldyL7XabS2t9mkzE6tC6W4iP_p9YJCQUPmBTVK9WaZObDdRrQtW-54vdsHHoiKPLydWS318j9eyfzuATUb_3MsTNKdwHZJakrXTOvaZh0YrtEU1GBmJ2Pt-YC56ve82WeFjOrlrZb3_PKEG7L33b9GCTCsCQ0QcTRvaHxsRR-IYFTNX_lFGUgpB8EVuNnBRHX0JoN-jeVUe467Te4Vy8ZuIkJG5_F5tesO5THvF2Cr9nJwj3355Hpg_yZJWqJqTKKT_9Hs0J02de8ruMXZP0rSVRaPuzS0sHBPi0NdwbXFdBPStd1do%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

| **FIRST:** When Hilary Franz ran for commissioner of public lands in 2016, she was patronized by political insiders and told that a _“little lady”_ like her couldn’t manage as a state executive and to wait her turn.

**THEN:** Hilary broke barriers, bringing innovative solutions to transform the Department of Natural Resources into a national standard for wildfire prevention and mitigation.

**NOW:** Hilary is running for Congress to continue delivering meaningful change that will last for generations to come. But to continue her work, Hilary needs your help. **Early fundraising is critical to building the team we need to reach every voter in Washington's 6th Congressional District.[_Will you join Hilary in the fight to bring bold progress and innovation to Congress by contributing $10? name: Josh Stein
subject: I’m taking on a conspiracy theorist.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
He’s too dangerous to be the next Governor of North Carolina. | Here’s the _truth_ , Derek: The GOP nominee for Governor of North Carolina, Mark Robinson, is a self-described conspiracy theorist.

He has accused school shooting survivors of being “crisis actors.” He referred to the Holocaust as “hogwash.” He agreed with claims that Jewish bankers are working with China, Islamic leaders, and the CIA to “control the world.”

My opponent’s lies aren’t just outrageous, Derek. **They’re dangerous.**
| | [SPLIT A DONATION TO SUPPORT TONY EVERS AND HELP ME DEFEAT MARK ROBINSON](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2246?t=5&akid=6647%2E1827488%2ECENCie)
---
If Mark Robinson can’t recognize the truth when it comes to something as clear-cut as school shootings or the Holocaust, then he cannot be trusted to lead our state.

But despite my opponent’s extremism, our race is too close for comfort. The polls show us in a _statistical_ tie — and I can only overcome it with your help.

Mark Robinson is too extreme for North Carolina — and we deserve better.

[**Derek, I’m making an important request: Please, could you split a donation between my campaign and Tony Evers? Democrats CANNOT afford to lose this race.**](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2246?t=6&akid=6647%2E1827488%2ECENCie) | [DONATE](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2246?t=7&akid=6647%2E1827488%2ECENCie)
---
Thank you so much,

Josh Stein
[](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2246?t=8&akid=6647%2E1827488%2ECENCie)
| [Support Tony](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/3?t=4&akid=6647%2E1827488%2ECENCie)
---

name: John Deaton
subject: personal note for Peter
body:
tonight's deadline
| | | | Peter, I'm sure you've been spending this Easter Sunday in the fellowship of family and friends and I hope you and your loved ones have had a wonderful holiday together.
I'm dropping you a personal note because our quarterly fundraising deadline is TONIGHT at 11:59 PM. [If you can chip in a donation of $10, $25 or more, it will go a long way in helping me report the strongest numbers possible in April.](https://scqeb6gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001joyy7ULRH327N60HXBV5v4HlcuUwaGmmqLgFx8k2pGh6RgAWuQcSD3gAp0H4n7bNBzaeV-yHFnke8z3JxXlNQDWPtFY_i6Z50ZknS6E8q2H35fGrRhJRr-G4eL4e7LVefYriG2eJEwc5QqFwtZil0LcwfsBCm0gu4qmXUSjSKZtMM8ZGc-vo2nU5omUAQQZ8&c=HTH6Fa1fwoFHcSmUgH9rKWkQyC1TgULIp_6G4BZYy52GC7o3AYx7eQ==&ch=hqwUbydaJ_njuVQ60AnquygtH3ttGXRI3kgh-jYZ_453x0DVEi17yg==)
I'm running for US Senate to defeat Elizabeth Warren and shake up the Washington Status Quo and make this country a better place for all.
---

I'm going to be straight with you, Peter. This campaign is going to be expensive, and TODAY marks my first FEC fundraising deadline.
[That's why I'm reaching out today. Will you take a minute to chip in $10, $25, $50, or more before my deadline to defeat Elizabeth Warren and help get our country back on track?](https://scqeb6gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001joyy7ULRH327N60HXBV5v4HlcuUwaGmmqLgFx8k2pGh6RgAWuQcSD3gAp0H4n7bNBzaeV-yHFnke8z3JxXlNQDWPtFY_i6Z50ZknS6E8q2H35fGrRhJRr-G4eL4e7LVefYriG2eJEwc5QqFwtZil0LcwfsBCm0gu4qmXUSjSKZtMM8ZGc-vo2nU5omUAQQZ8&c=HTH6Fa1fwoFHcSmUgH9rKWkQyC1TgULIp_6G4BZYy52GC7o3AYx7eQ==&ch=hqwUbydaJ_njuVQ60AnquygtH3ttGXRI3kgh-jYZ_453x0DVEi17yg==)
No Fear, Never Give Up,
John Deaton Candidate for US Senate
P.S. Peter, I believe great people like YOU believe America can do better and are exhausted by Elizabeth Warren and the Washington Status Quo. [We must send leaders to Washington who only care about getting things done for the people. body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Tonight at midnight marks the first FEC end-of-quarter deadline of 2024,
the last fundraising deadline before the Squad’s Democratic primary
elections begin in April.

Our most vulnerable progressive incumbents — including Summer Lee, Jamaal
Bowman, Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib — are counting on a
groundswell of grassroots support to take on their AIPAC-backed
challengers and win.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240331.3AlOYS&refcode=em20240331-34082&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34082%2E1203867%2ESQ1WxG ]Before the clock strikes midnight, can you rush a contribution of
$5 or whatever is feasible for you to help Justice
Democrats re-elect the Squad?

AIPAC and its network of Republican megadonor-funded Super PACs are
preparing to drop $100 million to attack and unseat our progressive
champions from Congress this election cycle.

It’s an unprecedented amount of money coming from the same Republican
millionaires and billionaires supporting Donald Trump. But the Squad faced
millions of dollars spent against them by these same right-wing groups
before and won. Now, we have to come together to help them do it again.

If we want to pass Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, a $15 minimum
wage, and free college for all while keeping up the fight for a permanent
ceasefire in Gaza, we can’t afford to lose a single Squad member from
Congress in 2024.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240331.3AlOYS&refcode=em20240331-34082&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34082%2E1203867%2ESQ1WxG ]Help Justice Democrats defend our progressive incumbents from AIPAC’s
attacks and re-elect them this year: rush any amount before tonight’s
end-of-quarter deadline.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240331.3AlOYS&refcode=em20240331-34082&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34082%2E1203867%2ESQ1WxG ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240331-34082-footer&t=1022&refcode2=34082_1203867_SQ1WxG&akid=34082%2E1203867%2ESQ1WxG

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=34082%2E1203867%2ESQ1WxG

Lancaster PA 17603

name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: RFK Jr.’s VP pick is FUNDING HIS CAMPAIGN?!
body:
As the election inches closer and closer, RFK Jr.’s campaign continues to show its true colors—and they’re not good.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82068360/464334598/444630146?refcode=3-31-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiYzNmYTAyLThiZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MwHEo3VxuGB1hTfXcrVbpKL9H0D_cCod_tT7A1XPhEQ=)
---
| | Friend, As the election inches closer and closer, RFK Jr.’s campaign continues to show its true colors—and they’re not good. Most recently, he announced Nicole Shanahan as his Vice Presidential pick. Shanahan is a lawyer from Silicon Valley who has never held elected office before. She criticized Kennedy’s choice to run as an independent candidate but then turned around and donated millions of dollars for RFK’s Super Bowl ad. And for RFK Jr.’s campaign, money talks. Shanahan went from a critic of Kennedy’s independent run to his Vice Presidential pick in less than six months. And we know why she’s on the ticket with him—because she has the money to fund his campaign and get him on the ballot in states across the country. It has nothing to do with her political experience (of which she has none) or her views and everything to do with the checks she can write. **[RFK Jr. and other politicians should be picking running mates based on their experience and merit, not on the amount of money they can provide the campaign. It’s just another way that money runs our political system and it’s wrong on every level. This is a big fight and we can’t get Big Money out of politics alone. So please, join us today in fighting against Big Money by chipping in $10.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82068361/464334599/444630146?refcode=3-31-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiYzNmYTAyLThiZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MwHEo3VxuGB1hTfXcrVbpKL9H0D_cCod_tT7A1XPhEQ=)** But not only was RFK Jr.’s running mate chosen solely because of her ability to fund his campaign, she is also a peddler of anti-vax conspiracy theories. These kinds of conspiracies are dangerous and have been proven incorrect time and time again, and the American people deserve better than a President and Vice President who don’t believe in facts. **[RFK Jr.’s pick of Nicole Shanahan is a gamechanger in this race to play spoiler against President Biden. His campaign and VP pick are just more examples of how Big Money influences every choice in our politics. The American people deserve to have their voices heard- not be overshadowed by conspiracy theory peddlers and multi-million dollar checks. Contribute $10 right now and join us in the fight against Big Money in our politics and return power back to the hands of the people.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82068362/464334600/444630146?refcode=3-31-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiYzNmYTAyLThiZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MwHEo3VxuGB1hTfXcrVbpKL9H0D_cCod_tT7A1XPhEQ=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

subject: What a $5 donation helps us do

body:
When you make a $5 donation to GIFFORDS PAC, just know that it goes straight towards our lifesaving work.
#

Friends -
When you make a $5 donation to GIFFORDS PAC, just know that it goes straight towards our lifesaving work.
$5 helps us continue fighting for lifesaving gun safety legislation at the federal level and in states nationwide.
$5 fuels our work to elect gun safety champions up and down the ballot in this year’s elections.
$5 sends a strong message to the gun lobby that we will never back down in the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
And today, your $5 will directly help us reach our fundraising goals before our FEC fundraising deadline passes at midnight tonight.
[**If you think that $5 sounds worth it to do all of these things, then please use this link to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today. Your donation could be the one to push us over the top before tonight’s critical FEC deadline.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240331-2-30&t=1&akid=7866%2E3935704%2EZIa3XM)

name: Sen. Elizabeth Warren
subject: Here’s what happens when Republicans get their way:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee and authorized by Warren for Senate
body:
We’re facing off against national Republicans insistent on taking control of the Senate and advancing Trump’s agenda. | |
---
Hi Derek, it's Elizabeth Warren. Here’s how I see it: We not only have to spend the next year fighting back against MAGA extremists trying to take away our freedoms -- we also have to build on our progress and continue making real, transformative change for working families. We’ve got to reshape our economy so it works for everyone -- not just the wealthy few. We’ve got to make child care affordable so that it doesn’t eat up an entire paycheck. We’ve got to stop corporations from price gouging so people don’t wince every time they look at their grocery store receipt. We’ve got to write a fairer tax code so that a public school teacher doesn’t pay a higher tax rate than a billionaire. **Big problems require big solutions. That’s what Democrats are fighting for. But none of this can happen if we don’t secure victories up and down the ballot in 2024.** [**That’s why I’m reaching out to you today: Can you split a donation between my re-election campaign and the DNC ahead of tonight’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline so we have the resources to beat the GOP?**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquKbfBe_qOSaBCIl3b3jmSSMzAqKqE7K292VRJiDk7APn_P41pxNF-i1MkMlEnkIcrcjCtfIFo4HjCMji20j0JCeDzNc2bslhDd6y2voQyaPZHPuXl0xtlfrVBd-zN6MqAhuFBTyRmBzRd6Vn-ZVywUiO_uJgPB7wMwGMT0EDpKskEBFulOgb86fhdKl0KlVMZ0Xt3A3yEZAgub6PG1HVlAuw1CNTK6xoKbSuBKbNfrmsM7Seah27Cax_YxgzSkP3F2m2GHdixQJp3JqsBDcChKOwLbCSjcCUjW1Cz8Nk-nJHkirztFvdOQNqFj4KoFX0KMzJnxOGv3mipY_sqPmqn1wzg5E9Tapkkt7C4YJW3ckvsR-Svi7fo6O8iiEyaet3MvcMsuF8TgZRYOXV4NU3vVNmH4qw6mCQuyibCohukHbQ/454/4SZ_slzwTy6B2hXVmRGX8g/h0/h001.OcQiKL0I6W4MO6aMPZ5UabD-jidnD4FFj9-_RZI2QBc) Republicans love to say that they’re the party of “family values” -- the party that looks out for parents and kids. Give me a break. I could go on, and on, and on...and on about how Republicans don’t do anything to actually support families. While they fight to give their rich buddies more tax breaks and take away our freedoms, Democrats are fighting to strengthen the middle class and safeguard our freedoms. **But here’s the latest twist: The MAGA Republican machine couldn’t find a single Republican in Massachusetts to run against me -- so they brought in a guy from Rhode Island who has the backing of special interest groups. That unlocks an opportunity for national Republicans, billionaires, and corporate interests to invest in getting me -- and the plans we’re fighting for -- out of office.** Across the country, we’re competing against national Republicans _insistent_ on taking control of the Senate and advancing Trump’s agenda. We’re up against their wealthy allies who are determined to thwart our efforts to tax the rich, rein in big banks, and ensure our government serves working people. And when Republican politicians win elections and get their way: More parents are forced to ration groceries and watch their children go hungry. More parents are forced to have hushed conversations at the kitchen table after they’ve put their kids to bed -- conversations about how on earth they’re going to make rent, pay the mortgage, or cover medical bills. More parents -- especially moms -- are forced to give up their careers because child care costs more than their salary. More parents are forced to make impossible choices between going to work that day so they can buy groceries or staying home so they can take care of a sick child. More kids are forced to go to under-funded public schools, where some get cruelly punished for having little to no funds in their lunch accounts. More teachers are forced to deal with red tape that stops them from teaching honest lessons about Black history, or from trying to create safe, welcoming classroom environments for LGBTQ+ students. More working people and more retirees are forced to struggle to make ends meet and afford life-saving prescription drugs. All this, while actively stripping away the fundamental rights of women to make choices about their bodies and their futures -- disproportionately impacting low-income women and women of color. **I’m not willing to accept any of this -- and I hope you aren’t either. We need to do everything we can to keep Republicans out of power this year -- and a powerful way you can strengthen this fight is by splitting a contribution before tonight’s critical FEC fundraising deadline.** [**If you’re able, Derek, click here to split $10 between my campaign and the DNC before midnight. Your donation will empower Democrats to continue fighting for hardworking Americans as November draws closer.**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquKbfBe_qOSaBCIl3b3jmSSMzAqKqE7K292VRJiDk7APn_P41pxNF-i1MkMlEnkIcrcjCtfIFo4HjCMji20j0JCeDzNc2bslhDd6y2voQyaPZHPuXl0xtlfrVBd-zN6MqCUGP2mBBvMiIX_On8ckO6Xy2-aYIy4ROdJKEHAigCbNFF5GmRWMxRtsmiHxbomCMA5gWKr3oaYBfvoZu29inZlhhrudktYVW8jGvs2i8LqajT4M-kS3J5iF5CPgSeNC_sW-A2UMS3PbQ0ev_VsgyVRa3UxfkucbvGPskO3tr5vWbBYD2gyNn7BhxNyh67BWqZ2sFttr2Bkvp1xiMEcF4twsPKW5rBJOSesEW5cNBy29vF9xeo8qjC-rVoQ0cbklKRvWuZLcfbAsgpS5cz-zeWn8FsO6Am_NEswcVUDKvdXYg/454/4SZ_slzwTy6B2hXVmRGX8g/h1/h001.FB8NM3tYFPL21uIP7ejz54JuIVgPEKOoHA9ATZYjK8g) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Warren
U.S. Senator, Massachusetts
[](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquKbfBe_qOSaBCIl3b3jmSSMzAqKqE7K292VRJiDk7APn_P41pxNF-i1MkMlEnkIcrcjCtfIFo4HjCMji20j0JCeDzNc2bslhDd6y2voQyaPV7P1kzdR6t2M66p9K6Dkn7RBrJ2hPyUA1j0-cB1KIswxKS8lJ7-4p1oMd5j9d8QQtHfV9E6gXaiDg_ODTI3mwC54MQG0jocvcf58IcLYRr56D9eGunV5n6dWUXWaOVlPll0W5qF9FuQD-BZU3L7Ta95zVqoufPO4ocya3hmCw51TQwvyxIV24C9i0-hDQ1s1K00b328CqNrM5u4cP8r153TqcyZBYbNqTirTSoyqFWd9G0v8UHnZG5aDPJv5JXYB9Y0ga7xINpvKFj8biFrdEogvhmgjElhOhN2NAx3mY9QR94O3BCuVqimHXsbbYjMUA/454/4SZ_slzwTy6B2hXVmRGX8g/h2/h001.-m2ur93hSx19ldMIXMN7rK_0e15Tn82wSzsr-OyRWQc)

_Paid for by the Democratic National Committee and authorized by Warren for Senate._

The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit folks on the ballot this cycle -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can [**submit this form**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW8Fg1FwcVjLM9Jm4GiVEgCi379c5JOoOCWbKK9XcCKMb-qtFG9b_8gBSjtkNiCcYbo0bg3L4waHWT_68vRnWeDH16dfDViRc4RvQviS7-UkX3Ghb_HBISLUwM_FQk_a6z3ZnsuivKCBwYfQoiQo_vFs_cNoKIvh4Imcj-w3wPFmKz170AKXcWObheMx-cUMPrARdOOWizi8w8MCy4yL_mLjmAn7DliIbq2y-h4Swaervhy5TDmcQaO1FUt2s0jVKawPWcF5Jig8VGFKC69dMg7nndbw1RU7gkePjxKwg1-epiQ6ja5MBnkjM3Gnt7W8y3PZEfa63W_u2Saqisq4c0hR1_mF5m4X6j6yVWolZPMwDeVDlM48YJADpdS-vXaNVQQ/454/4SZ_slzwTy6B2hXVmRGX8g/h3/h001.JN2ptljoGYDs9BEdr95v3h05NpF6pJ4dKQb41G1i7KY) to stop receiving the series.

clean_body: We’re facing off against national Republicans insistent on taking control of the Senate and advancing Trump’s agenda. | | Hi Derek, it's Elizabeth Warren. Here’s how I see it: We not only have to spend the next year fighting back against MAGA extremists trying to take away our freedoms -- we also have to build on our progress and continue making real, transformative change for working families. We’ve got to reshape our economy so it works for everyone -- not just the wealthy few. We’ve got to make child care affordable so that it doesn’t eat up an entire paycheck. We’ve got to stop corporations from price gouging so people don’t wince every time they look at their grocery store receipt. We’ve got to write a fairer tax code so that a public school teacher doesn’t pay a higher tax rate than a billionaire. Big problems require big solutions. That’s what Democrats are fighting for. But none of this can happen if we don’t secure victories up and down the ballot in 2024. Republicans love to say that they’re the party of “family values” -- the party that looks out for parents and kids. Give me a break. I could go on, and on, and on...and on about how Republicans don’t do anything to actually support families. While they fight to give their rich buddies more tax breaks and take away our freedoms, Democrats are fighting to strengthen the middle class and safeguard our freedoms. But here’s the latest twist: The MAGA Republican machine couldn’t find a single Republican in Massachusetts to run against me -- so they brought in a guy from Rhode Island who has the backing of special interest groups. That unlocks an opportunity for national Republicans, billionaires, and corporate interests to invest in getting me -- and the plans we’re fighting for -- out of office. Across the country, we’re competing against national Republicans insistent on taking control of the Senate and advancing Trump’s agenda. We’re up against their wealthy allies who are determined to thwart our efforts to tax the rich, rein in big banks, and ensure our government serves working people. And when Republican politicians win elections and get their way: More parents are forced to ration groceries and watch their children go hungry. More parents are forced to have hushed conversations at the kitchen table after they’ve put their kids to bed -- conversations about how on earth they’re going to make rent, pay the mortgage, or cover medical bills. More parents -- especially moms -- are forced to give up their careers because child care costs more than their salary. More parents are forced to make impossible choices between going to work that day so they can buy groceries or staying home so they can take care of a sick child. More kids are forced to go to under-funded public schools, where some get cruelly punished for having little to no funds in their lunch accounts. More teachers are forced to deal with red tape that stops them from teaching honest lessons about Black history, or from trying to create safe, welcoming classroom environments for LGBTQ+ students. More working people and more retirees are forced to struggle to make ends meet and afford life-saving prescription drugs. All this, while actively stripping away the fundamental rights of women to make choices about their bodies and their futures -- disproportionately impacting low-income women and women of color. I’m not willing to accept any of this -- and I hope you aren’t either. We need to do everything we can to keep Republicans out of power this year -- and a powerful way you can strengthen this fight is by splitting a contribution before tonight’s critical FEC fundraising deadline. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Warren U.S. Senator, Massachusetts Paid for by the Democratic National Committee and authorized by Warren for Senate. The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit folks on the ballot this cycle -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can to stop receiving the series. Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. subject: Our first FEC fundraising deadline of 2024 is at midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This is a critical moment for our campaign, Peter.
#
Peter — is there anything we can say to encourage you to add your first donation of any amount toward our goal of raising 50,000 individual donations before our major FEC fundraising deadline at midnight TONIGHT?
**[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45052?refcode=em20240331-5166&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5166%2E614464%2EbZofsm)**
What if we told you that Josh Hawley is the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election in 2024 — with approval ratings even lower than Ted Cruz and Rick Scott — and that multiple recent polls show he’s in a margin-of-error race with Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat?
Or what if we said that Missouri is our most cost-effective chance to flip a GOP-held Senate seat this year, and that every $1 goes nearly five times as far here for voter contact efforts as it does in big states like Texas and Florida?
Or what if we told you that we’re under 12 hours away from our very first FEC deadline of 2024 — and that your support in this critical moment will help us prove that this campaign to elect Lucas Kunce is strong and ready to win this November?
**How we close out this quarter will have a major impact on our campaign’s ability to scale up over the coming months — so supporting Lucas and our race here in Missouri _right now_ could be your chance to make a real difference.**
**[So Peter, can you add your first donation of absolutely any amount toward our goal of raising 50,000 grassroots donations before midnight tonight? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so your support really does power our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/45052?refcode=em20240331-5166&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5166%2E614464%2EbZofsm)**

clean_body: It’s been a whirlwind since I officially launched my re-election campaign on Wednesday. | | Hi Peter, What a week! It’s been a whirlwind since I officially launched my re-election campaign on Wednesday. I was honored to be joined by campaign supporters and local elected officials in my hometown of Brattleboro. = Like I said in my speech, in my freshman term, I’ve been so proud to lift up the voices of regular people and represent Vermonters on some of the most pressing issues in our state. But there is still so much work to do, which is why I’m proudly running for re-election this year — and why taking back the House majority is incredibly urgent, Peter. Tonight marks the first end-of-quarter deadline of the election year. If you’ve been waiting until the time is right to step up and pitch in, the time is now, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks so much, Peter. | Dear Peter,
---
| | Time is running out! We are down to the final 11 hours of our fundraising campaign, and we need[ your help to make a difference](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=0623fb9e10&e=54a81bd33c). Your financial support is crucial in determining the outcome of the upcoming elections for the U.S. House of Representatives.

We have made incredible progress so far, but we still have a long way to go. [With your contribution](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=d97ed30b51&e=54a81bd33c), we can reach our goal and ensure that our voices are heard in Congress.

Remember, [every dollar counts](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=a93e7958ca&e=54a81bd33c). [Your donation will directly impact our ability to fight ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=9e4d617f77&e=54a81bd33c)for the issues that matter most to you. Let's make these last hours count!
---
| Thank you for your continued support,
---
|
---
| **Elizabeth Helgelien**

[**ElizabethForNV.com**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=c524123db8&e=54a81bd33c)

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: The most important race of our lives
body:
The stakes for the lives of the unborn couldn’t be any higher.
__
Stop the Biden Administration's radical abortion agenda! | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=0ae186fd22e0413fb3f30cbc53657722&_t=n9R_SrK4Cs1Wkdy5nNyIhQLf47a38R5vUbcEUQpDF8CxFlMAFLD1dauOZ-f_SBHR-ZbyIGsXzNjmyXniCUn13DL4qBQ8ruxwFFSCeL0zs3s%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0ae186fd22e0413fb3f30cbc53657722&_e=Fa-eHe2m4pBxay47Jy5JYj21B6IT6KNATgSbmPXsMg0ycxkQD_qSZdGcwOtq5lcEH_KZRv6Jyds_0cQdCqwI2Oo8mIggtNnMW3D4CmHJj6rw_nfGu9seBG73GSl8GyApvNG-dO-kKL4IIbmJX_lY7q2GrxQh43ytlElqjyEEPaIV6oZufSFqfPtcjuNggPqtW61T4lORipIboLTNGCIb1hobNfVLNVOYrjkN35tZW1-rZBiXpM1jI8S8bxonxmlv6y0Aqrmd0PB0LHXk4H0JVgOY-D9lsOM5C1S-6jWtycTdN4VAEBd3CImNL-R7ZPAgoIF7cdO5hMZWcaeZk5EJp9hPLs3o6gHyDa5oKPWUfyc2sBp9ZogJHa1f8m7jOrk7)

---
| |
Fellow Americans,

We still have several months before the 2024 election, but the battle lines have been clearly drawn and now we have a critical task to do.

**The stakes for the lives of the unborn couldn 't be any higher.**

The truth is that the best way for me and you to serve women and save babies is for all pro-life supporters to throw our entire weight behind pro-life candidates. Seriously.

And protecting the innocent lives of the unborn doesn't start and end with who occupies the White House in January of next year.

At the end of the day, if Congress isn't full of pro-life lawmakers, then there won't be any legislation to sign into law that will protect women from the dangers of abortion or the innocent lives of millions of babies who will be slaughtered through this deadly industry in the years and decades to come.

**It sounds clich e to say that this election is the most important one of our lives, but it absolutely is true.**

The overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ was an important step in protecting the innocent lives murdered by Big Abortion, but it was just the first step in the process.

Let's be honest... the pro-life movement has lost key battles at the state level to radicals who want abortion to be legal up until the moment of birth.

**The pendulum must swing back the other way.**

The Supreme Court decided to return the decision to the states, but Congress still has the power to write laws that federally mandate strict controls over what kind of laws they can write on this subject.

What does that mean exactly? It means that a minimum of a federal 15-week pain-capable limit is still possible.

The best part? _**About 70% of Americans say that they would support it.**_

We just need to fill Congress with enough pro-life lawmakers to be bold enough to push for it.

That's why I'm writing to you today.

The truth is that there are a lot of pro-life organizations that do fine work in the movement today, but there isn't anyone better positioned than SBA to get this job done.

We are the only pro-life organization that has the infrastructure to actually make a difference in elections this November. On top of that, we have a laser-focused and targeted strategy to get the job done. How?

We have been working tirelessly for more than a year now to:
* Identify strong pro-life champions who will win elections in vulnerable House and Senate seats this Fall by running on platforms to protect the unborn.
* Actively coach and equip those candidates with strong talking points and defensible positions that will persuade voters to vote for them because of the pro-life positions they take.
* Help them to develop strong policy prescriptions that have compassion for women and a desire to offer care options instead of leaving vulnerable mothers to succumb to the abortion industry's lies (which would have them kill their unborn child instead).
* Help them to advocate for stronger protections for pregnancy centers against the onslaught of leftist attacks from Planned Parenthood radicals and fanatics.
* Provide them with world-class scientific research that proves the dangers of poisonous abortion drugs to mothers and their children, and the truth about the existence of human life present in the mother's womb from the moment of conception.

We are all-in on this year's election -- AND -- on protecting the lives of the unborn against the radical left's culture of death once and for all!

**There 's just one problem, Friend...**

To keep this massive war machine in operation, we must hit specific fundraising goals each and every day.

Unfortunately, we have fallen behind the pace that we need to keep everything fully operational and on track to win in November.

**The truth is that I need another 10 donors to make a gift before the end of the day.**

Do you think that you could be one of those 10?

If so, would you take a moment right now to make your donation online at this secure donation form?

[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/election-planning](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=0ae186fd22e0413fb3f30cbc53657722&_e=Fa-eHe2m4pBxay47Jy5JYj21B6IT6KNATgSbmPXsMg0ycxkQD_qSZdGcwOtq5lcEH_KZRv6Jyds_0cQdCqwI2Oo8mIggtNnMW3D4CmHJj6rw_nfGu9seBG73GSl8GyApvNG-dO-kKL4IIbmJX_lY7q2GrxQh43ytlElqjyEEPaIV6oZufSFqfPtcjuNggPqtW61T4lORipIboLTNGCIb1hobNfVLNVOYrjkN35tZW19JQ0dFuSDCZEYsPUOCnwG4Zfcr3hjfd0tXQWXt-QvcL1g1ckHWg8r_x5dhoh5nmY-Us6zMlcvSX-dQn7u3ghJP76iNzckp4vQbXxhQawsHAJlCnsjQmup6OMod5_sX0d2vDiT58EVpPsNW5bn0AmZy)

If you can make a donation today, I'll be sure to keep you updated on the progress being made through the SBA Pro-Life America Field Team, share the latest updates within our fight for life, and let you know of key decisions and actions you can take as a passionate pro-life champion.

Thank you so much for considering this request today.

Your generous support is certain to save many, many unborn lives.

Thank you again and I hope that you have a wonderful rest of your day.

For Life,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America
---
| |
---
---
---
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
---
|
---
|
---
Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=0ae186fd22e0413fb3f30cbc53657722&_t=n9R_SrK4Cs1Wkdy5nNyIhQLf47a38R5vUbcEUQpDF8CxFlMAFLD1dauOZ-f_SBHR-ZbyIGsXzNjmyXniCUn13OaVX9OnhTWwNFyBblFt1EUiw9muB8A_mkEc4wdJmO79X0TjPJU_gHkRS_fxmk21cT6baDuE7MrNGdvKfFnMkjo%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=0ae186fd22e0413fb3f30cbc53657722&_t=n9R_SrK4Cs1Wkdy5nNyIhQLf47a38R5vUbcEUQpDF8CxFlMAFLD1dauOZ-f_SBHR-ZbyIGsXzNjmyXniCUn13DL4qBQ8ruxwFFSCeL0zs3s%3D).

Dear Peter,
This is it!
The FEC Deadline is tonight at midnight, and we are still $1 million short of our goal.
The critical FEC report has the potential to make or break campaign momentum. While the Kennedy/Shanahan ticket continues to make history, [we urgently need your financial support right now](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_deadline_3_31_24_nd1&n=4).
The political establishment and corrupt alphabet agencies will stop at nothing to protect the two-party system. At every opportunity, President Biden and a vast network of dark money groups have tried to silence RFK Jr. for speaking the truth.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has been laser-focused on policies that expand the middle class. As grocery and housing prices continue to skyrocket, Americans are being squeezed more than ever. While the political elites are busy spending billions on Ukraine and defense contractors, we're watching our country decline rapidly. It is time for a change!
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is the #1 pick of voters under age 35 and the leading independent candidate. His support is so strong that he will have access to presidential debates.
[Team Kennedy must meet our FEC Deadline, TONIGHT! We urgently need your support. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_deadline_3_31_24_nd1&n=5)
RFK Jr. isn't running for President to "spoil" the election. He is running to win the White House and heal America.
With your generous support, we will fight the lies from the political machine and get Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. on the ballot in every state!
Help Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. meet the midnight FEC Deadline by donating right now, before it's too late!

Kennedy, Jr. has been laser-focused on policies that expand the middle class. As grocery and housing prices continue to skyrocket, Americans are being squeezed more than ever. Peter,

With the Republican civil war still underway, the GOP continues to prove themselves unfit to lead. In fact, just last week, after coming up on yet **_another_** deadline to avoid a partial government shutdown, Republicans threatened to retaliate against GOP Speaker Mike Johnson for letting the spending package pass.

This year, in addition to Shontel’s campaign for re-election, Ohio has three frontline House races. This is our chance to flip the House blue and ensure we can make progress for the American people.

Army Moving ROTC Programs To Emphasize Colleges In The South

The Army is reorganizing its Reserve Officer Training Corps (ROTC)
programs to emphasize units at colleges and universities located in

subject: Sign the letter before your spot closes!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
He just DESTROYED the GOP over their impeachment plot:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65192?t=6&akid=13620%2E878179%2E3RK0oD) Jamie Raskin is a HERO! He’s one of the TOP Democrats fighting to end the MAGA mob’s impeachment scheme — and he’s not backing down.

[**The GOP is hell-bent on SILENCING Raskin, so we need a SURGE of support from folks like you to show we have his back! HURRY: ADD YOUR NAME BY MIDNIGHT to thank Rep. Jamie Raskin »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65192?t=7&akid=13620%2E878179%2E3RK0oD) | [YOUR ONLY CHANCE TO SIGN: CHIP IN $3 TO ADD YOUR NAME NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65192?t=8&akid=13620%2E878179%2E3RK0oD)
---
TO: Rep. Jamie Raskin
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: You’re a hero! **_To Rep. Jamie Raskin — thank you for being one of the top defenders of our democracy!_**

We owe _so much_ of our Democratic success this year to you.

You were a crucial figure in averting the disastrous government shutdown (twice!). You called out the GOP for electing extremist Speaker Mike Johnson.

**And now, you’re fighting tooth and nail to save President Biden from a baseless impeachment — even in the face of vile MAGA attacks.**

[**I know Republicans are using every dirty trick in the book to SILENCE you — So today, I’m fighting back and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to elect more amazing Democrats like you who will flip the House and save our democracy! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65192?t=9&akid=13620%2E878179%2E3RK0oD) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65192?t=10&akid=13620%2E878179%2E3RK0oD)
---
**_X A proud Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13620%2E878179%2E3RK0oD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13620%2E878179%2E3RK0oD).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13620%2E878179%2E3RK0oD) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=13620%2E878179%2E3RK0oD). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=13620%2E878179%2E3RK0oD)

name: Colin Allred (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: Did you know I'm TIED with Ted Cruz?
body:
|
#
_Aloha Peter — in case you missed the big news earlier this month, Colin Allred just won the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in Texas! We have the momentum we need to win this race, defeat Ted Cruz, and protect our Democratic Senate majority, so please split a donation between our campaigns if you can. — Mazie_
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82070938/464343144/484726470?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20240331_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjk2YjNmNy05MmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tA3n9qGe8MobyAEeBTLjjtmlu3VEZpObY5yzLGx8MvM=) **I'm wondering if there's anything I can possibly say to convince you to chip in $5.** What if I told you that Ted Cruz won by just **2.6%** in 2018? What if I told you that CNN is calling him the **most vulnerable** GOP senator on the ballot this year? **And what if I told you that after _months_ of trailing, a brand-new poll shows us **TIED**? [Would you give just $5 to me and Mazie to reach our $750,000 end-of-quarter goal to help ensure I have the resources I need to take the lead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82070939/464343145/484726470?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20240331_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjk2YjNmNy05MmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tA3n9qGe8MobyAEeBTLjjtmlu3VEZpObY5yzLGx8MvM=)** | | [DONATE $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82070940/464343146/484726470?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20240331_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjk2YjNmNy05MmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tA3n9qGe8MobyAEeBTLjjtmlu3VEZpObY5yzLGx8MvM=)
---
**I know $5 might not seem like much, but that's what this grassroots campaign is made of: $5 and $10 donations from folks like you who are sick and tired of Ted Cruz's culture wars and extremism.**
That's what has helped us pull even in the polls. **And now, I'm the official Democratic nominee to take on Ted Cruz** – and we need to keep up our momentum if we're going to reach millions of voters across the state, fire Ted Cruz, and finally give Texans the Senator we deserve.
**[So please, Peter, rush $5 – or any amount you can spare – ahead of tonight’s end-of-quarter deadline. For a grassroots campaign like ours, it really could be the difference between winning and losing.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82070941/464343147/484726470?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20240331_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjk2YjNmNy05MmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tA3n9qGe8MobyAEeBTLjjtmlu3VEZpObY5yzLGx8MvM=)**

name: Team Emerge
subject: 🚨Our March Fundraising Deadline is TODAY! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: If you knew...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1286%2E135344%2EbKHMn8)

$3.
If you knew you could contribute $3 to a campaign and it'd mean Democrats would hold the Senate in 2024, wouldn't you do it, lickety-split?
If you knew donating $3 could keep Donald Trump from getting back to the White House, wouldn't it be $3 well-spent?
A $3 donation to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate in Michigan has the power to do both.
Yes, it probably feels a bit unrealistic to think that just $3 can do those things in an election where an extraordinary amount of money will be spent.
But by the time you read this, lots and lots of people have chipped in their $3. And now they're hoping you'll do the same -- ESPECIALLY before Trump takes the stage in Michigan on Tuesday.
Democrats can't hold the Senate if Elissa doesn't win Michigan. And if Elissa loses in Michigan, Biden probably loses in the state as well.
Trump will be here Tuesday. Our first FEC fundraising deadline of the election year is tonight at midnight.
So please:
[**Can Elissa -- and Democrats across the country -- count on you to contribute $3 directly to Elissa Slotkin's campaign before our important FEC fundraising deadline at midnight tonight?](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar24.YRUw2h&refcode=em240331-3-700&t=2&akid=1286%2E135344%2EbKHMn8)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-mar24.radpj1&amount=3&refcode=em240331-3-700&t=21&akid=1286%2E135344%2EbKHMn8)**

Team Slotkin
