name: Team AOC
subject: Three things you need to know right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
There are just three things we need you to know before Alexandria's first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the election year.
1.**Alexandria doesn’t attend fancy cocktail party fundraisers or curry favor with billionaires.** This is a movement of, for, and made possible by thousands of people like you.
2\. **Our average contribution this month is just $17.35** We rely only on small dollar support to fight Republican extremism and push for progressive change.
3\. **Alexandria already has a MAGA Republican opponent and an ex-Wall Street primary challenger.** In 2020, our challenger raised and spent more than $10 million against us. The disinformation they sow discredits our movement unless we fight back.
We depend on thousands of people from NY-14 and beyond to power this movement and fight Republican extremism.
**Will you contribute $5 right now to help us reach our $1.5 million goal for the quarter?** Every single contribution will make a difference, here’s a personalized link for you to make your donation:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240331?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240331.7geQi2&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20240331-6117-P_FND_EOM_LNK&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6117%2E2526796%2ENv00hN)
We promise to never try to scare you into donating — and we know that not every supporter can give to every email we send.
Whether you can donate today or not, please know that Alexandria and our whole team is so grateful for your support.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240331?refcode=em20240331-6117-P_FND_EOM_LNK&t=2&refcode2=6117_2526796_Nv00hN&akid=6117%2E2526796%2ENv00hN)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240331-6117-P_FND_EOM_LNK&t=3&akid=6117%2E2526796%2ENv00hN)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=4&akid=6117%2E2526796%2ENv00hN) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=5&akid=6117%2E2526796%2ENv00hN) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=6&akid=6117%2E2526796%2ENv00hN)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=7&akid=6117%2E2526796%2ENv00hN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=6117%2E2526796%2ENv00hN)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Hill Harper
subject: Asking one last time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We’re just a few hours out from our biggest challenge so far in this race.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1126%2E62735%2EnUg3ZH)
Hey, Peter, it’s Hill —
I have to ask one last time since we’re just _hours_ away from our campaign’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline: **[Will you make your first donation of just $5 today by midnight to help hit our $25,000 online grassroots goal?](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1027?t=3&akid=1126%2E62735%2EnUg3ZH)**
We’re now almost four months out from the primary, and it’s clear that the stakes are too high to let the establishment run away with this election. They’ve failed to make housing more affordable, adequately fund our public schools, or even guarantee life-saving health care for every American — and I’m running to show _everyone_ that a better future is possible.
_But I can’t do it alone._ This is a team effort, which is why every dollar we receive is critical to our momentum in the weeks ahead. **[Please, chip in _any_ amount that works for you to help hit our end-of-quarter goal and power our grassroots campaign to victory.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1026?t=4&akid=1126%2E62735%2EnUg3ZH)**
**[DONATE »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1026?t=5&akid=1126%2E62735%2EnUg3ZH)**
Thank you for your support, Peter. I’m counting on you!
\- HH
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1026?t=6&akid=1126%2E62735%2EnUg3ZH)
* * *

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=1126%2E62735%2EnUg3ZH)

name: Katie Porter
subject: re: what's next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=38805%2E3422442%2E9nuFWh)
Hey Derek, I’ll keep this short: Tonight marks Truth to Power’s first fundraising deadline since the end of our Senate race. Truth to Power is the organization I started to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money. Your donations allow us to support candidates in must-win races across the country, and show Washington that people are hungry for candidates who aren’t beholden to corporate cash. Can you give $5?
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240331?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.katieporter.com/go/20137?refcode=em20240331-38805&t=2&akid=38805%2E3422442%2E9nuFWh)**

* * *
From: Katie Porter
Date: Wednesday, 3/27/24
Subject Line: What's next
Katie Porter here. You may have noticed that the emails I’m sending you look a bit different than the ones I used to send, and now say “Truth to Power” at the top. **That’s because while we didn’t advance out of California’s Senate primary a few weeks back, I’m not giving up our fight.**
My term serving CA-47 in the House runs through early January. And until then, I’ll be doing everything I can to get some of our top priority pieces of legislation across the finish line. That includes continuing to push leadership to take up a bill effectively banning Members of Congress from trading stocks; holding Big Oil accountable; and using the Oversight Committee to get real answers for the American people.
**I’m still focused on the future of our Congress, because I’ve seen how desperately we need to enact real change.** On the campaign trail, I heard from so many Californians who distrust the government and are losing faith in our democracy’s ability to deliver for them. **People see how beholden politicians are to their biggest donors and special interest groups. And they don’t like the end result.**
That’s why in 2020, as a freshman Member of Congress, I started Truth to Power. **Truth to Power is a “Leadership PAC” which is a campaign finance term that just means a political entity run by an elected official.**
Since 2020, Truth to Power has been able to spend over $500,000 directly supporting Democrats and has raised more than $125,000 directly into candidates’ campaigns. We’ve endorsed and supported Democrats who reject corporate PAC money and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people.
**Sunday, March 31, will mark Truth to Power’s first fundraising deadline since the end of our Senate campaign.**
Reporting a strong number will show pundits and politicians that we are ready to elect leaders who will reject corporate PAC money and act in the best interest of the American people, not big corporations. **Ahead of 3/31, is there anything you can give to Truth to Power to send a powerful message to corporate interests, and help us support Democrats in must-win races across the country?**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20240331?refcode=em20240331-38805&refcode2=38805_3422442_9nuFWh&akid=38805%2E3422442%2E9nuFWh)
Thanks for considering,
Katie Porter

**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em&t=3&refcode2=38805_3422442_9nuFWh&akid=38805%2E3422442%2E9nuFWh)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=38805%2E3422442%2E9nuFWh).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Team Schiff
subject: No matter what
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6079%2E5257348%2ERL3ntO)
Derek, we know we’ve been asking a lot lately.
And with just hours to go until tonight’s FEC deadline, **[we’ll humbly ask you again to donate if you’re able. The first FEC deadline of the general election is important, after all.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=mar2024_abs_em.AiZCIe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20240331_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=6079%2E5257348%2ERL3ntO)**
We are so grateful for all you have done for our campaign and so many others. We never take your support for granted and know there are many other causes competing for your time, attention, and resources. And we respect that.
Unfortunately, not all campaigns are like that.
**_MSNBC_ recently reported that Trump’s campaign sends an average of ten fundraising emails per _day_ — loaded with lies, accusations, and recriminations.**
Adam takes your support seriously. After all, his role in fighting for our democracy is only possible thanks to the support of committed activists and grassroots Democrats like you.
It’s why he personally reviews every email, text message, and digital advertisement we send.
It’s why when we do ask for your support, we try to ask with respect. With humility. And with just a little bit of new information each time you read.
Because with the considerable amount of not just money, but _time_ that you and so many others have dedicated to supporting Adam’s fight, opening and reading these emails, you deserve that and _so much more._
Part of the fight for our democracy is fighting for a more just, less corrupt campaign finance system. Where we can pass Adam’s constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_ and get dark money out of our elections.
**[So before tonight’s FEC deadline, we’re humbly asking you this one last time to make a donation before we file our public report — because after 11:59 pm, it’s off to the races, and the reports from these first three months will shape the election year to come. Every single dollar makes a difference.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=mar2024_abs_em.AiZCIe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20240331_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=6079%2E5257348%2ERL3ntO)**

clean_body: | Derek, we know we’ve been asking a lot lately. And with just hours to go until tonight’s FEC deadline, We are so grateful for all you have done for our campaign and so many others. We never take your support for granted and know there are many other causes competing for your time, attention, and resources. And we respect that. Unfortunately, not all campaigns are like that. MSNBC recently reported that Trump’s campaign sends an average of ten fundraising emails per day — loaded with lies, accusations, and recriminations. Adam takes your support seriously. After all, his role in fighting for our democracy is only possible thanks to the support of committed activists and grassroots Democrats like you. It’s why he personally reviews every email, text message, and digital advertisement we send. It’s why when we do ask for your support, we try to ask with respect. With humility. And with just a little bit of new information each time you read. Because with the considerable amount of not just money, but time that you and so many others have dedicated to supporting Adam’s fight, opening and reading these emails, you deserve that and so much more. Part of the fight for our democracy is fighting for a more just, less corrupt campaign finance system. Where we can pass Adam’s constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United and get dark money out of our elections. body:
https://engelforarizona.com [https://engelforarizona.com]
Peter,
I hate to be emailing on Easter, but tonight is one of the most crucial deadlines for my campaign — and we’re still falling short of our goal.
After this, our fundraising numbers for Q1 go public. It’s our chance to show our opponents that we have the resources to take on Republican outside spending during the most critical leg of this campaign.
My opponent is a MAGA puppet who has repeatedly chosen his party over the interests of his constituents.
AZ-06 deserves so much better.
I’m running to stand up for reproductive rights, a stronger economy, and water security.
Republicans are going to pour millions of dollars into defeating our grassroots campaign. They need this seat to protect their House majority, and this is a toss-up race.
Peter, I hate to interrupt your Sunday, but we must hit our fundraising goal. Can you chip in now to help us cross the finish line before our deadline tonight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_033124_EOQ_G_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_033124_EOQ_G_act]
Thank you, Peter,
Kirsten

I’ve been able to experience first-hand how extreme politicians have failed the people of Arizona. When I underwent my abortion procedure in Arizona, I faced a number of hurdles that were barriers to care, like a mandatory waiting period and ultrasounds. These barriers were required by law because of extreme politicians infringing on our healthcare freedoms.

Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Fight for Progress today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82072702/464347481/1527712699?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-03-31_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMTBmYThiLTk4ZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ViHE6rPSkApZ6zd3kp9fO0D6g12dDZHZm2dVSBe90Sw=)

Senator Eva Burch

name: Membership
subject: The one email you need to read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
| Hey Peter,

We know you are probably getting a lot of emails in your inbox right now. If there’s one email you read, make it this one. Here are the important reasons why you’re getting so many messages:

→ GOP super PACs are spending millions to distort our candidates’ records and push their extremist agendas forward.They’re misleading the public on their records, including on their brand new anti-IVF vote. **[Chip in to stop them now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82072725/464347584/472842942?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20240331_FR_EOQ_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_2.10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTc2MjkxZi05OWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RgntazBSlauEtCmdUtLNfq_MMDtYnyli44K1RcFD8MI=)**

→ The public FEC filing deadline in less than 24 hours is a test of our strength and will be used as a benchmark of our support as we head into campaign season. Our opponents will be scanning through our report looking for signs of weakness. **[Chip in to help us have a strong FEC report now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82072728/464347585/472842942?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DWSPAC_20240331_FR_EOQ_0_1MO_campaign_NA_NA_2.10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODcwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTc2MjkxZi05OWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RgntazBSlauEtCmdUtLNfq_MMDtYnyli44K1RcFD8MI=)**

→ Democrats are ready to take away Republicans' razor-thin majority in the House and expand our Senate majority in November. | Peter,

With our first FEC quarterly deadline of the year tonight, I find myself reflecting on what’s at stake in the upcoming election. We’re gearing up for another Trump-Biden rematch this November, and Republicans have been laying the foundation for another Trump term.

**We know what one Trump term did to our country: it set the foundation for the overturn of _Roe v. Wade_ and sent us down a spiral of division that led to the January 6th insurrection.**

In the months leading up to the election, we have to do everything we can to prevent that from happening again. As the chair of BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, I’ve made it my mission to ensure we flip the House and get back on track to ensure working families get their fair share. I need your help, Peter.

**8 months. 31 weeks. 219 days.**
There are exactly 219 days between now and Election Day 2024.
A lot will happen between now and then, but here’s what we know for certain.
Over these next 219 days, far-right groups will raise millions of dollars for the sole purpose of sending Donald Trump back to the White House.
National Republicans will continue to endorse Trump, despite his felonies, outright lies, and blatant attacks on our democracy.
Our rights will continue to hang in the balance as we wait and see which way this election goes.
_But what’s less certain is whether we’ll have the resources to fight back._ That’s where you come in.
**We’re just hours away from our first quarterly fundraising deadline.** The impact NextGen and young Americans nationwide will have on this election will depend on whether or not we hit our goals.
[We’re looking to this network of grassroots supporters to help us get young voters to the polls in November and beyond. name: Dean (Sent from iPhone)
subject: Quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress
body:
| | Hi Peter! Jessica and I are running around doing campaign stuff today, so I wanted to drop in a note to our supporters to say: First, Happy Easter!! 🐰
And second, our end-of-quarter deadline is tonight at midnight! If you haven’t had a chance to give yet, [make sure you chip in even just $1 to help show how motivated we are to flip this district and kick out Kevin Kiley!](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/SMKwOCv0XZuFKgNy2dXpSw~~/AAUS1gA~) This is our first big quarterly deadline of the year, so I want to make a great impression to the world about how positive and strong our campaign is.
Our team couldn’t do any of this without you, and we’re grateful every day for all the people we’re able to meet and speak with about the issues facing our district. I hope you enjoy the rest of your Sunday!
Dean (Sent from my iPhone)
---|---
| Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress.

### Get to know Jonathan Emord

For the past 38 years, Jonathan Emord has litigated against the federal bureaucracy, winning repeatedly. He is a leading constitutional law and litigation expert and the author of five critically acclaimed books.
It's time to end transitioning of youth; stop the assault on girls and women's sports, locker rooms, and bathrooms; eliminate woke indoctrination in schools and the military; ensure equal justice under law; secure our borders; roll back excessive government spending and cut taxes; reduce the size and scope of the government; and liberate free enterprise.

name: Debbie (personal email)
subject: Rick Scott is a total fraud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Florida voters aren't buying his scam.
| | |
---
Friend, I'm disappointed but hardly surprised.
**As per usual, Rick Scott is lying to voters. Will you give me a second to explain the truth about his record and mine? [(New polling data this month shows me 4 points ahead, so if you're already all in to retire Rick Scott, you can click here to rush a donation ahead of my biggest end-of-quarter deadline yet.)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82073476/464349838/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1006-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2QwOWE5ZjMtOTllZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6gshLoC7buO_B6Q91fKjo59wVK7QciNioyLZr-5b8d0=)**
Rick Scott can spend millions lying to voters (and he already has), but that will never change the truth: **Rick Scott is a total fraud.** He made his fortune as the CEO of a company that was charged with the largest Medicare fraud in our nation's history at that time. Then, as governor of Florida, he pushed an extreme agenda that hurt working families — _all while he saw his own net worth triple._
Apparently, the governor's mansion wasn't enough for Scott. So, when his term was up he bought his way into the United States Senate — and things only got worse from there. He pushed Trump's "Big Lie", refused to certify the 2020 results, and wrote the plan to end Social Security and Medicare. He's even advocated for a nationwide ban on abortions and raising taxes on working families.
**Rick Scott has spent his entire life serving one singular person:_himself_.**
My story is different. My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to achieve our American Dream. **That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much.**
After years of working in nonprofits, I ran for Congress to flip a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, I wrote the bill to **expand seniors’ Medicare coverage** , worked with Republicans to provide **economic relief** to families and small businesses, secured $200 million for **Everglades restoration** , and fought tirelessly for **commonsense gun safety** reforms as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force**. **
I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. **I'll never hide from my record. But Rick Scott is already spending MILLIONS trying to run from his. Florida voters aren't buying his scam.**
**My opponent is ranked as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024, and his approval ratings are _tanking._ But I can only defeat him with strong, early grassroots support. [So please, if you have anything extra to spare, will you make a donation to help me hit my $700,000 end-of-quarter goal so I can beat Rick Scott and win a better future for Florida? I'm counting on you to have my back tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82073477/464349839/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1006-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2QwOWE5ZjMtOTllZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6gshLoC7buO_B6Q91fKjo59wVK7QciNioyLZr-5b8d0=)**

clean_body: Florida voters aren't buying his scam. | | | Friend, I'm disappointed but hardly surprised. As per usual, Rick Scott is lying to voters. Will you give me a second to explain the truth about his record and mine? = Rick Scott can spend millions lying to voters (and he already has), but that will never change the truth: Rick Scott is a total fraud. He made his fortune as the CEO of a company that was charged with the largest Medicare fraud in our nation's history at that time. Then, as governor of Florida, he pushed an extreme agenda that hurt working families — all while he saw his own net worth triple. Apparently, the governor's mansion wasn't enough for Scott. So, when his term was up he bought his way into the United States Senate — and things only got worse from there. He pushed Trump's "Big Lie", refused to certify the 2020 results, and wrote the plan to end Social Security and Medicare. He's even advocated for a nationwide ban on abortions and raising taxes on working families. Rick Scott has spent his entire life serving one singular person:himself. My story is different. My mother brought my sisters and me to America when I was 14 to give us a chance at a better life. It took long hours, hard work, and a whole lot of hope, but we were able to achieve our American Dream. That's why I made the decision to spend my career giving back to this incredible country and the state that gave me so much. After years of working in nonprofits, I ran for Congress to flip a tough battleground district — and I won. In the House, I wrote the bill to expand seniors’ Medicare coverage , worked with Republicans to provide economic relief to families and small businesses, secured $200 million for Everglades restoration , and fought tirelessly for commonsense gun safety reforms as the vice chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force. I'm incredibly proud of the work that I've done to uplift and protect my community. I'll never hide from my record. But Rick Scott is already spending MILLIONS trying to run from his. Florida voters aren't buying his scam. My opponent is ranked as one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot in 2024, and his approval ratings are tanking. But I can only defeat him with strong, early grassroots support. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: This race is a head-to-head between me and Kari Lake.
body:
I believe that we can win. But I can’t do it alone. So today, I’m asking you, very humbly, to make a donation to my campaign.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T507695fe-97b6-49e0-9841-d1928b877b73/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| | | | | Peter, when I was first thinking about launching this campaign last year I had no idea what to expect. I knew I had some supporters from my congressional campaigns that I could count on, but beyond that it was a shot in the dark. One thing I knew for sure was that whether this was a 2-way race, a 3-way race, a 27-way race, whatever — I was going to need the support of a huge grassroots team behind me. Over the last year we’ve built that team, with close to 150,000 individual donors. **And now we know: Sinema’s out.** This race is a head-to-head between me and Kari Lake. And we've got to expand out that grassroots team and build a coalition here in Arizona that can defeat her. I believe that we can. But I can’t do it alone. So today, I’m asking you, very humbly, to make a donation to my campaign. [**Please, split a $5 or $10 donation between Blue Amp Action and my campaign. Whatever you can afford before our midnight deadline can help us build the team that’s going to win in Arizona. Your support is critical to defeating Kari Lake and holding our Senate majority.** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e9558d5-90d1-4ff9-83c0-c649261b780d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e4602ba-1c56-4d77-82c2-fdbe101c74e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks a lot for this. I really appreciate it.

Ruben
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: I don't know what else to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
We can't miss this goal.
| | |
---
Friend – I don’t like reaching out like this, but what would _you_ do in my position?
**I’m officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate, and experts predict that Nevada could deliver both the White House AND the Senate to Republicans this year.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82073749/464350784/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3615-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGMxOGNhOC05YWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQv4pIhWaP69GarDxnwDd6vTBKRabvalCi7AGPoWsVE=)
With so much riding on my critical battleground race in Nevada, I have **_no choice_** but to call on top supporters like you for help as I face my first, critical FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the election year.
**Let me be clear:** Missing _any_ of my fundraising deadlines at this stage could spell _disaster_ for my campaign’s momentum – especially with dark money groups like the Koch network pouring millions into Nevada to flip it red.

But it’s _absolutely crucial_ we close this $9,135 gap before our end-of-quarter numbers are locked in and made public.
**I don't have a hope of reaching this goal without your _immediate_ grassroots support. **[**So please, friend, will you chip in $5 – or as much as you can spare today – to help me fight back against the GOP, win in Nevada, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82073750/464350785/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3615-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGMxOGNhOC05YWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQv4pIhWaP69GarDxnwDd6vTBKRabvalCi7AGPoWsVE=)

Let me be clear: Missing any of my fundraising deadlines at this stage could spell disaster for my campaign’s momentum – especially with dark money groups like the Koch network pouring millions into Nevada to flip it red. But it’s absolutely crucial we close this $9,135 gap before our end-of-quarter numbers are locked in and made public. #### **We Raised $3,955 over 27 Donations in 24 Hours**
**Anyone who donates more than $30 gets an enamel Anti-RCV coffee mug, anyone who donates $50 or more gets a "Team Alaska" shirt. If you donate $150, you will get two enamel coffee mugs and two shirts.****If you already donated yesterday, if you donate more, I will add it together. Donate by clicking here, or go to our profile and click the link to our website and you can donate there.**
#### [**Click Here To Donate or Donate on Our Website**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6609c493ba6c093a171f982b&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcheckout.square.site%2Fmerchant%2FMLJ1ATMTHHHX9%2Fcheckout%2FL7ULAYFLVT5CMJ4QXUDZREOQ&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6609b74d0632204c66d50da7&l=en-US&s=d7giSeVzfk1fKWUuARYSrENzZFQ%3D)
#### **Very Limited Edition, only 100 of each.**
Help Us Remove Rank Choice Voting from Alaska! Dear Supporters, Last summer, we paused our donation requests in response to some complaints raised by Soros and Friends aka Pro-RCV groups, but we're thrilled to announce that our donation portal is now live again! We're reaching out to you because we need your support to continue our mission of removing Rank Choice Voting from Alaska. With your generous contributions, we've achieved remarkable progress on a shoestring budget. While we don't have millions to spend, every dollar you donate will be dedicated to crucial advertising and Get Out The Vote (GOTV) activities. For instance, we're excited to bring Scott Presler to Alaska this fall, and your donations will help make this happen! In appreciation of your support, if you donate more than $500, you'll have the opportunity to join us and Scott Presler at the State Fair. It promises to be a memorable event, and we're eager to have a large group participate. Please note that donors contributing more than $500 will need to complete a financial disclosure with APOC, the Alaska State Regulator. We're here to assist you with this process, which can be conveniently done through the same portal used for filing PFD. Your support means the world to us. Please consider sharing and forwarding our emails to spread the word about our cause. We've dedicated over a year and a half of our lives to this mission, and we're determined to see it through. Together, we can make a difference. Let's finish the job! Don't forget to remind 5-10 of your friends about the vote on November 5th. Vote Yes to Repeal/Remove Rank Choice Voting from Alaska. Thank you for standing with us. Warm regards, Phil Izon
---
---
|
---
#### **Alaska US Congress Candidate Response to me: “Death To Me!”** **On Easter**
We have reached out to candidates in Alaska, Arizona, Nevada, Oregon, and Idaho helping candidates learn about RCV. Richard Grayson who is running for US Congress in Alaska against Nick Begich and Mary Peltola, but lives in Arizona. I sent him a long message about meeting with him regarding Rank Choice Voting, and how I’d be willing to help him learn about the topic. His Response: “Death To Me!”

|

|

If you would like to stay updated on Our Plans, Want to Meet Scott Presler, or if you would like us to come to your group or community event, please reach out and we will see what we can schedule. Planning Mid to Late August for him to be in Town. Dates Coming Soon, Stay Tuned.

I do not think so, I think they should be accountable for their inaction (No Assistance on the Repeal of Ranked Choice Voting). The Arizona GOP, Idaho GOP, Hawaii GOP all invited me with Open Arms, The Alaska GOP was nonexistent.**
#### **I am not talking about local GOP groups, or individuals. I am discussing the Alaska GOP Leadership. Why the obvious disdain for Citizen Driven Politics?**
#### **We received more help from other State’s GOP. The Alaska GOP Leadership did not help us, let’s get a real leader. Jerry Ward**
#### **Out of all the candidates running to be GOP Chairman, Jerry Ward was essential to our success, we support Jerry Ward for Chairman of the Alaska GOP.**
#### **Learn how to be a delegate and vote in your district for Jerry Ward for GOP Chairman.**

### [**GOP Calendar**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6609c493ba6c093a171f982b&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskagop.net%2Fevents%2Fmonth%2F2024-03%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6609b74d0632204c66d50da7&l=en-US&s=Qa7Ow-WkFHGxYLqIR1xkjD829Ic%3D)

#### **We need better Representation in the Alaska Republican Party. Jerry Ward was President Trump Alaska Campaign Manager, if President Trump Appointed Jerry Ward, who is also an Alaskan Native and a Vietnam Veteran. One of Jerry Ward's goals is to eliminate**[**#rankedchoicevoting**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6609c493ba6c093a171f982b&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2Frankedchoicevoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6609b74d0632204c66d50da7&l=en-US&s=VUpXoldk4v7UiSNIE6-JcFx7BnA%3D)**we need a GOP Chair who will fight for Alaskans. The GOP to this day has not helped us. Let's elect leadership who will fight for Alaska.**

### **We Did It, Repeal of RCV is on the ballot**
**Victory in Sight: Mobilizing Alaska Against Ranked Choice Voting In an unprecedented mobilization for electoral reform, our coalition has successfully ignited a statewide movement to challenge and propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska.****With the unwavering dedication of over 700 volunteers, we've shattered expectations by gathering an astounding 43,000 signatures from Alaskans who share our vision for a more transparent and straightforward electoral process. This monumental achievement not only secured our position on the ballot but also paved the way for the citizens of Alaska to voice their desire for change.****The journey to this pivotal moment has been fueled by a year of relentless effort, strategic networking, and a deep commitment to our cause. Our volunteers have traversed every corner of Alaska, engaging with communities, explaining the complexities of RCV, and illuminating the benefits of a more direct voting system. This grassroots campaign has not only expanded our network but has also significantly raised awareness about the issues surrounding RCV.****As we stand on the brink of this historic opportunity, we extend our heartfelt gratitude to everyone who has contributed to this cause. Your support has been the backbone of our campaign, providing us with the resources, energy, and motivation needed to confront and dismantle the RCV system in Alaska.****The early news release confirming our achievement marks not just a milestone for our movement but also a beacon of hope for those who believe in electoral reform. This is our chance to fundamentally transform Alaska's electoral landscape, ensuring a voting system that is straightforward, understandable, and truly reflective of the people's will.****Let's seize this moment and make history together. The ballot is our battleground, and with your continued support, we will achieve our goal of ridding Alaska of Ranked Choice Voting. The fight is far from over, but with our collective strength, determination, and the foundation we've built over the past year, victory is within our reach. Thank you, Alaska, for standing with us.****Together, we will restore simplicity and clarity to our elections, ensuring a future where every vote counts in the most straightforward manner possible. Let's move forward, united in our purpose and resolute in our mission to eliminate Ranked Choice Voting. The time for change is now, and with your help, we will make it a reality.**
---
### **Press Release**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****Alaska Volunteers Triumph: Nearly 43,000 Signatures to Overturn Ranked Choice Voting** _**Anchorage, Alaska**_**– In a resounding demonstration of democratic engagement, a grassroots movement led by over 700 Alaskan volunteers has successfully gathered nearly 43,000 signatures, significantly exceeding the required 26,000, to propose the removal of Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) in Alaska. This monumental effort was completed a full month ahead of schedule, showcasing the determination and unity of Alaskans.****"This is not just a collection of signatures, but a profound statement by the people of Alaska," said Phil Izon, a lead organizer of the initiative. "Our volunteers, all Alaskans, have voiced their concerns and desires through this campaign. We've surpassed the number of signatures the Pro-RCV group initially gathered to introduce RCV, underlining a growing skepticism and desire for change among the electorate."****The movement has been a true grassroots effort, contrasting sharply with the Pro-RCV group, which reportedly spent over $7 million and relied on out-of-state resources to promote and push RCV on Alaska. "Our success was driven by Alaskans, for Alaskans. We did not need to fly in people or spend millions. Our strength came from the genuine support and hard work of our volunteers," Izon added.****This initiative represents a significant challenge to RCV, a system that has been increasingly scrutinized for its complexity and the perception that it obscures the straightforward principle of "one person, one vote." The organizers believe that this successful petition drive will resonate beyond Alaska, setting a precedent for other states considering RCV, we are a cautionary tale (Like a canary in coal mine, warning others about danger).****"We stand for the Alaskans who felt misled, for those who found the RCV ballot confusing, and for everyone who believes in the sanctity of the straightforward voting process," said Izon. "Our message is clear: it's time to remove Ranked Choice Voting from our state. 'Let's Take Out The Trash, Let’s Rid The Rank' is more than a slogan; it's a call to action for all Alaskans who value transparency and simplicity in their electoral system."****The submitted signatures will now undergo verification by state officials. When validated, this will pave the way for a ballot measure where Alaskans can directly vote on the future of RCV in their state.****"We did this for you, for every Alaskan who wants their vote to count in the most direct and understandable way. We urge all Alaskans to stand with us and vote to remove Rank Choice Voting. Together, we can ensure our electoral system reflects the true will of the people," concluded Izon.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
#### **We Did The Impossible**
---
**We did the impossible, with 700 volunteers. We led the drive to get the required signatures. We did this for fractions of what they did. They hired an out of state firm and flew professional signature gatherers from all over the country to Alaska to get their signatures We used Alaskans, led by Alaskans. The Pro-RCV group is taking money from the 1630 Fund which is directly linked to Arabella Advisors. Even the New York Times labels them as "Dark Money" Let's beat them in 2024, make sure to tell everyone to show up and vote in 2024**
---
#### **The Tale of the Ranked Choice Voting Dragon**
---
#### **Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.**
#### **The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**
#### _**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**_
#### _**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**_
#### _**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_

body:
Can Wesley count on you....? Peter, is there anything else we can say to convince you to [**pitch in $5 or more ahead of tonight’s FEC end-of-quarter deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82074122/464352118/1027048215?refcode=em24_240331_eoq5_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240331_eoq5_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=37d47e05-9def-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzdkNDdlMDUtOWRlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E1faVAGpZViB4m5E8C6UUddgdDzjFkyFiEZsf2AgV8E=)

We’ve set a $50,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal for our first FEC filing deadline of the year – but right now – we’re really not where we need to be.

Wesley's opponents are watching our campaign closely, and when our fundraising numbers go public tomorrow, we NEED to be able to show them the power of our grassroots campaign.

name: Team Biden-Harris
subject: our apologies...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Polling in this race is close. Razor close. Not just nationally, but in swing states across the country. | | |
---
Picture it, Peter. President Donald J. Trump getting sworn in on January 20, 2025 -- the start of another four-year term filled with chaos and division. Four long years. We're sorry to put that thought into your head, but it's important we all come to terms with the fact there is a very real chance it happens. At midnight TONIGHT, we close the books on the first quarterly FEC deadline of the year. Polling in this race is close. Razor thin. Not just nationally, but in swing states across the country. The MAGA right is mobilizing, and outside spending is only going to ramp up against us as we get closer to the election. The only thing standing in their way is Joe Biden...and you. **Let us be clear: If we have the resources to win this campaign, we will. If we don't, we're in trouble. The answer to that question is up to people who care enough about the outcome to donate.** _And with the general election officially underway, there's no better time than right now. President Biden needs you._ [Can you please use this link to contribute $25 to Joe Biden's reelection campaign before our end-of-quarter deadline tonight? clean_body: Polling in this race is close. Razor close. Not just nationally, but in swing states across the country. | | | Picture it, Peter. President Donald J. Trump getting sworn in on January 20, 2025 -- the start of another four-year term filled with chaos and division. Four long years. We're sorry to put that thought into your head, but it's important we all come to terms with the fact there is a very real chance it happens. At midnight TONIGHT, we close the books on the first quarterly FEC deadline of the year. Polling in this race is close. Razor thin. Not just nationally, but in swing states across the country. The MAGA right is mobilizing, and outside spending is only going to ramp up against us as we get closer to the election. The only thing standing in their way is Joe Biden...and you. Let us be clear: If we have the resources to win this campaign, we will. If we don't, we're in trouble. The answer to that question is up to people who care enough about the outcome to donate. And with the general election officially underway, there's no better time than right now. President Biden needs you. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. Team Biden-Harris

Earlier this month, a group of donors agreed to triple match every contribution to LCV up to $50,000. The deadline is at 11:59 p.m. tonight -- and we need your help to bring us over the finish line.

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Please, Peter. Time is running out
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, we’re writing to see if there is ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make a donation to Ruben Gallego’s campaign before midnight tonight.
Please, Peter. With time running out and just hours to go:
What if we told you that every pundit, every pollster, every media outlet in the country agrees that Arizona is going to be one of the most expensive, one of the hardest fought, and one of the closest states in the country this year?
What if we told you that Kari Lake lost by less than one percent of all votes cast in 2022, and several polls show her leading Ruben?
And what if we told you that if Ruben is defeated by Kari Lake it is all the more likely that Trump wins Arizona, too?
If we lose in Arizona it will be Trump and Kari Lake — MAGA extremists — running the show in 2025.
We can’t afford to fall short of our fundraising goals ahead of this official FEC deadline tonight.
Please, we’re really depending on your support.
[**Can you make a donation of any amount — any at all — before our deadline hits at midnight?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-mar24.sAuZhx&refcode=em240331-3-160&t=1&akid=2148%2E734936%2EwkLdLc)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

name: Martin Sheen
subject: A message from me...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend -- My name is Martin Sheen, though you may remember me as President Bartlet from _The West Wing._

I’m reaching out because Election Day is fast approaching. Republican megadonors are spending _millions_ to replace Democratic senators with their MAGA candidates. Control of the Senate and the future of democracy itself are on the line. _Yes, it really is that serious._

The GOP only needs to flip TWO seats to take control -- and polls show a _lot_ more Democrats than that are locked in _frighteningly close_ races against Republican candidates. We can’t let the GOP have its way in ANY of these key races.

**But we don't have many chances left to make a difference -- and with the DSCC's end-of-quarter fundraising deadline coming up tonight, we need to act NOW.**

**[So, I’m humbly asking: Will you pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford to support Democrats? A group of donors has even agreed to TRIPLE your gift, but only for a limited time:](https://go.dscc.org/go/17659?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240331-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240331-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14105%2E9716520%2Eq1ld2M)**

| | [DONATE $5 (BECOMES $15)](https://go.dscc.org/go/17659?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240331-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240331-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14105%2E9716520%2Eq1ld2M)
---

On _The West Wing,_ when our country faced impossibly difficult times, we tried to show America what our government _could be_ if we all banded together for a common purpose. But this year’s Republican Senate candidates have no interest in any such vision.

They have tried to grind President Biden’s agenda to a halt and even embraced Donald Trump’s dangerous election lies. There’s just no telling what lengths they’ll go to if they take back our Senate majority.

That’s why the DSCC _must_ reach tonight's fundraising goal, so we can elect Democrats with integrity -- something these MAGA Republican candidates know nothing about. Unfortunately, we're falling behind our goal to defend the Senate.

There’s still hope though: Chuck Schumer just let me know that he’s unlocked $10,000 in matching funds to TRIPLE gifts made in response to this email -- _as long as they come in before midnight tonight._

**[Please, will you contribute $5 _(becomes $15 today)_ to defend our Democratic Senate majority against the farthest of far-right Republicans?](https://go.dscc.org/go/17659?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20240331-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20240331-MartinSheen-ReallySeriousDeadline-Pros-sl1&akid=14105%2E9716520%2Eq1ld2M)**

clean_body: | | | Friend -- My name is Martin Sheen, though you may remember me as President Bartlet from The West Wing. I’m reaching out because Election Day is fast approaching. Republican megadonors are spending millions to replace Democratic senators with their MAGA candidates. Control of the Senate and the future of democracy itself are on the line. Yes, it really is that serious. The GOP only needs to flip TWO seats to take control -- and polls show a lot more Democrats than that are locked in frighteningly close races against Republican candidates. We can’t let the GOP have its way in ANY of these key races. But we don't have many chances left to make a difference -- and with the DSCC's end-of-quarter fundraising deadline coming up tonight, we need to act NOW. | | On The West Wing, when our country faced impossibly difficult times, we tried to show America what our government could be if we all banded together for a common purpose. But this year’s Republican Senate candidates have no interest in any such vision. They have tried to grind President Biden’s agenda to a halt and even embraced Donald Trump’s dangerous election lies. There’s just no telling what lengths they’ll go to if they take back our Senate majority. That’s why the DSCC must reach tonight's fundraising goal, so we can elect Democrats with integrity -- something these MAGA Republican candidates know nothing about. Unfortunately, we're falling behind our goal to defend the Senate. There’s still hope though: Chuck Schumer just let me know that he’s unlocked $10,000 in matching funds to TRIPLE gifts made in response to this email -- as long as they come in before midnight tonight. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first $10,000 received from this email will be TRIPLED: | | | | My character in The West Wing famously said, “Decisions are made by those who show up.” I truly believe that, and if you do too, then Thank you so much for all you do, Martin Sheen | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. Peter,

We're in the midst of an unparalleled financial onslaught. **Mitch McConnell's Super PAC is unleashing a staggering $83 MILLION in ads aimed squarely at defeating Sherrod Brown in Ohio. Not stopping there, McConnell's dark money machine is pouring another $48 MILLION into Montana to unseat Jon Tester.** The numbers don't lie; the opposition is on a warpath, armed with a financial arsenal aimed at dismantling our Senate majority.

Here's where we stand: To counteract this massive spending and safeguard Ohio and Montana's blue seats, our goal is to raise $250,000. **_Time is of the essence, and as of this moment, we're $3,194 short. The deadline? 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT._**

Grassroots Democrats like YOU have always been the backbone of our efforts. It's clear: the only way to counteract the tidal wave of McConnell's spending is through our collective grassroots power. Your donation, no matter the size, fuels our fight and brings us closer to our goal.

[Can we count on you to stand with Senators like Sherrod Brown, Jon Tester, and Democrats across the country? Every contribution, whether $5, $50, or $500, makes a pivotal difference. With your support, we can reach swing voters, counter the barrage of opposition ads, and keep our Senate seats blue.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82074594/464353519/-332980646?refcode=DR_FR_90DO_240331_1_2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkNTBkNWQ3LTllZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=d5VpXuDnkS4KPVvaBNJsgxVvT9nD7I8uO3b3slich2E=)

subject: Week 12: Legislative Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7daafc5dc9&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Dear Freedom Fighters,

On Monday, I signed onto a letter urging the Superintendent of Public Instruction (SPI) and the state’s [Board of Education](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=fb9071f7d3&e=a7ab36849c) to keep the current 2023-2024 ESA Parent [Handbook](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ea751ad32f&e=a7ab36849c). The State Board of Education (SBE) tried to pull a rogue move that would have not followed current state statutes. This new maneuver by the legislature encouraging the SPI and current SBE should help give parents of the ESA program the necessary time to submit additional public comment to further improve the current handbook.

Also, I hosted a stakeholder meeting in the morning in the Senate with a few House members and advocates pertaining to [Senate Bill 1372](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8deb8ad06d&e=a7ab36849c). I sponsored this critical legislation to save children’s lives by putting an end to family [reunification camps](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e5c3af189c&e=a7ab36849c) in Arizona. The federal government and many states have already taken this important step to prohibit these camps from being used, so we’re hoping Arizona will be the next state to ban this horrific practice.

Afterwards, I met with a young woman named Amanda who testified in the House in support of [Senate Bill 1367](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=507aa40d6d&e=a7ab36849c). This bill when passed would create a pathway to jobs for those with old criminal records and help them rebuild their lives, while keeping our communities safer and strengthening our economy.

Later in the morning, I met with Jordan and Cassidy [Harstad](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=bda5b0e8b9&e=a7ab36849c). Their son tragically died by suicide in 2022. Their son had been a victim of [bullying](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0fe0739ceb&e=a7ab36849c) by fellow classmates at Chandler Unified Hamilton High School. His parents along with other Chandler Unified parents reported many incidents to the school. Sadly, the school administration ignored their continued pleas for help.

Our own daughter experienced harassment, sexual assault, and bullying at her own public school when she was 12. Shortly after I was first elected in 2019, I sponsored [legislation](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=4edafd2452&e=a7ab36849c) that would have provided a lifeline to students who had been bullied on their school’s campus. Sadly, the [bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e0ec959607&e=a7ab36849c) didn’t receive a hearing because the chair of the House Committee on Education at the time didn’t support expanding school choice options to this vulnerable population.

I have committed to working with both Amanda and the Harstads later this year on legislation impacting the formerly incarcerated as well as schools not addressing the incessant bullying taking place in our children’s schools.

The governor signed [Senate Bill 1364](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c5d80e3189&e=a7ab36849c) –another bill I sponsored this session. SB 1364 improves outcomes, reduces recidivism within the criminal justice system by requiring a supervising probation department to courtesy transfer a probationer’s intensive probation supervision or supervised probation to the county in which the probationer is requesting to reside if the probationer can provide proof of: 1) family caregiver obligations; 2) employment or housing; or 3) an offer of employment of housing that will assist in the probationer’s positive behavioral change.

On Tuesday, we held our weekly open caucus to discuss impending legislation. During the lunch hour, I walked over to [Arizona Taxpayers Research Association](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=288e8cd145&e=a7ab36849c) (a.k.a. ATRA) and on my way back my shoe broke. We tried super glue, adhesive glue and finally, we duct taped it so I could go to the floor to vote because I wasn’t walking to the floor barefoot. Talk about being immobilized!

Near the close of business, I submitted my form and nomination petition to continue serving as a Republican precinct committeeman, again.

The House proudly passed out my [SCR 1042](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3b30249ebf&e=a7ab36849c), which proclaims the Legislature's support for the citizens and government of Texas, in their efforts to secure our nation's southern border. This resolution had zero support from Democrats in both the Senate and the House. The border invasion has not let up in Texas, nor in Arizona, and could get much worse in the coming days. When I speak with constituents at the door, illegal immigration is the top issue facing our district. Many parts of Arizona are being attacked by criminals crossing our border illegally and attempting to evade law enforcement. There are also massive numbers of so-called asylum seekers that are processed in Arizona then bussed out of our state. On March 31st, federal funding supporting the operations of this system will run out, prompting a massive release of migrants into our communities that don’t have the resources to handle them. Lives and livelihoods are at stake while Democrats continue to turn a blind eye to the border invasion.

On Wednesday, we spent a lot of time voting out legislation. I had a packed lunch hour. I first met with the [Amino C.Y. Chi](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=9b50e00944&e=a7ab36849c), the Director General of Taipei Economic and Cultural Office in Los Angeles. Then, I had the chance to chat with The Libre Institute and Americans for Prosperity- Arizona who were outside the Capitol serving warm tamales in support of this year’s “free the tamales” bill. I was even included in a TV [interview](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=5e008c5bce&e=a7ab36849c) being conducted at their booth. I also met with some wonderful businesses who were at the Capitol for the Capitol’s annual “Mining Day.”

Later that day, the Senate President appointed me to [represent](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=fd917ff9f8&e=a7ab36849c) the State Senate on the Department of Revenue’s (DOR) Tax System Modernization Project Advisory Committee that was created out of [statute](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d3d2914bef&e=a7ab36849c). If you have any input, please feel free to reply to this email. I look forward to working with businesses and individual taxpayers as DOR implements this new tax system.

I was also afforded the chance to recognize the current [Dodie Londen](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=08eb5199c2&e=a7ab36849c) class in the Senate gallery and meet with the class in the Senate President’s office. I am a graduate of the 2010 class. [AZ Free News](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=da7f128484&e=a7ab36849c) published an article about my [bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1bdd73b518&e=a7ab36849c) I sponsored that was signed into law last week expanding Kayleigh’s Law.

On Thursday, the House overwhelmingly passed [Senate Bill 1367](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0d61ba281e&e=a7ab36849c) which will create a pathway to jobs for those with old records and help them rebuild their lives, while keeping our communities safer and strengthening our economy. The next stop will be to the Governor’s office for her signature.

The State Senate debated several dozens of bills on the floor of the Senate. In the afternoon, I walked over to the Secretary of State’s office and filed more than double the number of signatures required to qualify as a Republican candidate for Legislative District 2 for the July 30th primary ballot. I am running in a competitive primary race, so please let me know how you would like to help me win the primary, so I can go on to win our swing district’s competitive general. Mind you, the Democrat is running unopposed in its Democrat primary election.

On Friday, I received a brief update from a fellow member participating with the Advisory Board on Education Reform. I also had an introductory phone call with Russ Skinner, the recently appointed Maricopa County Sheriff. I also participated in the DOR’s first Tax System Modernization Project Advisory Committee [meeting](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=b45dc26919&e=a7ab36849c).

I also received communications near the close of business the Governor had signed two more of my bills into law. The bills signed into law are Senate Bills [1371](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2d178d5315&e=a7ab36849c) and [1629](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8b030ed72d&e=a7ab36849c). Later on Friday night, I attended a meet and greet with several new and current [precinct committeemen](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=11b50e9657&e=a7ab36849c) in our legislative district.

On Saturday, we helped moved my almost 22-year-old son into an apartment closer to where he works. Time sure flies.

I hope you and yours have a blessed Easter. Thank you for your continued support!

Take care,
Shawnna

---
| P.S. _I really need your help defending this State Senate seat._ We cannot do it on our own and it is going to cost a lot of money to keep it.

clean_body: | | | | | Dear Freedom Fighters, On Monday, I signed onto a letter urging the Superintendent of Public Instruction (SPI) and the state’s to keep the current 2023-2024 ESA Parent . The State Board of Education (SBE) tried to pull a rogue move that would have not followed current state statutes. This new maneuver by the legislature encouraging the SPI and current SBE should help give parents of the ESA program the necessary time to submit additional public comment to further improve the current handbook. Also, I hosted a stakeholder meeting in the morning in the Senate with a few House members and advocates pertaining to . I sponsored this critical legislation to save children’s lives by putting an end to family in Arizona. The federal government and many states have already taken this important step to prohibit these camps from being used, so we’re hoping Arizona will be the next state to ban this horrific practice. Afterwards, I met with a young woman named Amanda who testified in the House in support of . This bill when passed would create a pathway to jobs for those with old criminal records and help them rebuild their lives, while keeping our communities safer and strengthening our economy. Later in the morning, I met with Jordan and Cassidy . Their son tragically died by suicide in 2022. Their son had been a victim of by fellow classmates at Chandler Unified Hamilton High School. His parents along with other Chandler Unified parents reported many incidents to the school. Sadly, the school administration ignored their continued pleas for help. Our own daughter experienced harassment, sexual assault, and bullying at her own public school when she was 12. Shortly after I was first elected in 2019, I sponsored that would have provided a lifeline to students who had been bullied on their school’s campus. Sadly, the didn’t receive a hearing because the chair of the House Committee on Education at the time didn’t support expanding school choice options to this vulnerable population. I have committed to working with both Amanda and the Harstads later this year on legislation impacting the formerly incarcerated as well as schools not addressing the incessant bullying taking place in our children’s schools. The governor signed –another bill I sponsored this session. SB 1364 improves outcomes, reduces recidivism within the criminal justice system by requiring a supervising probation department to courtesy transfer a probationer’s intensive probation supervision or supervised probation to the county in which the probationer is requesting to reside if the probationer can provide proof of: 1) family caregiver obligations; 2) employment or housing; or 3) an offer of employment of housing that will assist in the probationer’s positive behavioral change. On Tuesday, we held our weekly open caucus to discuss impending legislation. During the lunch hour, I walked over to (a.k.a. ATRA) and on my way back my shoe broke. We tried super glue, adhesive glue and finally, we duct taped it so I could go to the floor to vote because I wasn’t walking to the floor barefoot. Talk about being immobilized! Near the close of business, I submitted my form and nomination petition to continue serving as a Republican precinct committeeman, again. The House proudly passed out my , which proclaims the Legislature's support for the citizens and government of Texas, in their efforts to secure our nation's southern border. This resolution had zero support from Democrats in both the Senate and the House. The border invasion has not let up in Texas, nor in Arizona, and could get much worse in the coming days. When I speak with constituents at the door, illegal immigration is the top issue facing our district. Many parts of Arizona are being attacked by criminals crossing our border illegally and attempting to evade law enforcement. There are also massive numbers of so-called asylum seekers that are processed in Arizona then bussed out of our state. On March 31st, federal funding supporting the operations of this system will run out, prompting a massive release of migrants into our communities that don’t have the resources to handle them. Lives and livelihoods are at stake while Democrats continue to turn a blind eye to the border invasion. On Wednesday, we spent a lot of time voting out legislation. I had a packed lunch hour. I first met with the , the Director General of Taipei Economic and Cultural Office in Los Angeles. Then, I had the chance to chat with The Libre Institute and Americans for Prosperity- Arizona who were outside the Capitol serving warm tamales in support of this year’s “free the tamales” bill. I was even included in a TV being conducted at their booth. I also met with some wonderful businesses who were at the Capitol for the Capitol’s annual “Mining Day.” Later that day, the Senate President appointed me to the State Senate on the Department of Revenue’s (DOR) Tax System Modernization Project Advisory Committee that was created out of . If you have any input, please feel free to reply to this email. I look forward to working with businesses and individual taxpayers as DOR implements this new tax system. I was also afforded the chance to recognize the current class in the Senate gallery and meet with the class in the Senate President’s office. I am a graduate of the 2010 class. published an article about my I sponsored that was signed into law last week expanding Kayleigh’s Law. On Thursday, the House overwhelmingly passed which will create a pathway to jobs for those with old records and help them rebuild their lives, while keeping our communities safer and strengthening our economy. The next stop will be to the Governor’s office for her signature. The State Senate debated several dozens of bills on the floor of the Senate. In the afternoon, I walked over to the Secretary of State’s office and filed more than double the number of signatures required to qualify as a Republican candidate for Legislative District 2 for the July 30th primary ballot. I am running in a competitive primary race, so please let me know how you would like to help me win the primary, so I can go on to win our swing district’s competitive general. Mind you, the Democrat is running unopposed in its Democrat primary election. On Friday, I received a brief update from a fellow member participating with the Advisory Board on Education Reform. I also had an introductory phone call with Russ Skinner, the recently appointed Maricopa County Sheriff. I also participated in the DOR’s first Tax System Modernization Project Advisory Committee . I also received communications near the close of business the Governor had signed two more of my bills into law. The bills signed into law are Senate Bills and . Later on Friday night, I attended a meet and greet with several new and current in our legislative district. On Saturday, we helped moved my almost 22-year-old son into an apartment closer to where he works. Time sure flies. I hope you and yours have a blessed Easter. Thank you for your continued support! Take care, Shawnna | P.S. I really need your help defending this State Senate seat. We cannot do it on our own and it is going to cost a lot of money to keep it. | | "Donate" | P.S.S. Do you live in the 85022, 85023, 85024, 85027, 85029, 85032, 85050, 85053, 85085, 85308, 85310, or 85331 zip code? If so, there is a very good chance you can sign our online nomination petition today. Tomorrow, I will turn a supplemental packet of signatures into the Secretary of State. | | "Sign my Petition to Qualify for the GOP Ballot" | P.S.S.S. If you have some time, would you like to join our brigade? | "Volunteer " | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK. | | Peter,

As we approach the _first_ end-of-quarter deadline of the year, I have a crucial ask: [**We’re aiming to hit an ambitious goal of $200,000 by tonight's end-of-quarter public FEC filing deadline. Will you join us by splitting a donation between my campaign and the GA Dems?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82075020/464354123/1012406071?refcode=20240331.2_AK_3BE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZmNDVkMi05ZmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MhvnbbljHcpwr0rjRcsDeqeIAjwRWmMi1DlpDk_J7j4=)

Our campaign has been nothing short of extraordinary, and it's supporters like you who have made it all possible. Your commitment to real change and belief in our campaign’s vision for New Jersey has set us apart. Now, as we set our sights on the next few months of this race, we must be able to sustain and grow our momentum.

Here’s why your contribution matters today:
* **Momentum Matters** : Meeting our fundraising goal will not only secure the resources needed to keep running a strong campaign but will also send a clear message of momentum. It shows the people of New Jersey that the change we want to see in our politics is not only necessary but it’s possible.
* **Strength in Grassroots** : Our grassroots movement is the heart of this campaign. We're proving to the New Jersey political machine and everyone watching all across the country that a grassroots movement like this can't be silenced. Your support, whether big or small, is a testament to the strength of our grassroots movement.
* **Investing in New Jersey’s Future** : Your contribution directly fuels the change we want to see. I’m running to restore integrity and deliver for working people across New Jersey. By pitching in what you can, you’re supporting our outreach efforts, helping us connect with more voters, and building the foundation for a government that works for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected.

**Every day, our campaign is growing stronger and our momentum is undeniable.** But with the possibility that Bob Menendez could run as an Independent – causing a 3-way race that could boost Republicans’ chances of winning here – we need to be prepared for anything.

[**Your donation, no matter the amount, is a crucial investment in a better future for New Jersey and good governance as a whole. Help us hit our March end-of-quarter goal of $200,000 by splitting a donation between my campaign and the GA Dems today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82075021/464354124/1012406071?refcode=20240331.2_AK_3BE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2ZmNDVkMi05ZmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MhvnbbljHcpwr0rjRcsDeqeIAjwRWmMi1DlpDk_J7j4=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Friend, Our ceasefire movement is about all of us collectively raising our voices, demanding humanity for the 2.3 million Palestinians trapped in Gaza under relentless military bombardment and without food, water, and basic medical supplies. Our movement is about more than a ceasefire. It’s about ending apartheid and the blockade, and ensuring that all Palestinians have a future in their homeland. **Since October, our campaign has received donations from 30,000 new donors. These are people from all walks of life, from across Michigan and the country who want to stop the genocide.** **Now, at midnight tonight, we face one of the most important end-of-quarter fundraising deadlines of our campaign.** After today, we'll report to the Federal Election Commission on how much we’ve raised and spent, and how much cash on hand we have for the election ahead. Anti-Palestinian group AIPAC has pledged to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat me and my colleagues who are criticizing the Israeli government’s human rights abuses. **We must show AIPAC—and all of those who seek to maintain an unjust status quo of oppression and genocide—that we are strong and will not relent in our demands for a just peace now.** [**Rush a donation by midnight tonight to power our campaign and show the media and our opponents that we are ready to withstand attacks.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqub4d4PRgLjInf7rke4sDCZ4WeG69RyJc2N6cItNEPu4l2pXCwfbgvM0bHhRWKXyY9XxdTrxyRgj0CmO3FQyWMDB0yyhsuMZyaYoS0jUtHKzySZ6XFh9qFvnFTKZmQEvyUyw5dsyGQ9RUKYA9kkbUWCCV3caVEwX443nBj53TmwoQn_JIVbceQxd6lRh_enYbOiDsVuk65mIikEKN55qmmgmrAitOGuxVmD7f4-nLduwrpDQ8crZwy9Diz0mSuaDcu3kk__Ps9lijqGskM6_qjivxjimm-qt-o3KhjD5nglS9A6kEGxXenNG2Y-KzNXgT095xj-Kbajs9foJukD4kvRJtEMc9IdxsPiLm1Cpu9HQbsDvlzMMGureQ_3-Vd25D8/454/UjZA5_7WSSWi6Y6Vzjjf6w/h1/h001.pyV719Noz1Mz3jUMDwwTi2Nbi18NY_YC6SlMU8a-zPo) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $15 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqub4d4PRgLjInf7rke4sDCZ9QqN56-2fDR9hP91ol64mWK11SVlBgKsQF1TdKu40eifflhbYbCOHG2Kr4_G_pvT8lI-kyQ_WlPO2kW532PF7paHVfC30ldvKayGzgIP_RwdraQcuK4BkTEt6GP51EQpqIP2qmUZDL1sd7rMa52A2Z6v1XAc2sErWsjw2pZwDnN1U9mmu_9qrhznc_eApQE-gk-oDMYX8odkFTCExrOMKHJno4hcxF6KoEjduHRQ2RbCnt0flf9ewHnfKwyYf1nJuU03BJhH7Dg8jwYr0j8FRcZqQ40sMSSJhaU5fN9TZ759mFASu1iJZUCdBRp3o9-WcK49X55BFx-EPMkIz0OVlTqmTlLYoW_rMBWwWV1PQo2_cB4eXt-QqkirB2k1Nasr8jYaYOY7dSlIQz6vvZfMZQ/454/UjZA5_7WSSWi6Y6Vzjjf6w/h2/h001.Dciqfn3BupjvpdloQNgA1ycqT-KxImRf6p68HaRNUms)

Subject: Show the power of our anti-war movement to save lives
