Friend,
Rashida Tlaib doesn’t accept corporate contributions, relying instead on the support of thousands of grassroots supporters from across Michigan and the country.
**Over the last 5 months as our government has facilitated a genocide, 30,000 new supporters have donated to support Rashida’s voice in our movement to save lives with a permanent ceasefire and equal human rights for the Palestinian people.**
**As the only Palestinian American member of Congress, Rashida’s bold leadership is essential.** It helped pave the way for the 79 members of Congress to come out in support of a ceasefire, and more are starting to take stands against U.S. military aid to Israel.
But, many Congressmembers remain intimidated by threats from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC, which has pledged to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat Rashida and other pro-ceasefire candidates running for election or re-election this year. Just this week, AIPAC paid for members of Congress to fly to Israel and meet with the genocidal Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.
We must continue to grow our pro-ceasefire movement in the face of AIPAC’s $100 million campaign.
**Tonight at midnight we will close the books on a critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and we need to continue to show the power of our grassroots anti-war movement.**

AIPAC has already been running racist ads, attacking Rashida and misrepresenting her views.
Rashida believes in the humanity of all people. The cries of Palestinian and Israeli children sound no different to her. That’s why she is demanding an immediate, lasting ceasefire to save lives and ensure basic human rights for Palestinians who have been living under an apartheid system of government and an inhumane blockade. That’s how we build safety for all people, to treat all life as sacred.
Our movement for human rights is growing, as more people are outraged by our government’s complicity and want the horrors to stop. A majority of Americans (and 75% of Democrats) disapprove of Israeli military action in Gaza. clean_body: Since October, our campaign has received donations from 30,000 new donors. | | | Friend, Our ceasefire movement is about all of us collectively raising our voices, demanding humanity for the 2.3 million Palestinians trapped in Gaza under relentless military bombardment and without food, water, and basic medical supplies. Our movement is about more than a ceasefire. It’s about ending apartheid and the blockade, and ensuring that all Palestinians have a future in their homeland. Since October, our campaign has received donations from 30,000 new donors. These are people from all walks of life, from across Michigan and the country who want to stop the genocide. Now, at midnight tonight, we face one of the most important end-of-quarter fundraising deadlines of our campaign. After today, we'll report to the Federal Election Commission on how much we’ve raised and spent, and how much cash on hand we have for the election ahead. Anti-Palestinian group AIPAC has pledged to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat me and my colleagues who are criticizing the Israeli government’s human rights abuses. We must show AIPAC—and all of those who seek to maintain an unjust status quo of oppression and genocide—that we are strong and will not relent in our demands for a just peace now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for powering our grassroots movement for equity and transformative change. -Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Rashida Date: Sun, Mar 31, 2024 Subject: Show the power of our anti-war movement to save lives To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Rashida Tlaib doesn’t accept corporate contributions, relying instead on the support of thousands of grassroots supporters from across Michigan and the country. Over the last 5 months as our government has facilitated a genocide, 30,000 new supporters have donated to support Rashida’s voice in our movement to save lives with a permanent ceasefire and equal human rights for the Palestinian people. As the only Palestinian American member of Congress, Rashida’s bold leadership is essential. It helped pave the way for the 79 members of Congress to come out in support of a ceasefire, and more are starting to take stands against U.S. military aid to Israel. But, many Congressmembers remain intimidated by threats from anti-Palestinian group AIPAC, which has pledged to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat Rashida and other pro-ceasefire candidates running for election or re-election this year. Just this week, AIPAC paid for members of Congress to fly to Israel and meet with the genocidal Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. We must continue to grow our pro-ceasefire movement in the face of AIPAC’s $100 million campaign. Tonight at midnight we will close the books on a critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and we need to continue to show the power of our grassroots anti-war movement. AIPAC has already been running racist ads, attacking Rashida and misrepresenting her views. Rashida believes in the humanity of all people. The cries of Palestinian and Israeli children sound no different to her. That’s why she is demanding an immediate, lasting ceasefire to save lives and ensure basic human rights for Palestinians who have been living under an apartheid system of government and an inhumane blockade. That’s how we build safety for all people, to treat all life as sacred. Our movement for human rights is growing, as more people are outraged by our government’s complicity and want the horrors to stop. A majority of Americans (and 75% of Democrats) disapprove of Israeli military action in Gaza. These public opinion shifts matter, and they get the attention of leaders in our federal government with the power to change policy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for having Rashida’s back and for helping to grow our movement for life-affirming change. -Team Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . As the world marks the four-year anniversary of the Covid-19 lockdowns, most people look back on those scary times with trepidation and regret. **Peter, no one expected someone like me to be elected to Congress. But against all odds, I’m here – and it’s important you understand _how_ I got here.** This email is long, so if you don’t have a spare minute to read this all the way through, [**_please consider chipping in a few bucks before my End of Quarter fundraising deadline at midnight – so I can keep fighting for _all_ of us in Congress. >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/q2bTtq9hvScmrWoK7L09Tg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRn7FVmP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDMzMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZWZ5b2Rkc2VvcV9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yZVB5QzU2eU1zSm9tSVRQNWhFeGk4eXlydDUmcmVmY29kZTI9MmVQeUM1NnlNc0pvbUlUUDVoRXhpOHl5cnQ1JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJlUHlDNTZ5TXNKb21JVFA1aEV4aTh5eXJ0NVcDc3BjQgpmBGbQCWZ0FSPWUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) My biological mother was a victim of our broken system. She turned to drugs and crime while she was pregnant with me, and made the difficult decision to put me up for adoption at birth. I was raised in a working-class family. My mom was a public school teacher, and my dad was a working musician. They struggled through more broken systems – from underfunded schools, to outrageous healthcare costs, to juggling different jobs to pay the bills. Even when I grew up and ran for Congress, I was a Gen Z working class kid – I didn’t have the same advantages that other candidates have. I drove for Uber and racked up credit card debt just to make ends meet during my campaign. Because of that, everyone counted me out. **But I was able to defy the odds: by becoming a community leader, the National Organizing Director for March for our Lives, and the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress.** _Now, I need you to help me defy the odds once again to**stay** in Congress._ I’m determined to keep fighting for working-class folks, but I can’t do that without your grassroots support. [**_I’m still $6709 short of what I need to raise before my FIRST public filing deadline of 2024, and we only have 7 hours left. Please, if you can, donate a few bucks right now to keep me fighting in Congress for the most vulnerable among us us >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/q2bTtq9hvScmrWoK7L09Tg~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRn7FVmP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDMzMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZWZ5b2Rkc2VvcV9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yZVB5QzU2eU1zSm9tSVRQNWhFeGk4eXlydDUmcmVmY29kZTI9MmVQeUM1NnlNc0pvbUlUUDVoRXhpOHl5cnQ1JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJlUHlDNTZ5TXNKb21JVFA1aEV4aTh5eXJ0NVcDc3BjQgpmBGbQCWZ0FSPWUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | | | [Donate $10](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/VUTpDvaNO_K33x_7EhOq2w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRn7FVmP0TNaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDI0MDMzMV9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZWZ5b2Rkc2VvcV9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MTAmY2RtYz0yZVB5QzU2eU1zSm9tSVRQNWhFeGk4eXlydDUmcmVmY29kZTI9MmVQeUM1NnlNc0pvbUlUUDVoRXhpOHl5cnQ1JnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJlUHlDNTZ5TXNKb21JVFA1aEV4aTh5eXJ0NVcDc3BjQgpmBGbQCWZ0FSPWUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: It’s me and you versus Donald Trump and Steve Garvey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks, we’ve got _huge_ news:

The _Associated Press_ confirmed our matchup against celebrity Republican Steve Garvey in November, after his upset finish in the top two of California’s U.S. Senate race.

Nikki Haley officially dropped out of the Republican presidential race — clearing the path for Donald Trump to make his third run at the White House.

**We’re fighting for the Senate majority, the presidency, and our democracy, and I need your support _today._**

[I’m humbly asking, team — rush an urgent $10 donation split between Voter Protection Project and our campaign before midnight to become a General Election Founding Donor to our campaign to help me fight back against Trump, Garvey, and the MAGA extremists trying to take away our rights and freedoms.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65195?t=6&akid=13621%2E878179%2EWH5a7A) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65196?t=7&akid=13621%2E878179%2EWH5a7A)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65197?t=8&akid=13621%2E878179%2EWH5a7A)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65198?t=9&akid=13621%2E878179%2EWH5a7A)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65199?t=10&akid=13621%2E878179%2EWH5a7A)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65200?t=11&akid=13621%2E878179%2EWH5a7A)
This fight is so much bigger than any individual candidate or campaign.

It’s about whether we will allow our country to backslide into the authoritarianism of Donald Trump or fight back and defend the Constitution and our democracy.

No one can stay on the sidelines in this fight. I need you today.

[Split $10 or any amount between Voter Protection Project and our campaign to join the fight before our midnight end of quarter deadline.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/65195?t=12&akid=13621%2E878179%2EWH5a7A)

Thank you,

Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=13621%2E878179%2EWH5a7A). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=13621%2E878179%2EWH5a7A).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=13621%2E878179%2EWH5a7A) to request fewer emails. name: Rick
subject: before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen
body:
| I wanted to send you one final message ahead of tonight’s deadline.

After today, we’ll have to report everything we’ve raised to the FEC, and those numbers will be made public. And you can bet that our primary opponents, along with Scott Perry and his MAGA extremist backers, will be watching to see exactly what they’re up against.

That’s why it’s so critical that we have a strong showing. Can you rush in a donation before midnight?

### The San Francisco Chronicle's recent display of public ignorance offers a compelling example of how news media support corruption, rather than transparency or accountability
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/redirect/0c2a3a2f-cf76-41ab-8ea2-bbb5187fa09e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=143133706&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQzMTMzNzA2LCJpYXQiOjE3MTE5MjAzMTYsImV4cCI6MTcxNDUxMjMxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Mi5Zpgg5CTsxUO7qgpgltJ9cm0WAzPW1YXy6j8IJe0s)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/editors-or-propagandists?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Last month, the San Francisco Chronicle published a [fawning endorsement](https://substack.com/redirect/79c95400-1ad5-4506-964e-ece596ab7e0f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of House Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi.
Last week, Australian publisher Julian Assange won [at least a reprieve](https://substack.com/redirect/18e234a3-ef50-4f29-b906-0ca1b9cfbb1d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in his legal appeal in London over whether or not he will be extradited to the U.S. despite the [concerns](https://substack.com/redirect/af81102a-322a-485f-aa9b-9966c44db027?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of British judges that the American justice system fails to respect human rights.
Each of these events are important to observe, even in isolation. Together, they indicate everything that is wrong with news media in the United States.
_Journalists in the United States ...can't recognize failures of public transparency even when staring them in the face._
### **Journalism as propaganda: transparency and accountability**
_The San Francisco Chronicle_ 's endorsement of Pelosi was written, edited, and published by the newspaper's editorial board. It is striking for several reasons, starting with the fact that _the Chronicle_ published it at all.
As far as I know, this is the first time that the _Chronicle_ has published an endorsement of San Francisco's representative in Congress after actually interviewing her challengers. Even so, the change might reinforce the bias apparent in its previous outright exclusions: because Pelosi has four challengers among Republicans, and at least three among Democrats, naming them all, if anything, effectively diminished the challenge any one of them might conceivably present.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/31c8f669-5013-44d4-9c5e-07e046af48d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the past, the _Chronicle_ has generally declined to even name Pelosi's challengers when publishing its endorsements. In fact, the _Chronicle_ has long taken pains to avoid mentioning Pelosi's opponents at all, except when either [smearing](https://substack.com/redirect/f3a68475-ee47-4e42-8def-1a46a00c8259?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) us, or once reflecting on mounting [calls for Pelosi to finally debate](https://substack.com/redirect/f171213e-fbab-4571-b499-ad48a3c132d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) an opponent, which she has never done since first going to Washington 1987.
The mere fact that Pelosi has ducked debates for 37 years should be enough, in itself, for editors to display some modicum of independence and call for a replacement. Journalists in the United States, however, can't recognize failures of public transparency even when staring them in the face.
The trial of Julian Assange offers an even more compelling example of that pattern, to which we will return in a moment.
_Help inform your friends!_
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=143133706&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQzMTMzNzA2LCJpYXQiOjE3MTE5MjAzMTYsImV4cCI6MTcxNDUxMjMxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Mi5Zpgg5CTsxUO7qgpgltJ9cm0WAzPW1YXy6j8IJe0s)
Beyond giving Pelosi a free pass for evading informed public scrutiny for over 30 years, the _Chronicle_ 's endorsement also covered up her record in public office, both as it relates to policy and ethics.
### **Journalism as propaganda: corruption**
Nowhere in its endorsement does the _Chronicle_ note that Pelosi has grown fantastically rich in office by engaging in insider trading practices that would be illegal if Congress allowed itself to be governed by the same laws that constrain other people wielding access to information not available to the public.
Yet neither this [widely documented](https://substack.com/redirect/974f5ed2-9eb4-4b8f-8bd3-646710562e03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) corruption--nor the conflicts of interest it introduces across every policy arena, from energy and transportation to foreign policy and militarism--appear among the concerns of the _Chronicle_ 's oblivious editors.
Pelosi's conflicts of interest have not merely been circumstantial. While profiting handsomely from her political career, she also played a critical role in engineering the continuing upward transfer of wealth that has left millions of Americans around the country in desperate straits.
### **Journalism as propaganda: healthcare**
Pelosi's most enduring legacy might be [suppressing](https://substack.com/redirect/cc6296fe-df65-4ba2-a768-45e8e10198a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) calls--and even mere debates and public votes--for universal healthcare. Yet, despite the mounting millions of medical debt [choking working families](https://substack.com/redirect/c51f9118-ffc6-4746-8214-ebae2c9109f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) across the United States, the _Chronicle_ could not be bothered to observe the observable impacts of Pelosi's policy decisions as a legislator and congressional leader.
(To be fair, neither could [activists](https://substack.com/redirect/a0fac7ad-1a4f-427e-8fd4-f43e1b7d556c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) who dedicated their lives--and [deaths](https://substack.com/redirect/e255eb81-db98-44cc-b047-b518b8e31f66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--to goals that Pelosi unapologetically impeded only to [ironically](https://substack.com/redirect/e3320779-55c1-4ec6-bdfd-1eced4b06a3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) support her, but that's a reflection of their own confusion and the limits of their influence, more than the co-optation of journalism)
### **Journalism as propaganda: authoritarianism**
Pelosi's most devastating legacy, which frankly no one in professional journalism has displayed the independence to observe, is [bipartisan](https://substack.com/redirect/d895f6ef-0633-48da-aba5-8fc61e17567a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) support for authoritarianism in the United States. Journalists tend to ignore the pattern entirely, and few have demonstrated the insight to pin the tail on the donkey responsible.
Pelosi was no mere member of Congress over the last generation. Before becoming a Speaker of the House for two different periods, she chaired the House Intelligence Committee. That makes her far more responsible than most policymakers for the emergence of mass surveillance, the insulation of torturers from accountability, and the [pattern of belligerent war for profit](https://substack.com/redirect/2fafbe31-e29a-4ed9-a1ad-67b23c2b7b5e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to which Washington is committed across each of the corporate political parties.
As Speaker of the House, Pelosi also made decisions that undermined human rights both in the United States and around the world. Most significantly, she [authorized--and funded--the creation of mass detention camps](https://substack.com/redirect/b449e971-bb23-4b34-ae0a-0c3f86ca9fb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at our nation's borders. She critically enabled the immigration policy of former President Donald Trump, without insisting at any point on basic protections for human rights.
Just this year, Pelosi also mounted [direct attacks on the right to dissent](https://substack.com/redirect/f8fe800e-e6c8-4c90-becd-c561677fbf10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by smearing her constituents who support international human rights.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/642f9112-a49d-4ffc-a432-725be4c5ec6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Most recently, Pelosi played a critical role in determining the results of California's Senate primary, in which [a committed warmonger from Los Angeles beat out progressive women](https://substack.com/redirect/c290f6fe-b4e1-4606-b63b-482b03b0ce88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from both Southern and Northern California. Most voters, however, had no idea about Pelosi's machinations favoring Adam Schiff until [reports published only after the election](https://substack.com/redirect/41884c10-fd7a-42de-b923-2262a244e216?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
_This newsletter is supported by readers, instead of advertisers. To receive new posts, sign up for a**free subscription**! To support my work exposing bipartisan corruption, consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..NBSIAwBPRDsFfWwFVud63roCJ_PE8psq3T5mfZoYHW0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=143133706)
### **Journalism as propaganda: fascism**
Stepping back from discrete issues, Pelosi's broadest legacy is the [co-optation of the Democratic Party by Wall Street](https://substack.com/redirect/d895f6ef-0633-48da-aba5-8fc61e17567a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). She has not only played a key role in effectuating that process as a congressional leader, but also profited from it as a prolific investor.
Yet, despite the internal debates gripping the Democratic Party around the country, the widespread disillusion with a corporate center that has proved repeatedly incapable of responding to social crises from pandemics to preventable climate catastrophes, and the disturbing prospect of fascism in America being not only a fact of life but also a bold declaration from the next president, the _Chronicle_ could not be bothered to observe Pelosi's longstanding [support for corporate interests and derogation of populist concerns](https://substack.com/redirect/cc6296fe-df65-4ba2-a768-45e8e10198a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about human rights.
The relationship between corporate influence and fascism is one that most Americans tend to overlook. They reduce fascism to its most heinous aspects, failing to recognize its [established foundations in our own country](https://substack.com/redirect/d895f6ef-0633-48da-aba5-8fc61e17567a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The fusion of power between government and unaccountable private industry is a defining aspect of fascism that has played a critical role in encouraging human rights violations everywhere it has emerged--including here, in the United States.
Pelosi has not only embraced fascism by supporting business interests over human rights. In the weeks before the _Chronicle_ published its endorsement, Pelosi publicly [invited](https://substack.com/redirect/0615fadc-e305-4d03-96c2-07f374912f9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) FBI investigations of U.S. citizens who support a ceasefire in Gaza, smearing us as agents of foreign powers because we support human rights. The _Chronicle_ editors did observe Pelosi's call for investigations into thought crimes, and even noted that she "doubled down" on her authoritarian stance during their interview--while absurdly dismissing the issue by tepidly noting that her arguments merely "felt questionable."
### **Journalism as propaganda: institutional self-defense**
One particular bone I'd pick with the _Chronicle_ 's editorial is its description of one of Pelosi's challengers, who in 2020 issued [a public death threat](https://substack.com/redirect/21dc1437-dc79-45b9-a01a-e555082726dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the _Chronicle_ declined to observe either then or now. Of course, the _Chronicle_ also failed to mention that it currently faces [a federal appeal challenging its attack on election integrity by publishing racist disinformation](https://substack.com/redirect/c3dafcdb-10b2-42e2-9ec9-69bf813c727d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) orchestrated to silence me when I emerged as the only viable challenger who Pelosi has ever faced in her career.
Perhaps it should be no surprise that journalists actively employ their publications to cover up their own violations of public trust and failures of press ethics.
But to return to an earlier point--even setting aside policy, preferences and political legacies--Pelosi should be rejected by any editorial board with any political independence, if only because she refuses to debate opponents.
Because editors lack the critical lens to effectively interrogate her record, they effectively serve as rubes laundering her public reputation, suppressing the reality of her record to instead construct a cult of personality entirely divorced from the facts.
That might seem objectionable enough. For better or worse, the pattern infects the American press broadly, well beyond the _San Francisco Chronicle_.
### **Real journalists face prosecution**
While writers and editors across the United States dutifully published misinformation serving the Pentagon over the past 75 years, a few voices have stood out as critics of American imperialism. One of them was [Daniel Ellsberg](https://substack.com/redirect/527984fe-5803-4acc-b1b6-e7178da6c1ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). His death last year was [a loss for the world](https://substack.com/redirect/0580262c-4940-458b-b99e-7cfd02966688?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Another is an Australian publisher who revealed to the world a video proving that the US military had assassinated multiple Reuters journalists in Iraq, and then lied about it to evade responsibility. The ["collateral murder" video](https://substack.com/redirect/574ed394-aaab-4fd0-bcec-388ca6daed76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) should disturb anyone, particularly journalists who are themselves implicated in what is at least an incident, and perhaps a [disturbing pattern](https://substack.com/redirect/baf42ea2-55d9-4c3c-87f4-878e3411052a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), revealing violent attacks on the press by unaccountable military actors.
Yet most editors in the United States could not be bothered to observe even attacks on their own rights and independence.
To their credit, many joined [a joint letter](https://substack.com/redirect/874571c3-c604-42c4-9abf-4dbdd35f0fd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) warning that Assange's indictment "sets a dangerous precedent" that could chill reporting about national security issues.
Yet editors across American news media continue to defer to official sources when ignoring critical stories, while also inflating others at the behest of the same official sources. And rather than reflect in their editorials on areas where their stated concerns are implicated--like when opining on the re-election campaigns of oligarchs on whom the bipartisan military industrial complex has historically relied--they parrot thoughtless endorsements instead.
### **" Journalism" degrading democracy**
Effective democracy relies on public transparency and accountability. Despite the theoretical role of the press in ensuring both values, however, editors have dramatically failed their constitutional mission. In the face of escalating crises screaming out for public accountability, they have instead become levers enabling mounting social control.
When news editors reflect on the continuing [collapse of democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/3a5d1dac-2c07-469f-8990-0025a9fdd69e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in America, one hopes they might eventually muster the insight and independence to recognize the crucial role they have played. By promoting public ignorance and constructing cults of personality, they have ultimately enabled [bipartisan corruption](https://substack.com/redirect/54c7dbd1-2350-45c1-8eba-ef69f1b452af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and abandoned democracy themselves.
_Paid subscribers can access a first-hand account from an Arab-American journalist about the bias he encountered while working at a major U.S. newspaper. What he reflects on offers another example of the disturbing pattern enabling bipartisan militarism in Washington..._

Journalism as propaganda: transparency and accountability The San Francisco Chronicle 's endorsement of Pelosi was written, edited, and published by the newspaper's editorial board. It is striking for several reasons, starting with the fact that the Chronicle published it at all. As far as I know, this is the first time that the Chronicle has published an endorsement of San Francisco's representative in Congress after actually interviewing her challengers. Even so, the change might reinforce the bias apparent in its previous outright exclusions: because Pelosi has four challengers among Republicans, and at least three among Democrats, naming them all, if anything, effectively diminished the challenge any one of them might conceivably present. | | ---|---|--- In the past, the Chronicle has generally declined to even name Pelosi's challengers when publishing its endorsements. In fact, the Chronicle has long taken pains to avoid mentioning Pelosi's opponents at all, except when either us, or once reflecting on mounting an opponent, which she has never done since first going to Washington 1987. The mere fact that Pelosi has ducked debates for 37 years should be enough, in itself, for editors to display some modicum of independence and call for a replacement. Journalists in the United States, however, can't recognize failures of public transparency even when staring them in the face. Beyond giving Pelosi a free pass for evading informed public scrutiny for over 30 years, the Chronicle 's endorsement also covered up her record in public office, both as it relates to policy and ethics. body:
With our first 2024 FEC fundraising deadline only a few hours away, I'm asking for your support.

| Peter,

If you are celebrating Easter today, I hope you have a meaningful holiday. If not, wishing you a wonderful Sunday.

At Team Laura, we have great news to share along with our Easter tidings. Just a few days ago, our race was named one of the DCCC’s Red to Blue campaigns, which means our district remains one of the most winnable in the country. With our first 2024 FEC fundraising deadline only a few hours away, I'm asking for your support. Will you contribute before midnight tonight to help us hit our first 2024 FEC fundraising goal? You can use this secure link to give: [_**lauragillen.com/give**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82077044/464358718/106679703?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2024-03-31_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzZlZWY4YS1hNWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n0KynIBWc579yROe-B-7rFqOLd2aXfT1-rwsTKNWuww=)

Our fundraising numbers will go public – all eyes will be on our campaign as we are the #1 most flippable seat. The Republican majority is razor-thin, and they’re pouring in millions of dollars to protect Anthony D’Esposito. Your investment is crucial now more than ever to fight back.

So, Peter, will you help us reach our $30,000 FEC fundraising goal and contribute to my campaign before midnight tonight? Here’s your secure link to give: [_**lauragillen.com/give.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82077045/464358719/106679703?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2024-03-31_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzZlZWY4YS1hNWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n0KynIBWc579yROe-B-7rFqOLd2aXfT1-rwsTKNWuww=)

Grateful,

Laura

name: Colin Allred
subject: Did you know I'm TIED with Ted Cruz?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82077305/464359210/2138563350?amount=10&refcode=UD_20240331_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNjRiZGQyLWE1ZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FDUbCg-KxiWC15hspWD4_doIcm5-M0GnN27XlZD6pSw=) **I'm wondering if there's anything I can possibly say to convince you to chip in $5.**

What if I told you that Ted Cruz won by just **2.6%** in 2018?

What if I told you that CNN is calling him the most vulnerable GOP senator on the ballot this year?

And what if I told you that after _months_ of trailing, a brand-new poll shows us **TIED?** [Would you give just $5 to me and UNITEDemocrats to reach our $750,000 end-of-quarter goal to help ensure I have the resources I need to take the lead?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82077307/464359211/2138563350?amount=10&refcode=UD_20240331_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNjRiZGQyLWE1ZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FDUbCg-KxiWC15hspWD4_doIcm5-M0GnN27XlZD6pSw=) | [DONATE →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/82077308/464359212/2138563350?amount=10&refcode=UD_20240331_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNjNjRiZGQyLWE1ZWYtZWUxMS1hYWYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzc5NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FDUbCg-KxiWC15hspWD4_doIcm5-M0GnN27XlZD6pSw=)
---
**I know $5 might not seem like much, but that's what this grassroots campaign is made of: $5 and $10 donations from folks like you who are sick and tired of Ted Cruz's culture wars and extremism.**

That's what has helped us pull even in the polls. **And now, I'm the official Democratic nominee to take on Ted Cruz** – and we need to keep up our momentum if we're going to reach millions of voters across the state, fire Ted Cruz, and finally give Texans the Senator we deserve.

[So please, Peter, rush $5 – or any amount you can spare – ahead of my March 31st end-of-quarter deadline. And now, I'm the official Democratic nominee to take on Ted Cruz – and we need to keep up our momentum if we're going to reach millions of voters across the state, fire Ted Cruz, and finally give Texans the Senator we deserve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: = = = It means so much to have you on my team. clean_body: President Obama is right. | | | | | ---|--- Democrats may have won big in 2023, but this fight is far from over – especially in our statehouses. State Democrats have no time off when it comes to elections – which is why Obama is sounding the alarm on the importance of our level of the ballot: Your state legislators have a major impact on policies that affect day-to-day life. And with a divided Congress, state legislatures are where progress can happen on protecting abortion access, our climate, and voting rights. But the fight for 2024 has already begun – and we have nearly a dozen special elections over the next few months and our first end-of-quarter deadline is tonight at midnight. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by DLCC PAC. | JAMISON CARRIER TO APPEAR ON FOX & FRIENDS TOMORROW MORNING
---
| Greenwood, IN \- Jamison Carrier, a businessman from Greenwood who is running for Congress to replace retiring Rep. Greg Pence in Indiana's 6th Congressional District, will be live on Fox & Friends on Fox News channel tomorrow morning.
WHAT: FOX & FRIENDS ON FOX NEWS TIME: 7:30AM EST
Carrier's campaign was featured on FoxNews.com this weekend. The article titled, ["Indiana dad who lost youngest son to fentanyl runs for Congress to end tragedies of border crisis" ](https://fwpz5zgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014gUzvb6-RcPdkBiPhgFWjRQskLtCeK0zW7XwRWORZjO53JyWTyu_1vVO-VOp3Z4FFFKQ_aZyeePAPvvH5o4--95yTlFkjybUEw-ZvIa3shqY1u4zjAXofXiJVaz1s2MNV7KxB6hX0txgDZtd8b-CiBTyhCZrEQET_T153aWDwJcQC0n4z4VN3eYqNS50dOv5YLpVimNCqJhQGK55mtz7cE94IMd0vTBc3tyOaJiAXx3S-qFDdDWt3cOOwwazXri2k5G-LIZzWyw=&c=mvCybhx1Jd-1TrLktT3sOycP5jLAjtjsJS2y27CFUC3ChqMb9_HmvQ==&ch=92_0QJkyQQc9_HFi5NxA_BtV_4x7ACOqslQ6pYWtmbyY8OnYgsy0xQ==)[can be read here](https://fwpz5zgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014gUzvb6-RcPdkBiPhgFWjRQskLtCeK0zW7XwRWORZjO53JyWTyu_1vVO-VOp3Z4FFFKQ_aZyeePAPvvH5o4--95yTlFkjybUEw-ZvIa3shqY1u4zjAXofXiJVaz1s2MNV7KxB6hX0txgDZtd8b-CiBTyhCZrEQET_T153aWDwJcQC0n4z4VN3eYqNS50dOv5YLpVimNCqJhQGK55mtz7cE94IMd0vTBc3tyOaJiAXx3S-qFDdDWt3cOOwwazXri2k5G-LIZzWyw=&c=mvCybhx1Jd-1TrLktT3sOycP5jLAjtjsJS2y27CFUC3ChqMb9_HmvQ==&ch=92_0QJkyQQc9_HFi5NxA_BtV_4x7ACOqslQ6pYWtmbyY8OnYgsy0xQ==).

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Today is Trans Day of Visibility
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
There is no trans person in Congress, but we can change that. |
---

Team, Today is Trans Day of Visibility, a moment to celebrate the growing representation of transgender people in business, the arts, and politics. We’ve come a long way since I was a kid. Growing up, I never imagined that I would one day serve in my state’s legislature as my authentic self. Trans people are increasingly present in state legislatures and city councils across the country. **But despite how far we’ve come, there remains no out transgender person in Congress.** At a time when trans people are facing unprecedented attacks from far-right extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene, there is no transgender person in the U.S. House to stand up to them. This campaign can change that. **YOU** can change that. There has never been a more important day to act because this is not only Trans Day of Visibility, **[it is also our critical End-of-Quarter fundraising deadline when we have to announce our first fundraising totals of the year publicly.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82078097/464360188/485118760?refcode=em20240331-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGQ0NDYzNC1hOGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3x3IjpQGdhq2JHvPb4sHqYKlOEMEyDWEqosmoSzc5k=)** | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82078098/464360192/1531971222?refcode=em20240331-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGQ0NDYzNC1hOGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3x3IjpQGdhq2JHvPb4sHqYKlOEMEyDWEqosmoSzc5k=)
---
Listen, we have a real shot at winning this race and finally shattering this national lavender glass ceiling. We’re leading in the polls, but we know that right wing donors are lining up to try to defeat this campaign. They don’t want a trans person in Congress, let alone someone with a proven record of getting things done. This deadline is our opportunity to show that Republican donors won’t stop us.
**[Please consider making a donation of any amount to help us finally elect an out trans person to Congress and to take trans visibility to the next level... precisely when we need it most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82078100/464360193/485118760?refcode=em20240331-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjI0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGQ0NDYzNC1hOGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h3x3IjpQGdhq2JHvPb4sHqYKlOEMEyDWEqosmoSzc5k=)**
Together, we can show LGBTQ young people that our democracy is big enough for all of us.
Thank you for all you do for equality and opportunity for all,
Sarah McBride

| Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. body:
I’m so excited to be a part of this team.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82078519/464360546/327344370?refcode=20240331&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWExYzFlOC1hOGVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=18Cb5oHjSkWgGGG-FnsG9A1EWFvK6vVR1DxuskLsWO4=)

|
---
| | Hi, friends! I hope you’re enjoying the beautiful weather this Easter, and that if you celebrate, you are able to do so with your loved ones! I’m Ian Curtis, Tobias Read’s Deputy Campaign Manager (and I apologize for bothering you on Easter, but the campaign never stops!). I grew up here in Oregon, and like Treasurer Read, I’m also a Willamette University graduate. I’m proud to be a part of the team that’s going to help restore trust and accountability to the Secretary of State’s office. On the campaign trail, you can find me working hard to help us win, **and a big part of my role is helping our campaign stay on track by reaching its fundraising goals!**
Our first quarterly fundraising deadline ends at midnight tonight, and we need your help in order to meet it. clean_body: I’m so excited to be a part of this team.| | | = | | | Hi, friends! I hope you’re enjoying the beautiful weather this Easter, and that if you celebrate, you are able to do so with your loved ones! I’m Ian Curtis, Tobias Read’s Deputy Campaign Manager (and I apologize for bothering you on Easter, but the campaign never stops!). I grew up here in Oregon, and like Treasurer Read, I’m also a Willamette University graduate. I’m proud to be a part of the team that’s going to help restore trust and accountability to the Secretary of State’s office. On the campaign trail, you can find me working hard to help us win, and a big part of my role is helping our campaign stay on track by reaching its fundraising goals! subject: the home stretch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
There are a lot of campaigns out there who, with a few hours to go and thousands of dollars left to raise, would pick up the phone to some wealthy mega-donor or industry lobbyist, ask them to cut a check, and call it a night.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1054%2E791427%2EITD0Dz)

We're in the home stretch, folks.
With just hours to go until tonight's midnight deadline, here's the truth:
* Our opponents — the right-wing super PACs, the billionaires who fund them, and the hand-picked challenger they're supporting — are watching our campaign closely.
* We're hoping to raise as many _individual contributions_ as possible to show them that our movement has the grassroots strength that it takes to defeat them.
* In order to do that, we need today to be our biggest fundraising day of the year so far. And if Ilhan can count on you to chip in now, it will be.

**[Can you add $3 or truly any amount you can before our midnight FEC deadline? This is a big one.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-mar24.3mFzHz&refcode=em240331-2-t1t2&t=2&akid=1054%2E791427%2EITD0Dz)

**Derek, there's truly no finish line in our race for progress.** There's always a new opportunity to fight for your family's needs and a chance to make life just a _little_ better for everyone in PA-06.
That's why it's very easy to forget what incredible progress we've made together. We've secured critical investments in our community's infrastructure and economy. We've forged bold bipartisan partnerships to pass common sense legislation, and we've safeguarded the rights of our veterans and LGBTQ neighbors.
But of course, you didn't elect me to reminisce! You chose me to get things done – and that's why I'm fighting right now for:
✅ **Paid family leave** – so you don't have to choose between taking care of loved ones and paying your bills.
✅ **Tackling the border crisis** to pass legislation which centers compassion, fairness, and our national security.
✅ **Resisting the GOP's attempts to roll back the clock** – like their attacks on our reproductive rights.
✅**Getting President Biden re-elected** to continue this unprecedented era of progress, economic security, and bold solutions to the most pressing issues.
✅ And so, _so_ much more...
I'll do whatever it takes to get this work done – but here's the problem: **My end-of-quarter fundraising deadline (the last before the primary) is tonight at midnight, and I'm still falling short of my critical $10,000 goal. **
**With the GOP targeting my seat, I'm counting on every supporter to step up and chip in so that I can have the resources to fight back, win, and get to work on the issues that matter to you. **
**[So, I'm personally asking: Will you rush $5 or whatever you're able so that I can hit my urgent $10,000 end-of-quarter goal? With the progress of PA-06 and our democracy itself on the line, we can't afford to leave anything to chance.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82079408/464361815/685235109?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk971-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWQ3NjgwNi1hYWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1wFgHj_jmv6SdmlU9NoXWda8yX6F8A3X9Y_dndbt8Gw=)**

clean_body: Can you chip in so I can hit my goal, win in November, and get back to work? | | | = In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation so I can hit my critical $10,000 end-of-quarter goal before midnight. = | | = Derek, there's truly no finish line in our race for progress. There's always a new opportunity to fight for your family's needs and a chance to make life just a little better for everyone in PA-06. That's why it's very easy to forget what incredible progress we've made together. We've secured critical investments in our community's infrastructure and economy. We've forged bold bipartisan partnerships to pass common sense legislation, and we've safeguarded the rights of our veterans and LGBTQ neighbors. But of course, you didn't elect me to reminisce! You chose me to get things done – and that's why I'm fighting right now for: ✅ Paid family leave – so you don't have to choose between taking care of loved ones and paying your bills. ✅ Tackling the border crisis to pass legislation which centers compassion, fairness, and our national security. ✅ Resisting the GOP's attempts to roll back the clock – like their attacks on our reproductive rights. ✅Getting President Biden re-elected to continue this unprecedented era of progress, economic security, and bold solutions to the most pressing issues. ✅ And so, so much more... I'll do whatever it takes to get this work done – but here's the problem: My end-of-quarter fundraising deadline (the last before the primary) is tonight at midnight, and I'm still falling short of my critical $10,000 goal. With the GOP targeting my seat, I'm counting on every supporter to step up and chip in so that I can have the resources to fight back, win, and get to work on the issues that matter to you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much. There's work to be done, – Chrissy | Chrissy Houlahan for Congress P.O. name: Janelle Stelson
subject: We can’t let that happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson
body:
Let me tell you a story about why I decided to run for Congress.

| | Let me tell you a story about why I decided to run for Congress. For the past 38 years, I was a TV news anchor, telling the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I reported on the brokenness of our healthcare system and told the stories of families who couldn’t afford their utility bills. I spent 38 years putting a spotlight on injustice every chance I got. Then I saw something that horrified me. **On January 6th, 2021 and the days following, I saw our Congressman Scott Perry inciting unrest, spreading conspiracy theories, and plotting to overturn our votes.** I’m running for Congress because we deserve better. But right now, I am up against the most important deadline of this campaign so far— **the first FEC deadline of 2024.** I set out to raise $25,000 before tonight at midnight but I’m still behind. Will you donate right now with this special link my team has customized just for you? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/js-eoq-mar24?dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82079449/464361960/177767364?dpwillis67@gmail.com&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_033124_3_11_EOQ_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE5NjM1MmEtYWFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X3N7EYaPi8hM523vGXOOJDLbBnpSviuTYX_SKV6Q-n8=)** It is critical that I meet that goal. Why? Because after midnight on Sunday, dark money groups and big-shot Republican donors will be able to see how much I raised and **if I look vulnerable, they are going to pour even more money into Scott Perry’s campaign.** We cannot let that happen. With only hours left until my deadline, will you make a donation now? Any amount counts: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/js-eoq-mar24?dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82079454/464361963/177767364?dpwillis67@gmail.com&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_033124_3_11_EOQ_RE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE5NjM1MmEtYWFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X3N7EYaPi8hM523vGXOOJDLbBnpSviuTYX_SKV6Q-n8=)** We have a real shot at flipping not just PA-10 but flipping the House blue, but I cannot do it without your help. I’m counting on you. —Janelle
---

name: Tamie Wilson
subject: Before it’s too late–
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTczNTkxNTQ3NzU5ODM5MjIsXCJyXCI6MTE3MzU5MjQ1MTQ4NTU1MTMyfSIsInMiOiI4NTZlYmY2MTZjZjJjM2ZjIn0)

---
|
---
Friend,

I know it’s getting late, but I wanted to take a quick moment to tell you how much I appreciate having you with me.

This race is one of the most important contests in the entire country, and I am SO thankful for people like you and so many others across the country that are investing their time, energy, and financial support to get me to Congress and to defeat Jim Jordan.

We’ve seen it in elections across the country and in deep red districts: **pro choice voters, women, young people, retirees worried about Social Security, and many many others have sent the strongest possible signal that they are fed up with right-wing extremists like Jim Jordan.** His time is up, and now we just need to step all the way down on the gas and keep working hard.

My team has told me that we are only about $175 away from meeting our EOQ goal.**If you can make a last-minute donation of any amount, or if you want to contribute enough to meet our goal and put us over the top, please do so at the following secure ActBlue link** : [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tamie-wilson-forUS](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTczNTkxNTQ3ODk2MTU0MjAsXCJyXCI6MTE3MzU5MjQ1MTQ4NTU1MTMyfSIsInMiOiJjYmI5NTQzNjU3N2YzOWU1In0)

Thank you for everything that you do! WE WILL WIN THIS, TOGETHER!

Sincerely,

_-Tamie_
[](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTczNTkxNTQ3OTkwNTI2MDksXCJyXCI6MTE3MzU5MjQ1MTQ4NTU1MTMyfSIsInMiOiIyMGVhNGRkN2M2ODBhZTg2In0)
|

| |

| | | [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMTczNTkxNTQ4MDYzOTI2NDUsXCJyXCI6MTE3MzU5MjQ1MTQ4NTU1MTMyfSIsInMiOiJmNDQ0MzMzYzE0MzY0MmRjIn0)

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, I know it’s getting late, but I wanted to take a quick moment to tell you how much I appreciate having you with me. This race is one of the most important contests in the entire country, and I am SO thankful for people like you and so many others across the country that are investing their time, energy, and financial support to get me to Congress and to defeat Jim Jordan. We’ve seen it in elections across the country and in deep red districts: pro choice voters, women, young people, retirees worried about Social Security, and many many others have sent the strongest possible signal that they are fed up with right-wing extremists like Jim Jordan. His time is up, and now we just need to step all the way down on the gas and keep working hard. My team has told me that we are only about $175 away from meeting our EOQ goal.If you can make a last-minute donation of any amount, or if you want to contribute enough to meet our goal and put us over the top, please do so at the following secure ActBlue link : Thank you for everything that you do! WE WILL WIN THIS, TOGETHER! Sincerely, -Tamie | | | | | | | Tamie Wilson Democratic Nominee Ohio's 4th Congressional District | | | | | | | | Mail checks to: Tamie Wilson for US 273 Saratoga St, Delaware, Ohio, 43015 | | |

body:
Hi there,

I won’t waste your time. I’m reaching out with 9 hours until our first end-of-quarter deadline of the election year. Will you rush a final $3 donation?

Please click here to donate then read on about why this matters: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw-q1-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82079837/464362706/-401216107?refcode=em-3.31.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWVkZGI0NzEtYWFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0GywkDyQ8QGNN28ijNobVd1BXeqM1ZrrsOtU89yQ6WM=)

What makes this deadline different? We’re required by the FEC to make the last three months of our fundraising public – that means everyone from our supporters to David Schweikert and the national GOP will see how we performed.

We need a strong showing to prove that we’re the campaign that will flip this toss-up race for control of the House majority.

National Republicans are already running scared and attacking me because they know Schweikert is weak and that we have what it takes to beat him.

But if we fall short of our end-of-quarter goal, we’ll lose our momentum when it matters most. I refuse to let that happen – because there’s too much at stake. We need to restore abortion rights and protect our democracy. With Schweikert and his Trump cronies in power, we can’t get it done.

Can I count on you to chip in $3 or any amount? Click here to give: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw-q1-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82079839/464362712/-401216107?refcode=em-3.31.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWVkZGI0NzEtYWFlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0GywkDyQ8QGNN28ijNobVd1BXeqM1ZrrsOtU89yQ6WM=)

Thank you,

Marlene

name: Burns, Ken
subject: We need Jacky in the Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Can I count on your help?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82081054/464364270/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3660-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjYzZWUxZS1hY2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FczHKNUfnRriYAuLNzRgACyaEBbxRnRYG3OtST26KKE=)
Photo Credit: Evan Barlow
Hello,

For nearly five decades, I’ve been working to understand and tell the story of America through film.
Throughout the history of our nation, crises like the Civil War, the Great Depression, the First and Second World Wars, and the COVID-19 pandemic have threatened the American promise – challenging us to fight for our democratic system of government in a way that respects the rights and addresses the needs of all its citizens.

Today, it’s once again time for us to come together to stand with the leaders fighting for our democracy – leaders like Senator Jacky Rosen.
That’s why I’m reaching out today: **[Will you join me in contributing whatever you can to help Jacky reach her critical $100,000 end-of-quarter goal and win her tough reelection fight in Nevada?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82081055/464364271/1553268835?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3660-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjYzZWUxZS1hY2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FczHKNUfnRriYAuLNzRgACyaEBbxRnRYG3OtST26KKE=)**
Jacky is the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate, and experts predict that her race will likely decide Senate control. That’s why dark money groups are pouring money into Nevada to defeat her.

We cannot afford to lose a voice like Jacky’s in the Senate. She’s been tirelessly working to make a difference for hardworking families across the country, to defend fundamental reproductive rights, and to uphold our democracy in the face of unprecedented attacks. But to continue these vital fights, she needs the immediate support of people like you.
**Right now, polls show her race in Nevada locked neck and neck. Throughout the history of our nation, crises like the Civil War, the Great Depression, the First and Second World Wars, and the COVID-19 pandemic have threatened the American promise – challenging us to fight for our democratic system of government in a way that respects the rights and addresses the needs of all its citizens. Today, it’s once again time for us to come together to stand with the leaders fighting for our democracy – leaders like Senator Jacky Rosen. That’s why I’m reaching out today: = Jacky is the most vulnerable Democratic woman in the Senate, and experts predict that her race will likely decide Senate control. That’s why dark money groups are pouring money into Nevada to defeat her. We cannot afford to lose a voice like Jacky’s in the Senate. She’s been tirelessly working to make a difference for hardworking families across the country, to defend fundamental reproductive rights, and to uphold our democracy in the face of unprecedented attacks. But to continue these vital fights, she needs the immediate support of people like you. Right now, polls show her race in Nevada locked neck and neck. subject: Our first FEC deadline is just hours away

MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team—I know it’s Easter Sunday, so I’ll make this brief.

Normally, I wouldn’t reach out at this time, but this is a critical moment in our race. Our first end-of-quarter deadline is just hours away, and we still haven’t reached our $75,000 goal.

While I don’t want to bother you on a Sunday evening, missing our first end-of-quarter goal of the year would set us back and hurt our chances at defeating Mike Lawler and flipping NY-17 blue in November.

If you could, will you dig deep and chip in $5—or any amount you’re comfortable with—to help me close the gap before our first FEC end-of-quarter deadline of 2024 and ensure we have the momentum to win in November?

Here’s a quick, personal link for you: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-q1-24-email?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82082216/464366229/-460793036?refcode=em24_240331_EOQ5_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240331_EOQ5_fndd_gq_act___MJ_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c808bc31-aeef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODA4YmMzMS1hZWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qj-r-cEgspcnuEb9ePvlEL2KDuEz8d8gaxiiRX2IbI=)

Thank you, your support means everything to me.

Mondaire

| PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS

P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16393?t=1011?refcode=email-20240331&akid=5697%2E5885482%2EwSahqG ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, this is how
messed up our political system is. Progressives have shown courage and
moral clarity in advocating for an end to the war in Gaza. Now, they could
lose their seats in Congress because their courage has made them a target
of AIPAC’s $100 million in right-wing dark money.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16394?t=1052&akid=5697%2E5885482%2EwSahqG ][IMG]

America’s campaign finance system is completely broken, and allows
lobbying groups to spend unlimited sums to target politicians advocating
for Peace and human rights. AIPAC’s “biggest targets” include Jamaal
Bowman, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib, but the pro-Israel lobby has plans
to spend big against at least 15 pro-Peace progressives.

AIPAC’s goal is to back the far-right and corporate Democrats, and defeat
all voices in Congress that are critical of Netanyahu’s war in Gaza.
That’s why we’re mobilizing to Reject AIPAC, remove its influence in
Democratic primaries, and support our progressive champions in 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16393?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240331&akid=5697%2E5885482%2EwSahqG ]Donate today to help us hit our $7,361 March fundraising goal — a goal we
need to reach to make sure we have the funds to mobilize and organize
against AIPAC’s $100,000,000 of anti-peace, anti-progressive spending.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16393?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240331&akid=5697%2E5885482%2EwSahqG ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16393?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240331&akid=5697%2E5885482%2EwSahqG ]CHIP IN $27

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16393?t=1039?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240331&akid=5697%2E5885482%2EwSahqG ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16393?t=1040?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240331&akid=5697%2E5885482%2EwSahqG ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

AIPAC is targeting Bernie, Rashida, Jamaal, Summer Lee, and other
pro-Peace progressives with $100,000,000 in right-wing attack ads because
AIPAC won’t accept ANY criticism of Netanyahu’s horrific war in Gaza.

As Bernie says, once a candidate speaks out for the dignity of the
Palestinian people, they end up on AIPAC’s “hitlist.”

AIPAC has defended its massive spending against pro-Peace progressives by
saying that it is "entirely consistent with progressive values” to support
Netanyahu and Israel. But that’s just not true. Netanyahu’s war has killed
over 30,000 Palestinian civilians. His regime continues to block food,
water and medical aid to Gaza, leaving over a million people at risk of
starvation. And when Bernie, Summer, Rashida, and others speak out about
these atrocities, they face AIPAC’s attack ads. It’s not right, and it’s
not how our political system should work.

That’s why we’re organizing, mobilizing, building coalitions, and
defending our progressive advocates against AIPAC’s massive spending.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/16393?t=1046?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240331&akid=5697%2E5885482%2EwSahqG ]We’re fighting AIPAC’s $100 million as the largest grassroots-funded
progressive political organization in the country. Our average donation is
just $16.83, and we need you to chip in before midnight so we can stay on
track to make sure this is a winning year for progressives and a losing
year for AIPAC.

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, this is how messed up our political system is. Progressives have shown courage and moral clarity in advocating for an end to the war in Gaza. Now, they could lose their seats in Congress because their courage has made them a target of AIPAC’s $100 million in right-wing dark money. [ ][IMG] America’s campaign finance system is completely broken, and allows lobbying groups to spend unlimited sums to target politicians advocating for Peace and human rights. AIPAC’s “biggest targets” include Jamaal Bowman, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib, but the pro-Israel lobby has plans to spend big against at least 15 pro-Peace progressives. AIPAC’s goal is to back the far-right and corporate Democrats, and defeat all voices in Congress that are critical of Netanyahu’s war in Gaza. That’s why we’re mobilizing to Reject AIPAC, remove its influence in Democratic primaries, and support our progressive champions in 2024. [ ]Donate today to help us hit our $7,361 March fundraising goal — a goal we need to reach to make sure we have the funds to mobilize and organize against AIPAC’s $100,000,000 of anti-peace, anti-progressive spending. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $12 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $35 [ ]CHIP IN $50 [ ]CHIP IN $100 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT AIPAC is targeting Bernie, Rashida, Jamaal, Summer Lee, and other pro-Peace progressives with $100,000,000 in right-wing attack ads because AIPAC won’t accept ANY criticism of Netanyahu’s horrific war in Gaza. As Bernie says, once a candidate speaks out for the dignity of the Palestinian people, they end up on AIPAC’s “hitlist.” AIPAC has defended its massive spending against pro-Peace progressives by saying that it is "entirely consistent with progressive values” to support Netanyahu and Israel. But that’s just not true. Netanyahu’s war has killed over 30,000 Palestinian civilians. His regime continues to block food, water and medical aid to Gaza, leaving over a million people at risk of starvation. And when Bernie, Summer, Rashida, and others speak out about these atrocities, they face AIPAC’s attack ads. It’s not right, and it’s not how our political system should work. That’s why we’re organizing, mobilizing, building coalitions, and defending our progressive advocates against AIPAC’s massive spending. [ ]We’re fighting AIPAC’s $100 million as the largest grassroots-funded progressive political organization in the country. Our average donation is just $16.83, and we need you to chip in before midnight so we can stay on track to make sure this is a winning year for progressives and a losing year for AIPAC. When we organize, we win. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, it’s Quentin James, founder of The Collective PAC. I just spoke to the team, and we’re still $3,021 away from where we need to be to hit our $30,000 goal. MAGA extremists will stop at nothing to take complete control of our government and we can’t let that happen. Peter, can you chip in $10 right now to help us hit our goal and fend off Trump, his MAGA buddies, and dark money donors? I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. Thanks for all your help. — Quentin James The Collective PAC | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=mqem7eGzIejHg8%2FgOuL4Qx4wWLUkCB757xsWXhkizwEHPJLJBvZdAjK2ZsmsFlMWHW8KqnqPYU0K1BuzJitcBiW70UbqL63OhFRPqLWSptP08fHHuBoWSowU8MWwaCNRrn24D9Lxek5zOCpT07gOVWsYzW0ZirAJ4YPA5A9Lfeu005%2BUdicT8VpCHRRuM8pEElf%2BH4CuGZ7KsWJ6R6a8gwFWpPPzCS6l75S4WvaQWzqw1dmFz%2BsqQHDHS1bz2fiLLmshwT9fvZ%2F49zM9pm0f87FeHDKhHCmFMFf0bkvtqqYfPgN9VNiWzk70R7MIAPfl%2B1k7NYWeF9SfWSwpANKcs3UCkyRWFBgBuSuqZrbE%2B3%2B4SI0ylY%2Ffy3kyCIo2JRIz4s4Mqf02IWjg5caFA7oi6KCLT6BozVRlQ3jLwJjmLPw%3D]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24]Peter,

It's Brianna Brown and Michelle Tremillo, TOP PAC's Co-Executive Directors. We know it's the weekend, and the last thing you want to do is read an email, but we needed to reach out to say thank you for the overwhelming grassroots support we've received just over the last few days.

Our work is just getting started. Tonight at midnight marks our first public fundraising deadline of the election year and we're not quite where we need to be (but we're close!). We set a $10,000 fundraising goal and every single penny will go to ensuring we have the ample resources we need to mobilize Black and Latino voters, help progressive leaders win in Texas, and build a future where EVERY Texan is supported and heard — no matter their age, race, gender, or ZIP code.

Can you chip in $, $, $, or even just $3 before midnight to help us reach our $10K goal and make sure we’re fully prepared for the rest of the election year? We’re ready to mobilize thousands of Texans to the polls, elect progressive leaders, and give our all in fighting GOP extremism. We hope you can join us by contributing today: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-eoq-mar24?amount=]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Brianna Brown and Michelle Tremillo

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82084267/464369148/-849459103?refcode=ea.0e3bdc65-b2ef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ms=ea.0e3bdc65-b2ef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTNiZGM2NS1iMmVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mPiEQzYU7MpshS2tPn0Xt7rdasTKBlo6d0GAS1mhy0Y=&emci=657c0ef1-f3ed-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&emdi=0e3bdc65-b2ef-ee11-aaf0-002248223794&ceid=46764483)

clean_body: We’re falling behind... | Hi y’all, In just a few hours, my team will close the books on our first quarter fundraising. We set an aggressive goal of $370,000, and I’ll be honest: We’re cutting it close. But that’s what we need to raise to stay competitive against Marsha Blackburn. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Folks, I’ll always be transparent with you. I know that this is going to be a tough race to win, and I know that my opponent has the upper hand. For too long, radical Republicans have had a lock on Tennessee politics, and we’ll have to create a movement like nothing our state’s seen before to take Marsha Blackburn on. She’s got corporate PACs and special interests like the gun lobby funding her re-election bid. I have you. I’m concerned that if we fall short of our goal, we won’t be able to build the kind of winning campaign that can reach voters in every corner of the state. I really do need your support more than ever. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks so much for all your help, Gloria = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

Peter ,
It’s Madison, reaching out to wish you and your family a Happy Easter! 🐣
While I have your attention, I wanted to remind you one last time about our big end-of-quarter deadline TONIGHT at midnight.
We are just 6-hours away , so if you can spare a couple of minutes, can you take a look at Sarah’s message from earlier? ( and donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq-5] if you can! )
Madison
BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE:
Hey Peter , it’s Sarah again, member of Madison’s finance team and chief “worry-er”! 😬
I’m cautiously optimistic.
We asked for your help, and we’ve had hundreds of people answer that call and DONATE ! While it has been motivating to see, it’s still not enough .
We are taking on the machine that is politics today , and to take that machine on you need $$$ (and lots of it). Now, the rest of the finance team doesn’t think this will work, but I swung enough favors to give it a try!
Will you pitch in $46.46 to help us boot Bice to the curb? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq-5]
You may be thinking a couple things:
1.) These numbers are oddly specific; they're exactly where our polling numbers stand.
2.) Can my donation really make a difference? YES IT CAN - every dollar matters.

Sarah! :)

I’m reaching out just one last time before the month ends to see if you can chip in any amount to help my team reach our end-of-quarter goal. With only a few hours to spare, we’re just $1,679 short of our $15,000 target.

This grassroots team has stepped up in a big way over the past week, and I’m incredibly grateful for your support. Thanks to grassroots supporters just like you, we’re so close to reaching our goal and putting forward a strong FEC report.

If you’re able to chip in even just $1 more before midnight, here’s a link just for you: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sykesq12024**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82085808/464371936/-1745565447?refcode=em_fr_2024.03.31_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTFmYjBhOS1iM2VmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=er-PDrToab304676DOYOTRQh4MUJt0TWWVVwXz2swuc=)

Thank you, Peter, for all your support.

_Emilia_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: All I had was a pen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
I won’t ever forget it, friend.
Standing on the House floor. Hearing shouts, pounding, breaking glass. Barricading the door, teaching my colleagues how to use their gas masks. Texting my staff, telling them to hide.
I carried a rifle in Iraq and all I had to defend myself on January 6th was a pen. But I was ready to fight.
And after that day, Trump’s loyalists crawled right back to him. Witnessing them reject what they lived through, watching them ignore the testimony of the police officers that defended us that day while they were beaten, bloodied, pepper sprayed, cursed at... it makes me sick.
Kari Lake thinks the January Sixers are patriots who were “invited in” — she even campaigns with them.
I think anyone who supports those terrorists and traitors shouldn’t be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate.
This race in Arizona is just me and her. It’s on us to stop her march to more power and influence. Whoever wins in Arizona is going to determine which party holds the Senate, and could even decide whether Trump takes back the White House.
I need you with me, and I need you to take this race seriously.
Please split a donation of $25 — that or anything you can give — between my campaign and Serve America to crush Kari Lake’s campaign and defend our democracy. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
Thanks for your support. As we gear up for one of the toughest elections of our lives, it means a lot to have you behind me.
Ruben
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
