name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Here’s why I’m really asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We have to build this team and grow this movement side by side.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1994%2E4032634%2ENk8M7i)
---
I could ask if you can make a donation right now because tonight is our end-of-quarter FEC deadline, and we’re about to release a report on our fundraising numbers for the past three months. I could ask because that report will be our first since a Republican challenger entered the race against me, and we need to show our grassroots strength. I could ask because every contribution shows the depth and breadth of our movement and our support for plans like a wealth tax, universal child care, ensuring the right to an abortion nationwide, and rooting corruption out of Washington. [**But it all boils down to this: I’m asking if you can make a donation right now because we’re a grassroots team, and we make each other stronger with every action we take. Can you pitch in $28 or any amount to support our movement?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1964?amount=28&t=8&akid=1994%2E4032634%2ENk8M7i)

We’re building this team and growing this movement side by side. When we link arms — alongside people in Massachusetts and all over the country — we become a force strong enough to overcome powerful special interests. We become a group strong enough to put Washington on the side of working families, not just the rich and powerful. And we become a campaign strong enough to defeat MAGA Republican extremists who want to impose their out-of-touch ideology on every American. [**So I’m going to ask one more time before tonight’s end-of-quarter FEC deadline: If it makes sense for you right now, please make a contribution of any amount to strengthen our movement that’s fighting to put our government on the side of working people.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1964?t=14&akid=1994%2E4032634%2ENk8M7i) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

name: John Avlon
subject: A quick message before our deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends, we've had a great kickoff to our campaign. Nick LaLota’s running scared.

And yes, George Santos is in the race, but make no mistake: they’re just the two faces of Trumpism. On the one side, you’ve got a serial liar, and on the other, a Trump flunky. Ultimately both will do anything Trump says. That’s why the stakes have never been higher for us to win this seat.

The way we win it is clear. My neighbors on Long Island want to get past this hyperpartisanship. They want to focus on fixing, not fighting. They want common sense solutions to the problems we all face. And that's what we can deliver.

The bottom line is simple: If Democrats take back this seat, we'll take back the House. That’s why I need your help before our midnight deadline tonight. Please pitch in and let’s send a strong message: We’re all in to win this fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-q1?refcode=em031]

Thank you for your support. I can’t fight the good fight without you.

-John

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-donate-q1?refcode=em031]

PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
John Avlon for Congress
PO Box 1200
Sag Harbor, NY 11963
United States

I can’t fight the good fight without you. -John CONTRIBUTE [] PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS John Avlon for Congress PO Box 1200 Sag Harbor, NY 11963 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82087397/464373483/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1008-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E3Mzg1MmUtYjVlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9GvPBC8OSDtq1fcKb-sexXg7I5AwB8ezr3HsgkC6QIQ=)
Friend,
It’s Chuck Schumer, and I’m reaching out with an urgent message for all Democrats: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s Senate campaign in Florida is one of our BEST — _and only_ — chances to save our Senate majority.
Polling data shows Debbie 4 points ahead, which means that it’s absolutely critical that Debbie has the resources she needs to defeat Rick Scott and his massive personal fortune. **But I just heard from Debbie’s team, and they’re pacing 19% behind their critical $700,000 end-of-quarter goal!**
Falling short here would be disastrous for Debbie’s campaign AND for the future of our Senate majority. As Senate Majority Leader, I simply can’t sit idly by and let that happen. **[So I’m personally asking — friend, will you chip in just $](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82087398/464373484/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1008-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E3Mzg1MmUtYjVlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9GvPBC8OSDtq1fcKb-sexXg7I5AwB8ezr3HsgkC6QIQ=)****[10 before midnight to help Debbie make up the gap and get back on track?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82087399/464373485/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1008-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E3Mzg1MmUtYjVlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9GvPBC8OSDtq1fcKb-sexXg7I5AwB8ezr3HsgkC6QIQ=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82087400/464373486/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=jtk1008-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E3Mzg1MmUtYjVlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9GvPBC8OSDtq1fcKb-sexXg7I5AwB8ezr3HsgkC6QIQ=)

---
I know that a donation of $10 might not sound like enough to make a difference in a race like this one. But Debbie’s story shows exactly how impactful a small action can be.
You see, Debbie immigrated to America from Ecuador when she was only 14. After watching her mom work double shifts to pay the bills, Debbie got a job at the local doughnut shop.
Her minimum wage checks were small, but they helped make ends meet. Eventually that doughnut shop job made it possible for her to put herself through college, pursue a career of service, and become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress.
Now, Debbie is running for Senate against a megamillionaire who spent $64 MILLION to buy this seat last time around. But she’s not scared.
Debbie knows that just $10, about the cost of a dozen doughnuts, can be enough to change _everything._
**_Just $10_** will help her run ads to fight back against Scott’s lies.

**_Just $10_** will help her hire incredible staff and travel around the state to meet voters.

**_Just $10_** will help her turn out the vote in blue districts, register new voters, and reach swing voters who could make or break this election.

**_Just $10_** could be enough to defeat Rick Scott and save our Senate majority.
**So I’m asking one final time:[Please, will you donate before midnight tonight to help Debbie win her critical race? If enough people step up and chip in $](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82087404/464373490/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1008-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E3Mzg1MmUtYjVlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9GvPBC8OSDtq1fcKb-sexXg7I5AwB8ezr3HsgkC6QIQ=)****[10 or $25 or whatever you can spare tonight, we can finally flip Florida blue and save our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82087405/464373491/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&refcode=jtk1008-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E3Mzg1MmUtYjVlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9GvPBC8OSDtq1fcKb-sexXg7I5AwB8ezr3HsgkC6QIQ=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82087406/464373492/849749119?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1008-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2E3Mzg1MmUtYjVlZi1lZTExLWFhZjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzNzk0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9GvPBC8OSDtq1fcKb-sexXg7I5AwB8ezr3HsgkC6QIQ=)
---
Thank you,

Chuck Schumer
|

name: Susan
subject: can’t afford to fall behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I’m sorry to bother you on a Sunday, and I know you’ve heard a lot from my team and me this week, but I had to check in one more time before tonight’s FEC fundraising deadline.

| Hi Peter,

To all those who celebrate, Happy Easter!

I’m sorry to bother you on a Sunday, and I know you’ve heard a lot from my team and me this week, but I had to check in one more time before tonight’s FEC fundraising deadline.

With just a few hours before we have to file our quarterly report, we’re still $1,038 short of our must-hit $30,000 goal.

If you are able, can I count on you to chip in at this personal link before midnight? [_**https://wildforcongress.com/Q12024**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82087570/464373888/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-03-31_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDFiN2RjMi1iNWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=64ycMZ1fYw7SFGp2JiuVSueOVRyYvX9Js9on7cTqBpA=)

Believe me, Peter, I hate asking for your hard-earned money — and I know I’ve been asking a lot ahead of this important FEC filing deadline.

But Republicans are already attacking me in their efforts to unseat me and hold the House majority, so we can’t afford to fall behind on a single goal.

Can I count on you to chip in before midnight? Even a small contribution, like $5 or $10, can make a big difference as I work to defend this battleground seat.

You can use this personal link: [_**https://wildforcongress.com/Q12024**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/82087571/464373889/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-03-31_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDFiN2RjMi1iNWVmLWVlMTEtYWFmMC0wMDIyNDgyMjM3OTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=64ycMZ1fYw7SFGp2JiuVSueOVRyYvX9Js9on7cTqBpA=)

Thank you,
Susan

body:
Peter, first I want to wish you a Happy Easter. If you
celebrate, I’m hoping you are in the midst of spending time with loved
ones and celebrating this righteous day.

Look, I wasn’t planning on emailing you today,
Peter, but I figured this was
important enough that it warranted reaching out:

We’re mere hours away from the final FEC filing deadline before the
Democratic Primary, and while we’re incredibly close to hitting our
$75,000 goal, I’m not willing to leave anything to chance.

That’s why I just had to reach out one last time before the end of the
quarter and ask for your support in our critical U.S. Senate race.

So what do you say,
Peter: [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15601?t=1007&amount=25&akid=1311%2E52803%2E-wqqXQ ]Would you please
consider making a last-minute donation before midnight to ensure we start
April with momentum and the resources to fund our ads budget and staff up
our ground game to reach voters in every corner of Maryland?

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15601?t=1008&amount=25&akid=1311%2E52803%2E-wqqXQ ]Donate $25

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/15601?t=1009&amount=35&akid=1311%2E52803%2E-wqqXQ ]Other Amount

Thanks,

Angela

name: The GIFFORDS Team
subject: 🚨 This is your last chance 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We deserve a better future—a future free from gun violence—and we’re going to keep fighting for it as long as it takes
#

Team, with just a few hours left until our FEC fundraising deadline passes, right now is your absolute **last chance** to donate to GIFFORDS PAC before our quarterly fundraising drive comes to an end.
[**Before this critical moment passes, will you please contribute $3 or anything you can to GIFFORDS PAC right away?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240331-3-30&amount=3&t=1&akid=7867%2E3935704%2E3h7Toy)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
**[DONATE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-mar24.bWeAf2&amount=3&refcode=em240331-3-30&t=2&akid=7867%2E3935704%2E3h7Toy)**
We need to finish this quarter with strong numbers that show we are a coalition ready to take on the gun lobby, demand action from our elected officials, and replace gun lobby-backed politicians with gun safety champions in this year’s elections.
We deserve a better future—a future free from gun violence—and we’re going to keep fighting for it as long as it takes. But we can’t do this work without your support.
So please, don’t miss this opportunity to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC and help us reach our goals for the quarter.
You can use this link to donate:
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/March-2024**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-mar24.5Zicua&refcode=em240331-3-30&amount=3&t=3&akid=7867%2E3935704%2E3h7Toy)
Thank you. With your help, we know we have what it takes to keep fighting for a better, safer future.
\- The team at GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=7867%2E3935704%2E3h7Toy) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
